blocks.html_en: Main

Engineering enzymes for new or improved function provides solutions to problems in biomedical research, therapeutics, chemical synthesis and environmental science3,4. Enzymes with tailor-made properties can be generated through directed evolution, typically starting from a natural protein. Phage-assisted continuous evolution (PACE) is a particularly powerful protein evolution method owing to its ability to perform dozens of generations of mutation, selection and replication every 24 h without researcher intervention2,5. PACE selections have been used to reprogramme the specificity of diverse proteins, including DNA-binding domains, antibody mimetics, degron tags and catalysts including polymerases, aminoacyl-tRNA synthetases, dehydrogenases and proteases2,6,7,8,9,10,11,12. PACE has also yielded programmable nucleases, base editors, prime editors, transposases and recombinases with robust gene-editing activity in mammalian cells7,13,14,15,16,17. All of these examples initiated evolution with genes encoding natural proteins.

sentences.en: Engineering enzymes for new or improved function provides solutions to problems in biomedical research, therapeutics, chemical synthesis and environmental science3,4.
sentences.zh: 工程酶的新功能或改进功能为生物医学研究、治疗学、化学合成和环境科学中的问题提供了解决方案3,4。

sentences.en: Enzymes with tailor-made properties can be generated through directed evolution, typically starting from a natural protein.
sentences.zh: 具有定制特性的酶可以通过定向进化产生，通常从天然蛋白质开始。

sentences.en: Phage-assisted continuous evolution (PACE) is a particularly powerful protein evolution method owing to its ability to perform dozens of generations of mutation, selection and replication every 24 h without researcher intervention2,5.
sentences.zh: 噬菌体辅助连续进化 (PACE) 是一种特别强大的蛋白质进化方法，因为它能够每 24 小时执行数十代突变、选择和复制，而无需研究人员干预2,5。

sentences.en: PACE selections have been used to reprogramme the specificity of diverse proteins, including DNA-binding domains, antibody mimetics, degron tags and catalysts including polymerases, aminoacyl-tRNA synthetases, dehydrogenases and proteases2,6,7,8,9,10,11,12.
sentences.zh: PACE 选择已用于重新编程不同蛋白质的特异性，包括 DNA 结合域、抗体模拟物、降解决定子标签和催化剂，包括聚合酶、氨酰基-tRNA 合成酶、脱氢酶和蛋白酶2,6,7,8,9,10,11,12。

sentences.en: PACE has also yielded programmable nucleases, base editors, prime editors, transposases and recombinases with robust gene-editing activity in mammalian cells7,13,14,15,16,17.
sentences.zh: PACE 还产生了在哺乳动物细胞中具有强大基因编辑活性的可编程核酸酶、碱基编辑器、引物编辑器、转座酶和重组酶7,13,14,15,16,17。

sentences.en: All of these examples initiated evolution with genes encoding natural proteins.
sentences.zh: 所有这些例子都启动了编码天然蛋白质的基因的进化。

blocks.html_en: Although a natural enzyme can serve as an effective starting point for laboratory evolution, directed evolution experiments struggle when mutations that support the desired function incur excessive folding or solubility deficiencies18,19,20,21. Most WT proteins are marginally stable22,23, and, because most mutations are destabilizing, an evolving protein that accumulates mutations to access new properties will often lose stability24,25,26. The stability that a protein can draw from to accommodate mutations that increase desired function before losing the ability to fold can therefore determine its evolutionary potential20,27.

sentences.en: Although a natural enzyme can serve as an effective starting point for laboratory evolution, directed evolution experiments struggle when mutations that support the desired function incur excessive folding or solubility deficiencies18,19,20,21.
sentences.zh: 尽管天然酶可以作为实验室进化的有效起点，但当支持所需功能的突变导致过度折叠或溶解度缺陷时，定向进化实验就会陷入困境18,19,20,21。

sentences.en: Most WT proteins are marginally stable22,23, and, because most mutations are destabilizing, an evolving protein that accumulates mutations to access new properties will often lose stability24,25,26.
sentences.zh: 大多数 WT 蛋白都具有一定程度的稳定性 22,23，而且，由于大多数突变都会不稳定，因此积累突变以获得新特性的进化蛋白通常会失去稳定性 24,25,26。

sentences.en: The stability that a protein can draw from to accommodate mutations that increase desired function before losing the ability to fold can therefore determine its evolutionary potential20,27.
sentences.zh: 因此，在失去折叠能力之前，蛋白质可以用来适应增加所需功能的突变的稳定性可以决定其进化潜力20,27。

blocks.html_en: Trading stability for new function may help to explain why evolved enzymes often have lower activity or specificity for their new functions than their WT starting points. Although PACE and other evolution methods can markedly change substrate specificities, evolved catalytic potencies on non-native substrates are often lower those that of the WT enzymes on their native substrates10,11,28,29. Reprogrammed enzymes may also retain activity on undesired native substrates10,11,13. Observations of natural evolution as well as laboratory evolution experiments have revealed examples in which enzymes must first evolve higher stability before they can evolve activity on new substrates20,30,31. Proteins that evolve a desired function but lose stability in the process have required additional engineering to recover sufficient stability to be used effectively21.

sentences.en: Trading stability for new function may help to explain why evolved enzymes often have lower activity or specificity for their new functions than their WT starting points.
sentences.zh: 用稳定性换取新功能可能有助于解释为什么进化酶的新功能活性或特异性通常低于其 WT 起点。

sentences.en: Although PACE and other evolution methods can markedly change substrate specificities, evolved catalytic potencies on non-native substrates are often lower those that of the WT enzymes on their native substrates10,11,28,29.
sentences.zh: 尽管 PACE 和其他进化方法可以显着改变底物特异性，但对非天然底物的进化催化效力通常低于 WT 酶对其天然底物的催化效力10,11,28,29。

sentences.en: Reprogrammed enzymes may also retain activity on undesired native substrates10,11,13.
sentences.zh: 重编程酶也可能保留对不需要的天然底物的活性10,11,13。

sentences.en: Observations of natural evolution as well as laboratory evolution experiments have revealed examples in which enzymes must first evolve higher stability before they can evolve activity on new substrates20,30,31.
sentences.zh: 对自然进化的观察以及实验室进化实验揭示了一些例子，其中酶必须首先进化出更高的稳定性，然后才能进化出对新底物的活性20,30,31。

sentences.en: Proteins that evolve a desired function but lose stability in the process have required additional engineering to recover sufficient stability to be used effectively21.
sentences.zh: 进化出所需功能但在此过程中失去稳定性的蛋白质需要额外的工程来恢复足够的稳定性才能有效使用21。

blocks.html_en: One approach to increase the evolutionary potential of natural enzymes is to first evolve the enzyme for enhanced thermal stability or soluble expression, then use the stabilized protein as the starting point for evolving desired properties32,33. This workflow requires substantial additional time and labour to achieve experimental evolution for stability, in addition to evolving the desired activity. Furthermore, simultaneous selection to retain function in soluble expression evolution is challenging to enforce while mitigating cheating, in which protein expression uncouples from reporter expression and activation32. Researchers have also rescued degraded stability by overexpressing chaperones during evolution, but the resulting evolved genotypes might not express well in the absence of a chaperone19. We hypothesized that computational protein design might overcome the above limitations of natural proteins as starting points for directed evolution. Machine learning-based methods have progressed rapidly in the de novo design of enzymes34,35,36. De novo-designed enzymes, however, are usually outperformed in catalytic rate by their natural counterparts, and design methodology currently requires an active site from a natural enzyme or predicted by quantum mechanics36.

sentences.en: One approach to increase the evolutionary potential of natural enzymes is to first evolve the enzyme for enhanced thermal stability or soluble expression, then use the stabilized protein as the starting point for evolving desired properties32,33.
sentences.zh: 提高天然酶进化潜力的一种方法是首先进化酶以增强热稳定性或可溶性表达，然后使用稳定的蛋白质作为进化所需特性的起点32,33。

sentences.en: This workflow requires substantial additional time and labour to achieve experimental evolution for stability, in addition to evolving the desired activity.
sentences.zh: 除了进化所需的活性之外，该工作流程还需要大量额外的时间和劳动力来实现稳定性的实验进化。

sentences.en: Furthermore, simultaneous selection to retain function in soluble expression evolution is challenging to enforce while mitigating cheating, in which protein expression uncouples from reporter expression and activation32.
sentences.zh: 此外，在可溶性表达进化中保留功能的同时选择在减轻作弊行为的同时具有挑战性，其中蛋白质表达与报告基因表达和激活脱钩32。

sentences.en: Researchers have also rescued degraded stability by overexpressing chaperones during evolution, but the resulting evolved genotypes might not express well in the absence of a chaperone19.
sentences.zh: 研究人员还通过在进化过程中过度表达伴侣来挽救降低的稳定性，但由此产生的进化基因型在没有伴侣的情况下可能无法良好表达19。

sentences.en: We hypothesized that computational protein design might overcome the above limitations of natural proteins as starting points for directed evolution.
sentences.zh: 我们假设计算蛋白质设计可能会克服天然蛋白质的上述限制，作为定向进化的起点。

sentences.en: Machine learning-based methods have progressed rapidly in the de novo design of enzymes34,35,36.
sentences.zh: 基于机器学习的方法在酶的从头设计中进展迅速34,35,36。

sentences.en: De novo-designed enzymes, however, are usually outperformed in catalytic rate by their natural counterparts, and design methodology currently requires an active site from a natural enzyme or predicted by quantum mechanics36.
sentences.zh: 然而，从头设计的酶在催化速率方面通常优于天然酶，而设计方法目前需要天然酶的活性位点或通过量子力学预测36。

blocks.html_en: Machine learning models as well as physical modelling have successfully redesigned the sequences of natural proteins. Both the neural network-based ProteinMPNN and the physical energy-based method PROSS have improved protein stability while retaining native function for proteins with various folds and functions1,37,38. We sought to explore whether laboratory-evolved enzymes can be redesigned computationally to restore the stability lost during evolution, and to determine whether stability-redesigned enzymes serve as superior starting points for laboratory protein evolution. Encouragingly, a recent report has demonstrated that a sequence-redesigned Fe(II)/αKG-superfamily enzyme can evolve higher hydroxylase activity than a WT enzyme in discrete screening39. However, the evolvability of sequence-redesigned enzymes across distinct substrates with diverse starting activities and physicochemical properties has not yet been reported. More generally, how sequence redesign modifies the broad fitness landscape surveyed over many generations of laboratory evolution remains to be investigated. Whether a protein redesigned for native function can more readily evolve to eliminate that function in favour of a non-native one is also unexplored, despite the usefulness of such a capability to generate proteins with novel specificities.

sentences.en: Machine learning models as well as physical modelling have successfully redesigned the sequences of natural proteins.
sentences.zh: 机器学习模型以及物理建模已经成功地重新设计了天然蛋白质的序列。

sentences.en: Both the neural network-based ProteinMPNN and the physical energy-based method PROSS have improved protein stability while retaining native function for proteins with various folds and functions1,37,38.
sentences.zh: 基于神经网络的 ProteinMPNN 和基于物理能量的方法 PROSS 都提高了蛋白质稳定性，同时保留了具有各种折叠和功能的蛋白质的天然功能1,37,38。

sentences.en: We sought to explore whether laboratory-evolved enzymes can be redesigned computationally to restore the stability lost during evolution, and to determine whether stability-redesigned enzymes serve as superior starting points for laboratory protein evolution.
sentences.zh: 我们试图探索是否可以通过计算重新设计实验室进化的酶，以恢复进化过程中失去的稳定性，并确定稳定性重新设计的酶是否可以作为实验室蛋白质进化的优越起点。

sentences.en: Encouragingly, a recent report has demonstrated that a sequence-redesigned Fe(II)/αKG-superfamily enzyme can evolve higher hydroxylase activity than a WT enzyme in discrete screening39.
sentences.zh: 令人鼓舞的是，最近的一份报告表明，在离散筛选中，序列重新设计的 Fe(II)/αKG 超家族酶可以进化出比 WT 酶更高的羟化酶活性39。

sentences.en: However, the evolvability of sequence-redesigned enzymes across distinct substrates with diverse starting activities and physicochemical properties has not yet been reported.
sentences.zh: 然而，序列重新设计的酶在具有不同起始活性和理化性质的不同底物中的进化性尚未报道。

sentences.en: More generally, how sequence redesign modifies the broad fitness landscape surveyed over many generations of laboratory evolution remains to be investigated.
sentences.zh: 更一般地说，序列重新设计如何改变在多代实验室进化中调查的广泛适应性景观仍有待研究。

sentences.en: Whether a protein redesigned for native function can more readily evolve to eliminate that function in favour of a non-native one is also unexplored, despite the usefulness of such a capability to generate proteins with novel specificities.
sentences.zh: 尽管这种能力可以产生具有新颖特异性的蛋白质，但针对天然功能重新设计的蛋白质是否可以更容易地进化以消除该功能以支持非天然功能也尚未得到探索。

blocks.html_en: Here we report that integrating sequence redesign with laboratory protein evolution overcomes challenges inherent to each approach, using protease reprogramming as a model evolutionary challenge. We used ProteinMPNN to redesign reprogrammed proteases after laboratory evolution to restore stability, activity and soluble expression (Fig. 1a, left). To investigate evolvability, we performed replicate side-by-side evolution campaigns for three distinct substrates initiated with three stability-redesigned proteases or the WT protease, revealing that initiating protein evolution with ProteinMPNN-redesigned or PROSS-redesigned enzymes consistently led to higher activity than evolution of the WT starting enzymes (Fig. 1a, right). We found that redesigned starting points expand the functional sequence space of evolution, evolve new enzyme function faster and succeed at a higher rate than WT starting points. Finally, a redesigned protease evolved to specifically cleave the disease-relevant ataxin-2 protein achieved enhanced activity and stability compared with WT-evolved proteases evolved in parallel. The best-performing ataxin-2-cleaving proteases evolved from the redesigned protease starting point were far more specific for ataxin-2 than proteases evolved from the natural enzyme. Our results establish a workflow that integrates computational sequence design and laboratory evolution to generate enzymes with new properties more effectively.

sentences.en: Here we report that integrating sequence redesign with laboratory protein evolution overcomes challenges inherent to each approach, using protease reprogramming as a model evolutionary challenge.
sentences.zh: 在这里，我们报告，使用蛋白酶重编程作为模型进化挑战，将序列重新设计与实验室蛋白质进化相结合克服了每种方法固有的挑战。

sentences.en: We used ProteinMPNN to redesign reprogrammed proteases after laboratory evolution to restore stability, activity and soluble expression (Fig. 1a, left).
sentences.zh: 我们使用 ProteinMPNN 在实验室进化后重新设计重新编程的蛋白酶，以恢复稳定性、活性和可溶性表达（图 1a，左）。

sentences.en: To investigate evolvability, we performed replicate side-by-side evolution campaigns for three distinct substrates initiated with three stability-redesigned proteases or the WT protease, revealing that initiating protein evolution with ProteinMPNN-redesigned or PROSS-redesigned enzymes consistently led to higher activity than evolution of the WT starting enzymes (Fig. 1a, right).
sentences.zh: 为了研究进化性，我们对由三种稳定性重新设计的蛋白酶或 WT 蛋白酶启动的三种不同底物进行了复制并行进化活动，揭示了用 ProteinMPNN 重新设计或 PROSS 重新设计的酶启动蛋白质进化始终比 WT 起始酶的进化产生更高的活性（图 1a，右）。

sentences.en: We found that redesigned starting points expand the functional sequence space of evolution, evolve new enzyme function faster and succeed at a higher rate than WT starting points.
sentences.zh: 我们发现，重新设计的起点比 WT 起点扩大了进化的功能序列空间，更快地进化出新的酶功能，并且成功率更高。

sentences.en: Finally, a redesigned protease evolved to specifically cleave the disease-relevant ataxin-2 protein achieved enhanced activity and stability compared with WT-evolved proteases evolved in parallel.
sentences.zh: 最后，一种重新设计的蛋白酶进化来特异性切割与疾病相关的ataxin-2蛋白，与并行进化的WT进化蛋白酶相比，其活性和稳定性得到增强。

sentences.en: The best-performing ataxin-2-cleaving proteases evolved from the redesigned protease starting point were far more specific for ataxin-2 than proteases evolved from the natural enzyme.
sentences.zh: 从重新设计的蛋白酶起点进化而来的性能最佳的 ataxin-2 裂解蛋白酶对 ataxin-2 的特异性远高于从天然酶进化而来的蛋白酶。

sentences.en: Our results establish a workflow that integrates computational sequence design and laboratory evolution to generate enzymes with new properties more effectively.
sentences.zh: 我们的研究结果建立了一个工作流程，将计算序列设计和实验室进化相结合，以更有效地生成具有新特性的酶。

sentences.en: Fig. 1: Overview for integrating computational protein sequence design and continuous evolution, and redesign of stabilized BoNT/E proteases.
sentences.zh: 图 1：整合计算蛋白质序列设计和持续进化以及稳定 BoNT/E 蛋白酶的重新设计的概述。

blocks.html_en: a, Left, redesigning laboratory-evolved enzymes yields highly potent enzymes with reprogrammed specificity. Right, redesigned proteases are superior evolutionary starting points that have an expanded, higher-fitness mutation space. b, Residues that were constrained or allowed to vary during redesign in BoNT/E protease. c, Catalytic rate and soluble yield for assayed designs. Rate assays were conducted with 2.5 nM protease and 4.75 µM SNAP25 FRET substrate. The dashed lines indicate values for the WT protease. d, Abundance of top redesigned proteases in purification elution fractions E1–E4 from the soluble fraction of E. coli expression cells. Out of approximately 1 ml of elution fraction, 5 µl was loaded into each lane. e, Protein thermal melting curves to measure Tm. Thermal unfolding was followed by SYPRO orange fluorophore. Tm values, calculated as the temperature at which the slope of the curve is maximal, are provided in Supplementary Table 6. f, Michaelis–Menten plot for in vitro cleavage kinetics with the SNAP25 FRET substrate. Resulting kinetic parameters for BoNT/E protease variants are provided in Supplementary Table 5. V0, initial velocity. g, Apparent protease activity in PACE protease cleavage selection circuit host cells measured by luciferase signal. OD, optical density. The values and error bars represent mean ± s.d. of three replicates (e–g).

blocks.html_en: Protease redesign for stability

sentences.en: Protease redesign for stability
sentences.zh: 重新设计蛋白酶以提高稳定性

blocks.html_en: We chose proteases to investigate the evolution of computationally reprogrammed enzymes10,11,40. We have previously showed that protease PACE can generate enzymes that process substrates vastly different from the native substrate and show low activity on off-target substrates, resulting in specificity changes of more than 106-fold11. During protease PACE, the fitness of phage encoding an evolving protease is coupled to the activity of that protease on a target substrate. An autoinhibited T7 RNA polymerase variant with the target substrate inserted between the inhibitory and polymerase domains as well as the essential phage gIII under control of the T7 promoter are encoded on an accessory plasmid in Escherichia coli host cells. Phage infection and the protease-mediated cleavage of the target substrate liberates T7 RNA polymerase to transcribe gIII, enabling propagation of phage encoding that active protease40. For concomitant negative selection against an off-target substrate, an orthogonal autoinhibited T7 variant is encoded with the off-target substrate such that off-target cleavage activates transcription of gIII-neg, a dominant negative variant that suppresses phage propagation6. A host cell mutagenesis plasmid41 continuously mutates phage genomes, and propagating phage are continuously diluted by fresh host cell culture so that phage encoding more active or specific proteases enrich over many generations of mutation, selection and replication.

sentences.en: We chose proteases to investigate the evolution of computationally reprogrammed enzymes10,11,40.
sentences.zh: 我们选择蛋白酶来研究计算重编程酶的进化10,11,40。

sentences.en: We have previously showed that protease PACE can generate enzymes that process substrates vastly different from the native substrate and show low activity on off-target substrates, resulting in specificity changes of more than 106-fold11.
sentences.zh: 我们之前已经证明，蛋白酶 PACE 可以产生处理与天然底物截然不同的底物的酶，并且对脱靶底物表现出低活性，导致特异性变化超过 106 倍11。

sentences.en: During protease PACE, the fitness of phage encoding an evolving protease is coupled to the activity of that protease on a target substrate.
sentences.zh: 在蛋白酶 PACE 过程中，编码进化蛋白酶的噬菌体的适应性与该蛋白酶在目标底物上的活性相结合。

sentences.en: An autoinhibited T7 RNA polymerase variant with the target substrate inserted between the inhibitory and polymerase domains as well as the essential phage gIII under control of the T7 promoter are encoded on an accessory plasmid in Escherichia coli host cells.
sentences.zh: 在大肠杆菌宿主细胞的辅助质粒上编码了一种自抑制 T7 RNA 聚合酶变体，其靶底物插入到抑制域和聚合酶域之间，以及 T7 启动子控制下的必需噬菌体 gIII。

sentences.en: Phage infection and the protease-mediated cleavage of the target substrate liberates T7 RNA polymerase to transcribe gIII, enabling propagation of phage encoding that active protease40.
sentences.zh: 噬菌体感染和蛋白酶介导的靶底物裂解释放 T7 RNA 聚合酶来转录 gIII，从而使编码活性蛋白酶的噬菌体得以繁殖40。

sentences.en: For concomitant negative selection against an off-target substrate, an orthogonal autoinhibited T7 variant is encoded with the off-target substrate such that off-target cleavage activates transcription of gIII-neg, a dominant negative variant that suppresses phage propagation6.
sentences.zh: 对于针对脱靶底物的伴随负选择，正交自抑制 T7 变体与脱靶底物一起编码，使得脱靶切割激活 gIII-neg 的转录，gIII-neg 是抑制噬菌体繁殖的显性负变体6。

sentences.en: A host cell mutagenesis plasmid41 continuously mutates phage genomes, and propagating phage are continuously diluted by fresh host cell culture so that phage encoding more active or specific proteases enrich over many generations of mutation, selection and replication.
sentences.zh: 宿主细胞诱变质粒41不断地突变噬菌体基因组，并且繁殖的噬菌体被新鲜的宿主细胞培养物不断地稀释，使得编码更活性或特异性蛋白酶的噬菌体在许多代的突变、选择和复制中富集。

blocks.html_en: We selected members of the BoNT proteases as candidates for computational redesign and evolution. We have previously used PACE to evolve BoNT proteases with new substrate specificities11. Natural BoNT proteases are a component of a holotoxin that self-delivers into human neurons, enabling their widespread use in cosmetics and therapeutics42. We began by redesigning BoNT proteases with ProteinMPNN to improve their stability and expression while retaining catalytic function. Guided by previous redesign efforts with ProteinMPNN37, we developed a procedure for the design, in silico assessment and experimental validation of BoNT protease variants. For each protease serotype, we identified the set of residues to constrain from design so that ProteinMPNN would not alter amino acids critical to substrate binding, Zn2+ binding or catalysis. We constrained the binding pocket as defined by all residues within a specified distance to the substrate in a crystal structure, and we constrained evolutionarily conserved residues that may be important for function. The remaining (unconstrained) residues were redesigned with ProteinMPNN using the WT structure of the BoNT protease as the input. Designs were assessed for folding to the target structure by predicting structures in AlphaFold2 (AF2)43, and evaluating model confidence (predicted local distance difference test) and predicted similarity to the WT structure (root mean square deviation).

sentences.en: We selected members of the BoNT proteases as candidates for computational redesign and evolution.
sentences.zh: 我们选择 BoNT 蛋白酶的成员作为计算重新设计和进化的候选者。

sentences.en: We have previously used PACE to evolve BoNT proteases with new substrate specificities11.
sentences.zh: 我们之前曾使用 PACE 来进化具有新底物特异性的 BoNT 蛋白酶11。

sentences.en: Natural BoNT proteases are a component of a holotoxin that self-delivers into human neurons, enabling their widespread use in cosmetics and therapeutics42.
sentences.zh: 天然 BoNT 蛋白酶是全毒素的一种成分，可自行输送到人类神经元中，使其在化妆品和治疗中得到广泛应用42。

sentences.en: We began by redesigning BoNT proteases with ProteinMPNN to improve their stability and expression while retaining catalytic function.
sentences.zh: 我们首先使用 ProteinMPNN 重新设计 BoNT 蛋白酶，以提高其稳定性和表达，同时保留催化功能。

sentences.en: Guided by previous redesign efforts with ProteinMPNN37, we developed a procedure for the design, in silico assessment and experimental validation of BoNT protease variants.
sentences.zh: 在先前 ProteinMPNN37 重新设计工作的指导下，我们开发了 BoNT 蛋白酶变体的设计、计算机评估和实验验证程序。

sentences.en: For each protease serotype, we identified the set of residues to constrain from design so that ProteinMPNN would not alter amino acids critical to substrate binding, Zn2+ binding or catalysis.
sentences.zh: 对于每种蛋白酶血清型，我们确定了一组要限制设计的残基，以便 ProteinMPNN 不会改变对底物结合、Zn2+ 结合或催化至关重要的氨基酸。

sentences.en: We constrained the binding pocket as defined by all residues within a specified distance to the substrate in a crystal structure, and we constrained evolutionarily conserved residues that may be important for function.
sentences.zh: 我们限制了由晶体结构中距底物指定距离内的所有残基定义的结合口袋，并且我们限制了可能对功能重要的进化保守残基。

sentences.en: The remaining (unconstrained) residues were redesigned with ProteinMPNN using the WT structure of the BoNT protease as the input.
sentences.zh: 使用 BoNT 蛋白酶的 WT 结构作为输入，使用 ProteinMPNN 重新设计剩余的（不受约束的）残基。

sentences.en: Designs were assessed for folding to the target structure by predicting structures in AlphaFold2 (AF2)43, and evaluating model confidence (predicted local distance difference test) and predicted similarity to the WT structure (root mean square deviation).
sentences.zh: 通过预测 AlphaFold2 (AF2)43 中的结构、评估模型置信度（预测的局部距离差异测试）以及预测与 WT 结构的相似性（均方根偏差），评估设计是否折叠到目标结构。

blocks.html_en: First, we generated stabilized variants of WT BoNT/E protease. To find the combination of design constraints that best allow improvements to stability without perturbing catalysis, we generated ProteinMPNN designs with binding pocket thresholds of 14 Å or 18 Å. These stringent distance constraints, although heuristic, were set intending to preserve the structural dynamics in BoNT proteases44. Each residue closer than the threshold distance to the substrate or catalytic Zn2+ was constrained. We also applied two conservation cut-offs of 30% or 60%; each residue with at least the cut-off frequency in a multiple sequence alignment was not allowed to vary (Fig. 1b). We evaluated 22 designs for each combination of constraints with AF2 and confirmed that all predicted structures scored well (Extended Data Fig. 1). Structural features, property changes and mutation conservation of ProteinMPNN-redesigned mutations are provided in Supplementary Figs. 2 and 3. We expressed and purified proteases for 74 designs in plate-based arrayed purification. We measured soluble protease yields and cleavage rates of the native SNAP25 substrate alongside WT BoNT/E protease. Among the 74 designs, 58 (78%) were functional proteases, with 33 (45%) showing cleavage rates at least as high as WT BoNT/E protease. Among these designs, 22 (30%) both retained activity and expressed with higher soluble yield than the WT protease (Fig. 1c). Most active proteases, including those with the greatest improvement in catalysis or soluble yield, came from the 18 Å threshold design group, suggesting that redesign closer to the binding groove in the 14 Å group was usually deleterious.

sentences.en: First, we generated stabilized variants of WT BoNT/E protease.
sentences.zh: 首先，我们生成了 WT BoNT/E 蛋白酶的稳定变体。

sentences.en: To find the combination of design constraints that best allow improvements to stability without perturbing catalysis, we generated ProteinMPNN designs with binding pocket thresholds of 14 Å or 18 Å.
sentences.zh: 为了找到最能提高稳定性而不干扰催化的设计约束组合，我们生成了结合袋阈值为 14 Å 或 18 Å 的 ProteinMPNN 设计。

sentences.en: These stringent distance constraints, although heuristic, were set intending to preserve the structural dynamics in BoNT proteases44.
sentences.zh: 这些严格的距离限制虽然是启发式的，但其目的是为了保留 BoNT 蛋白酶的结构动态。

sentences.en: Each residue closer than the threshold distance to the substrate or catalytic Zn2+ was constrained.
sentences.zh: 每个距离底物或催化 Zn2+ 比阈值距离更近的残基都受到限制。

sentences.en: We also applied two conservation cut-offs of 30% or 60%; each residue with at least the cut-off frequency in a multiple sequence alignment was not allowed to vary (Fig. 1b).
sentences.zh: 我们还应用了 30% 或 60% 两种保护界限；不允许在多序列比对中至少具有截止​​频率的每个残基发生变化（图1b）。

sentences.en: We evaluated 22 designs for each combination of constraints with AF2 and confirmed that all predicted structures scored well (Extended Data Fig. 1).
sentences.zh: 我们使用 AF2 评估了每种约束组合的 22 种设计，并确认所有预测结构都得分良好（扩展数据图 1）。

sentences.en: Structural features, property changes and mutation conservation of ProteinMPNN-redesigned mutations are provided in Supplementary Figs.
sentences.zh: 补充图中提供了 ProteinMPNN 重新设计的突变的结构特征、性质变化和突变保守性。

sentences.en: 2 and 3.
We expressed and purified proteases for 74 designs in plate-based arrayed purification.
sentences.zh: 我们在基于板的阵列纯化中表达并纯化了 74 种设计的蛋白酶。

sentences.en: We measured soluble protease yields and cleavage rates of the native SNAP25 substrate alongside WT BoNT/E protease.
sentences.zh: 我们测量了天然 SNAP25 底物以及 WT BoNT/E 蛋白酶的可溶性蛋白酶产量和切割率。

sentences.en: Among the 74 designs, 58 (78%) were functional proteases, with 33 (45%) showing cleavage rates at least as high as WT BoNT/E protease.
sentences.zh: 在 74 种设计中，58 种 (78%) 是功能性蛋白酶，其中 33 种 (45%) 的切割率至少与 WT BoNT/E 蛋白酶一样高。

sentences.en: Among these designs, 22 (30%) both retained activity and expressed with higher soluble yield than the WT protease (Fig. 1c).
sentences.zh: 在这些设计中，22 个（30%）既保留了活性，又以比 WT 蛋白酶更高的可溶性产量表达（图 1c）。

sentences.en: Most active proteases, including those with the greatest improvement in catalysis or soluble yield, came from the 18 Å threshold design group, suggesting that redesign closer to the binding groove in the 14 Å group was usually deleterious.
sentences.zh: 大多数活性蛋白酶，包括那些在催化或可溶性产率方面具有最大改进的蛋白酶，都来自 18 Å 阈值设计组，这表明靠近 14 Å 组中的结合槽的重新设计通常是有害的。

blocks.html_en: We selected three of the highest expressing and most active designs for further characterization (D1–D3; Fig. 1c). All three of the top designs showed higher soluble expression in E. coli than in the WT protease (Fig. 1d and Supplementary Fig. 1), and enhanced thermal stability (Fig. 1e and Supplementary Table 5). Michaelis–Menten analysis revealed catalytic efficiencies (kcat/Km) of 260 mM−1 s−1, 310 mM−1 s−1 and 190 mM−1 s−1 for D1, D2 and D3, respectively, 1.7–2.8-fold higher than that of WT BoNT/E protease (110 mM−1 s−1; Fig. 1f and Supplementary Table 6).

sentences.en: We selected three of the highest expressing and most active designs for further characterization (D1–D3; Fig. 1c).
sentences.zh: 我们选择了三个最高表达和最活跃的设计进行进一步表征（D1-D3；图1c）。

sentences.en: All three of the top designs showed higher soluble expression in E.
sentences.zh: 所有三个顶级设计都在大肠杆菌中显示出更高的可溶性表达。

sentences.en: coli than in the WT protease (Fig. 1d and Supplementary Fig. 1), and enhanced thermal stability (Fig. 1e and Supplementary Table 5).
sentences.zh: 大肠杆菌比 WT 蛋白酶（图 1d 和补充图 1），并且热稳定性增强（图 1e 和补充表 5）。

sentences.en: Michaelis–Menten analysis revealed catalytic efficiencies (kcat/Km) of 260 mM−1 s−1, 310 mM−1 s−1 and 190 mM−1 s−1 for D1, D2 and D3, respectively, 1.7–2.8-fold higher than that of WT BoNT/E protease (110 mM−1 s−1; Fig. 1f and Supplementary Table 6).
sentences.zh: Michaelis-Menten 分析显示，D1、D2 和 D3 的催化效率（kcat/Km）分别为 260 mM−1 s−1、310 mM−1 s−1 和 190 mM−1 s−1，比 WT BoNT/E 蛋白酶（110 mM−1 s−1；图 1f 和补充表 6)。

blocks.html_en: We next sought to understand how improvements in soluble expression and catalytic rate determine fitness in the PACE selection circuit. We assessed cleavage of the T7 RNAP protease PACE substrate in E. coli via a luminescence assay in which target cleavage activates T7 polymerase to transcribe luciferase6. D2 and D3 produced higher maximal luciferase signal, and all three top designs mediated more durable cleavage, than WT BoNT/E protease (Fig. 1g), suggesting that sequence redesign improves starting fitness. Together, the experimental characterization of BoNT/E proteases demonstrates that ProteinMPNN design successfully produced variants with improved stability and activity.

sentences.en: We next sought to understand how improvements in soluble expression and catalytic rate determine fitness in the PACE selection circuit.
sentences.zh: 接下来我们试图了解可溶性表达和催化速率的提高如何决定 PACE 选择回路的适应性。

sentences.en: We assessed cleavage of the T7 RNAP protease PACE substrate in E.
sentences.zh: 我们评估了大肠杆菌中 T7 RNAP 蛋白酶 PACE 底物的裂解。

sentences.en: coli via a luminescence assay in which target cleavage activates T7 polymerase to transcribe luciferase6.
sentences.zh: 通过发光测定来检测大肠杆菌，其中目标裂解激活 T7 聚合酶以转录荧光素酶6。

sentences.en: D2 and D3 produced higher maximal luciferase signal, and all three top designs mediated more durable cleavage, than WT BoNT/E protease (Fig. 1g), suggesting that sequence redesign improves starting fitness.
sentences.zh: D2 和 D3 产生了更高的最大荧光素酶信号，并且所有三种顶级设计都比 WT BoNT/E 蛋白酶介导更持久的切割（图 1g），这表明序列重新设计改善了起始适应性。

sentences.en: Together, the experimental characterization of BoNT/E proteases demonstrates that ProteinMPNN design successfully produced variants with improved stability and activity.
sentences.zh: 总之，BoNT/E 蛋白酶的实验表征表明 ProteinMPNN 设计成功地产生了稳定性和活性提高的变体。

blocks.html_en: To compare BoNT protease redesign by ProteinMPNN to earlier redesign approaches, we redesigned BoNT/E with PROSS, a computational method that predicts stabilizing mutations using Rosetta energy calculations and evolutionary statistics38. Applying the same distance constraints as for ProteinMPNN, we designed and experimentally assayed 82 PROSS-generated variants for activity and soluble yield. PROSS sequences had fewer total mutations, fewer mutations to or from charged residues, and more conservative mutations than those generated with ProteinMPNN (Supplementary Figs. 2 and 3). Of these redesigns, 33 (40%) were at least as active and as highly expressed as WT BoNT/E (Extended Data Fig. 2a,b). Three selected top-performing redesigns (PROSS1–PROSS3) were purified at large scale. The PROSS redesigns showed enhanced expression, stability and enzyme kinetics similar to those of ProteinMPNN D1–D3 (Extended Data Fig. 2c–e), although the top-ranked ProteinMPNN redesigns had a higher average melting temperature (Tm; 55.2 °C) than the top-ranked PROSS redesigns (52.3 °C; Extended Data Fig. 2d).

sentences.en: To compare BoNT protease redesign by ProteinMPNN to earlier redesign approaches, we redesigned BoNT/E with PROSS, a computational method that predicts stabilizing mutations using Rosetta energy calculations and evolutionary statistics38.
sentences.zh: 为了将 ProteinMPNN 的 BoNT 蛋白酶重新设计与早期的重新设计方法进行比较，我们使用 PROSS 重新设计了 BoNT/E，PROSS 是一种使用 Rosetta 能量计算和进化统计来预测稳定突变的计算方法38。

sentences.en: Applying the same distance constraints as for ProteinMPNN, we designed and experimentally assayed 82 PROSS-generated variants for activity and soluble yield.

Of these redesigns, 33 (40%) were at least as active and as highly expressed as WT BoNT/E (Extended Data Fig. 2a,b).
sentences.zh: 在这些重新设计中，33 个 (40%) 至少与 WT BoNT/E 一样活跃且高度表达（扩展数据图 2a、b）。

sentences.en: The PROSS redesigns showed enhanced expression, stability and enzyme kinetics similar to those of ProteinMPNN D1–D3 (Extended Data Fig. 2c–e), although the top-ranked ProteinMPNN redesigns had a higher average melting temperature (Tm; 55.2 °C) than the top-ranked PROSS redesigns (52.3 °C; Extended Data Fig. 2d).
sentences.zh: PROSS 重新设计显示出与 ProteinMPNN D1–D3 类似的增强的表达、稳定性和酶动力学（扩展数据图 2c–e），尽管排名靠前的 ProteinMPNN 重新设计具有比排名靠前的 PROSS 重新设计（52.3 °C；扩展数据图 2d）更高的平均熔解温度（Tm；55.2 °C）。

blocks.html_en: BoNT proteases from different serotypes have distinct specificities that offer alternative starting points for evolution. We performed a similar redesign and characterization procedure on BoNT/F protease and BoNT/X protease (Supplementary Note 1). Characterization of the top three BoNT/F redesigns confirmed higher stability and PACE circuit activation than the WT protease, and similar catalytic efficiencies (Extended Data Fig. 3a–e). The top two BoNT/X designs showed successful stabilization as well as compatibility with the toxin heavy chain module for mammalian intracellular delivery (Extended Data Fig. 3f–j). Together, the results for BoNT/E, BoNT/F and BoNT/X proteases demonstrate that the redesign process can stabilize proteases with distinct substrate specificities, while retaining or improving catalytic efficiency compared with the corresponding WT enzyme.

sentences.en: BoNT proteases from different serotypes have distinct specificities that offer alternative starting points for evolution.
sentences.zh: 不同血清型的 BoNT 蛋白酶具有不同的特异性，为进化提供了替代起点。

sentences.en: We performed a similar redesign and characterization procedure on BoNT/F protease and BoNT/X protease (Supplementary Note 1).
sentences.zh: 我们对 BoNT/F 蛋白酶和 BoNT/X 蛋白酶进行了类似的重新设计和表征程序（补充说明 1）。

sentences.en: Characterization of the top three BoNT/F redesigns confirmed higher stability and PACE circuit activation than the WT protease, and similar catalytic efficiencies (Extended Data Fig. 3a–e).
sentences.zh: 前三个 BoNT/F 重新设计的表征证实了比 WT 蛋白酶更高的稳定性和 PACE 电路激活，以及类似的催化效率（扩展数据图 3a-e）。

sentences.en: The top two BoNT/X designs showed successful stabilization as well as compatibility with the toxin heavy chain module for mammalian intracellular delivery (Extended Data Fig. 3f–j).
sentences.zh: 前两种 BoNT/X 设计显示出成功的稳定性以及与哺乳动物细胞内递送的毒素重链模块的兼容性（扩展数据图 3f-j）。

sentences.en: Together, the results for BoNT/E, BoNT/F and BoNT/X proteases demonstrate that the redesign process can stabilize proteases with distinct substrate specificities, while retaining or improving catalytic efficiency compared with the corresponding WT enzyme.
sentences.zh: 总之，BoNT/E、BoNT/F 和 BoNT/X 蛋白酶的结果表明，重新设计过程可以稳定具有不同底物特异性的蛋白酶，同时与相应的 WT 酶相比，保留或提高催化效率。

blocks.html_en: The above redesign campaigns provided a suite of three types of stabilized, highly active BoNT proteases with the potential to be reprogrammed in PACE. ProteinMPNN redesign performance varied across proteases, but characterization of a practical number (96 or fewer) of redesigned variants in all tested cases yielded proteases with improved stability and retained or improved activity.

sentences.en: The above redesign campaigns provided a suite of three types of stabilized, highly active BoNT proteases with the potential to be reprogrammed in PACE.
sentences.zh: 上述重新设计活动提供了一套三种类型的稳定、高活性 BoNT 蛋白酶，具有在 PACE 中重新编程的潜力。

sentences.en: ProteinMPNN redesign performance varied across proteases, but characterization of a practical number (96 or fewer) of redesigned variants in all tested cases yielded proteases with improved stability and retained or improved activity.
sentences.zh: ProteinMPNN 重新设计性能因蛋白酶而异，但在所有测试案例中对实际数量（96 或更少）重新设计变体的表征产生了稳定性提高并保留或提高活性的蛋白酶。

blocks.html_en: Redesign enhances an evolved protease

sentences.en: Redesign enhances an evolved protease
sentences.zh: 重新设计增强了进化的蛋白酶

blocks.html_en: Next, we investigated whether redesign could rescue the degraded stability of a highly evolved protease while retaining its novel specificity. We have previously evolved BoNT/E to cleave PTEN, a target of therapeutic interest unrelated to any known BoNT protease substrate, while greatly reducing activity on the native SNAP25 substrate11. The resulting evolved E(4130)A2 protease, however, cleaves PTEN at a 11-fold slower rate than WT BoNT/E cleaves SNAP25. We tested whether the ProteinMPNN-redesigned BoNT/E variants could be combined with PACE-evolved mutations by grafting the 16 PACE mutations of E(4130)A2 into the top redesigned BoNT/E backgrounds D1, D2 and D3 (Fig. 2a). E(4130)A2 expresses more poorly and is less stable than WT BoNT/E protease (Fig. 2b,c). We observed that the mutation-grafted D1, D2 and D3 enzymes (designated D1 + (4130)A2, D2 + (4130)A2 and D3 + (4130)A2) express to a higher level in E. coli cells than E(4130)A2 by 4.2-fold, 2.2-fold and 5.2-fold, respectively (Fig. 2b). The grafted proteases retained their ability to cleave PTEN, D2 showed improved kinetics and D1 showed improved thermal stability compared with E(4130)A2 (Fig. 2c,d and Supplementary Tables 5 and 6). Activity on the original SNAP25 substrate was undetected for all variants (Fig. 2e), demonstrating that the redesigned proteases preserve the reprogrammed specificity that E(4130)A2 evolved in PACE.

sentences.zh: 接下来，我们研究了重新设计是否可以挽救高度进化的蛋白酶的稳定性下降，同时保留其新颖的特异性。

sentences.en: Fig. 2: Combining PACE-evolved BoNT/E mutations with ProteinMPNN redesign enhances expression level and activity of reprogrammed PTEN-cleaving BoNT/E protease variants.

blocks.html_en: a, Grafting mutations that evolved during PACE of WT BoNT/E protease to cleave PTEN onto a ProteinMPNN-stabilized variant of WT BoNT/E. b, Abundance of PTEN-cleaving proteases in purification elution fractions E1–E4 from the soluble fraction of E. coli expression cells. c, Protein melting curves for PTEN-cleaving proteases measured by SYPRO orange fluorescence. Tm values, calculated as the temperature at the maximal slope of the melting curve, are provided in Supplementary Table 6. d, Michaelis–Menten plot for in vitro cleavage kinetics with PTEN substrate. Kinetic parameters for PTEN-cleaving proteases are provided in Supplementary Table 5. e, Cleavage time course comparing on-target PTEN FRET substrate cleavage (left) and off-target SNAP25 FRET substrate cleavage (right) with 10 nM protease and 4.75 µM substrate. f, Co-transfection in human HEK293T cells of plasmids expressing pleckstrin domain-tagged PTEN-cleaving BoNT/E proteases and FLAG-tagged PTEN to assess PTEN cleavage from reprogrammed proteases in mammalian cells. The values and error bars represent mean ± s.d. of three replicates (c–e).

blocks.html_en: To assess these proteases in human cells, we co-transfected HEK293T cells with protease expression plasmids and a PTEN expression plasmid. The two mutation-grafted redesigned proteases were expressed to a much greater level (more than 24-fold) than either E(4130)A2 or WT BoNT/E resulting in 4.5-fold and 3.9-fold higher product formation levels for D2 + (4130)A2 and D3 + (4130)A2, respectively (Fig. 2f). These results together demonstrate that ProteinMPNN redesign of a PACE-evolved enzyme can improve expression and stability while retaining evolved specificity, leading to a much greater level of target substrate proteolysis in mammalian cells.

sentences.en: To assess these proteases in human cells, we co-transfected HEK293T cells with protease expression plasmids and a PTEN expression plasmid.
sentences.zh: 为了评估人类细胞中的这些蛋白酶，我们用蛋白酶表达质粒和 PTEN 表达质粒共转染 HEK293T 细胞。

sentences.en: The two mutation-grafted redesigned proteases were expressed to a much greater level (more than 24-fold) than either E(4130)A2 or WT BoNT/E resulting in 4.5-fold and 3.9-fold higher product formation levels for D2 + (4130)A2 and D3 + (4130)A2, respectively (Fig. 2f).
sentences.zh: 这两种突变嫁接的重新设计的蛋白酶的表达水平比E(4130)A2或WT BoNT/E高得多(超过24倍)，导致D2+(4130)A2和D3+(4130)A2的产物形成水平分别高出4.5倍和3.9倍(图2f)。

sentences.en: These results together demonstrate that ProteinMPNN redesign of a PACE-evolved enzyme can improve expression and stability while retaining evolved specificity, leading to a much greater level of target substrate proteolysis in mammalian cells.
sentences.zh: 这些结果共同证明，ProteinMPNN 对 PACE 进化酶的重新设计可以提高表达和稳定性，同时保留进化的特异性，从而在哺乳动物细胞中实现更高水平的靶底物蛋白水解。

blocks.html_en: Redesign improves evolution outcomes

sentences.en: Redesign improves evolution outcomes
sentences.zh: 重新设计改善了进化结果

blocks.html_en: We hypothesized that the greater stability of redesigned proteases may enhance evolvability on a new substrate by offering compatibility with mutations that improve desired activity but decrease protein stability. We performed a panel of PACE campaigns for new substrate cleavage in which we evolved the top redesigned, stabilized BoNT/E protease in parallel with the WT BoNT/E and compared outcomes between the two starting points.

sentences.en: We hypothesized that the greater stability of redesigned proteases may enhance evolvability on a new substrate by offering compatibility with mutations that improve desired activity but decrease protein stability.
sentences.zh: 我们假设，重新设计的蛋白酶具有更高的稳定性，可以通过提供与提高所需活性但降低蛋白质稳定性的突变的兼容性来增强新底物的进化性。

sentences.en: We performed a panel of PACE campaigns for new substrate cleavage in which we evolved the top redesigned, stabilized BoNT/E protease in parallel with the WT BoNT/E and compared outcomes between the two starting points.
sentences.zh: 我们针对新的底物裂解进行了一系列 PACE 活动，其中我们与 WT BoNT/E 并行进化了顶部重新设计的稳定 BoNT/E 蛋白酶，并比较了两个起点之间的结果。

blocks.html_en: To identify substrates representing a range of challenge, we performed substrate profiling to measure BoNT/E protease activity on all 441 possible SNAP25 single-residue variants. We selected three substrates (415, 413 and 412) of increasing difficulty based on their decreasing starting activity levels (Extended Data Fig. 4). We performed evolution on each substrate in 3–4 replicate lagoons for each starting protease. To enable 22 independent PACE lagoons in this experiment, we performed ePACE using autonomous eVOLVER and min-eVOLVER devices that facilitate parallel PACE experiments45,46,47. We assayed consensus evolved variants to determine fitness (circuit activation), and for enzyme kinetics, stability and soluble expression levels. Finally, mutations derived from either protease starting point (WT or redesigned) were grafted into the other protease background to determine whether the evolved mutations arose because of differences in starting-point robustness, or whether instead they were simply the result of evolutionary stochasticity and could benefit either starting point.

sentences.en: To identify substrates representing a range of challenge, we performed substrate profiling to measure BoNT/E protease activity on all 441 possible SNAP25 single-residue variants.
sentences.zh: 为了识别代表一系列挑战的底物，我们进行了底物分析，以测量所有 441 种可能的 SNAP25 单残基变体的 BoNT/E 蛋白酶活性。

sentences.en: We selected three substrates (415, 413 and 412) of increasing difficulty based on their decreasing starting activity levels (Extended Data Fig. 4).
sentences.zh: 我们根据起始活性水平的降低选择了三种难度不断增加的底物（415、413 和 412）（扩展数据图 4）。

sentences.en: We performed evolution on each substrate in 3–4 replicate lagoons for each starting protease.
sentences.zh: 我们对每种起始蛋白酶的每种底物进行了 3-4 个重复泻湖的进化。

sentences.en: To enable 22 independent PACE lagoons in this experiment, we performed ePACE using autonomous eVOLVER and min-eVOLVER devices that facilitate parallel PACE experiments45,46,47.
sentences.zh: 为了在本实验中启用 22 个独立的 PACE 泻湖，我们使用自主 eVOLVER 和 min-eVOLVER 设备执行 ePACE，以促进并行 PACE 实验45,46,47。

sentences.en: We assayed consensus evolved variants to determine fitness (circuit activation), and for enzyme kinetics, stability and soluble expression levels.
sentences.zh: 我们分析了共有进化变体以确定适应性（电路激活）以及酶动力学、稳定性和可溶性表达水平。

sentences.en: Finally, mutations derived from either protease starting point (WT or redesigned) were grafted into the other protease background to determine whether the evolved mutations arose because of differences in starting-point robustness, or whether instead they were simply the result of evolutionary stochasticity and could benefit either starting point.
sentences.zh: 最后，将来自任一蛋白酶起点（WT或重新设计）的突变移植到其他蛋白酶背景中，以确定进化的突变是否由于起点稳健性的差异而产生，或者它们是否只是进化随机性的结果并且可能有利于任一起点。

blocks.html_en: On the least challenging substrate 415 (P1′ I→K), both the D3 and WT proteases evolved solutions, but the D3-evolved proteases reached higher levels of activity than the WT-evolved proteases (Fig. 3a). The three D3-evolved enzymes resulted in 7.7-fold, 6.9-fold and 6.1-fold protease cleavage circuit activation over background, compared with 2.6-fold, 3.0-fold and 2.8-fold activation for the WT-evolved proteases. Both starting proteases independently evolved S162N and Y357H mutations. However, these mutations in the D3 protease background, genotype D3(415)2, resulted in 7.7-fold circuit activation, whereas the same two mutations in the WT background, E(415)1, resulted in only 2.6-fold activation.

sentences.en: On the least challenging substrate 415 (P1′ I→K), both the D3 and WT proteases evolved solutions, but the D3-evolved proteases reached higher levels of activity than the WT-evolved proteases (Fig. 3a).
sentences.zh: 在最具挑战性的底物 415（P1' I→K）上，D3 和 WT 蛋白酶都进化出溶液，但 D3 进化的蛋白酶比 WT 进化的蛋白酶达到更高的活性水平（图 3a）。

sentences.zh: 三种 D3 进化的酶导致蛋白酶裂解电路的激活比背景高 7.7 倍、6.9 倍和 6.1 倍，而 WT 进化的蛋白酶的激活则为 2.6 倍、3.0 倍和 2.8 倍。

sentences.en: Both starting proteases independently evolved S162N and Y357H mutations.

sentences.en: However, these mutations in the D3 protease background, genotype D3(415)2, resulted in 7.7-fold circuit activation, whereas the same two mutations in the WT background, E(415)1, resulted in only 2.6-fold activation.
sentences.zh: 然而，D3 蛋白酶背景（基因型 D3(415)2）中的这些突变导致 7.7 倍的电路激活，而 WT 背景（E(415)1）中的相同两个突变仅导致 2.6 倍的激活。

sentences.en: Fig. 3: The evolvability of sequence-designed proteases on a panel of PACE substrates.
sentences.zh: 图 3：序列设计的蛋白酶在一组 PACE 底物上的进化能力。

blocks.html_en: a–c, Evolutions 1, 2 and 3 on substrates 415 (a), 413 (b) and 412 (c). First row, comparison of SNAP25 and substrate sequences (colours indicate amino acid property). Second row, ePACE phage titres in three or four replicate lagoons initiated with each of the WT and D3 starting proteases. Third row, consensus genotypes from both starting points at the final PACE timepoint with mutations coloured by whether they were unique to either starting point. Fourth row, assay of all variants and the grafts of mutations derived from each starting point into the alternative background measuring soluble yield, initial catalytic rate with the cognate FRET substrate, and PACE circuit activation measured by luciferase signal represented by point size. Fifth row, luciferase-reported circuit activation of intermediate and final consensus variants with their cognate evolution substrate by time at which they were first detected by clonal sequencing. The values represent the mean of two replicates (fourth row panels in a–c), and the values and error bars represent the mean ± s.d. of three replicates (fifth row panels in a–c).

First row, comparison of SNAP25 and substrate sequences (colours indicate amino acid property).

blocks.html_en: Beyond these shared mutations, the D3 and WT BoNT/E proteases evolved mutations unique to each starting point, such as G101S and I232T from WT BoNT/E and N238K from D3 (Fig. 3a, third row). WT BoNT/E-derived genotypes with mutations G101S and I232T were compatible with the D3 background: grafting either of these genotypes into the D3 background generated proteases with high PACE circuit activation, purification yield and kinetics. By contrast, the genotype with the N238K mutation evolved by the D3 protease only modestly benefited the WT background, increasing circuit activation when grafted into the WT protease only 1.5-fold, whereas the same genotype in the D3 background enhanced luciferase activation 5.6-fold (Fig. 3a, fourth row). These results demonstrate how redesign of BoNT/E protease into D3 expanded the space of beneficial mutations accessed during PACE to include variants that the WT protease was unable to fully leverage. Apart from end point performance, we also assessed how variants evolved from each starting point perform over the time course of the evolution. Redesign-evolved clones outperform WT-evolved clones by a similar margin at intermediate and final timepoints, indicating that the two starting points approached their peak function during evolution at similar rates (Fig. 3a, fifth row).

sentences.en: Beyond these shared mutations, the D3 and WT BoNT/E proteases evolved mutations unique to each starting point, such as G101S and I232T from WT BoNT/E and N238K from D3 (Fig. 3a, third row).
sentences.zh: 除了这些共享突变之外，D3 和 WT BoNT/E 蛋白酶还进化出了每个起始点特有的突变，例如来自 WT BoNT/E 的 G101S 和 I232T 以及来自 D3 的 N238K（图 3a，第三行）。

sentences.en: WT BoNT/E-derived genotypes with mutations G101S and I232T were compatible with the D3 background: grafting either of these genotypes into the D3 background generated proteases with high PACE circuit activation, purification yield and kinetics.
sentences.zh: 具有 G101S 和 I232T 突变的 WT BoNT/E 衍生基因型与 D3 背景兼容：将这些基因型中的任何一个移植到 D3 背景中都会生成具有高 PACE 电路激活、纯化产率和动力学的蛋白酶。

sentences.en: By contrast, the genotype with the N238K mutation evolved by the D3 protease only modestly benefited the WT background, increasing circuit activation when grafted into the WT protease only 1.5-fold, whereas the same genotype in the D3 background enhanced luciferase activation 5.6-fold (Fig. 3a, fourth row).
sentences.zh: 相比之下，由 D3 蛋白酶进化而来的 N238K 突变基因型仅对 WT 背景有一定的好处，当移植到 WT 蛋白酶中时，电路激活仅增加 1.5 倍，而 D3 背景中的相同基因型将荧光素酶激活增强 5.6 倍（图 3a，第四行）。

sentences.en: These results demonstrate how redesign of BoNT/E protease into D3 expanded the space of beneficial mutations accessed during PACE to include variants that the WT protease was unable to fully leverage.
sentences.zh: 这些结果表明，将 BoNT/E 蛋白酶重新设计到 D3 中如何扩大了 PACE 期间获得的有益突变的空间，以包括 WT 蛋白酶无法充分利用的变体。

sentences.en: Apart from end point performance, we also assessed how variants evolved from each starting point perform over the time course of the evolution.
sentences.zh: 除了终点性能之外，我们还评估了从每个起点进化而来的变体在进化过程中的表现。

sentences.en: Redesign-evolved clones outperform WT-evolved clones by a similar margin at intermediate and final timepoints, indicating that the two starting points approached their peak function during evolution at similar rates (Fig. 3a, fifth row).
sentences.zh: 重新设计进化的克隆在中间和最终时间点的性能优于野生型进化的克隆，这表明两个起点在进化过程中以相似的速率接近其峰值功能（图3a，第五行）。

blocks.html_en: The intermediate difficulty evolution on substrate 413 (P2 D→I) resulted in similar outcomes. Once again, redesign-evolved variants attained higher activity than those evolved from WT BoNT/E protease (Fig. 3b). D3-evolved genotypes achieved higher levels of circuit activation of up to 15-fold than the WT-evolved genotypes of up to 8.5-fold. The soluble expression of the design-evolved and D3 background proteases was consistently higher than those of the WT proteases. We observed that the D3 protease again potently benefited from the WT-evolved mutations, whereas the WT BoNT/E protease background showed no activity when hosting the D3-evolved mutations (Fig. 3b, bottom). These data reinforce that design-evolved genotypes demonstrate higher activity, soluble yield and kinetics on the new substrates after PACE than their WT-evolved counterparts, and the D3 background offers compatibility with a greater variety of mutations than WT BoNT/E protease.

sentences.en: The intermediate difficulty evolution on substrate 413 (P2 D→I) resulted in similar outcomes.
sentences.zh: 基板 413 上的中等难度演化（P2 D→I）导致了类似的结果。

sentences.en: Once again, redesign-evolved variants attained higher activity than those evolved from WT BoNT/E protease (Fig. 3b).
sentences.zh: 重新设计进化的变体再次获得了比 WT BoNT/E 蛋白酶进化的变体更高的活性（图 3b）。

sentences.en: D3-evolved genotypes achieved higher levels of circuit activation of up to 15-fold than the WT-evolved genotypes of up to 8.5-fold.
sentences.zh: D3 进化基因型的回路激活水平比 WT 进化基因型高出 15 倍，高达 8.5 倍。

sentences.en: The soluble expression of the design-evolved and D3 background proteases was consistently higher than those of the WT proteases.
sentences.zh: 设计进化和 D3 背景蛋白酶的可溶性表达始终高于 WT 蛋白酶。

sentences.en: We observed that the D3 protease again potently benefited from the WT-evolved mutations, whereas the WT BoNT/E protease background showed no activity when hosting the D3-evolved mutations (Fig. 3b, bottom).
sentences.zh: 我们观察到，D3 蛋白酶再次有效地受益于 WT 进化的突变，而 WT BoNT/E 蛋白酶背景在承载 D3 进化的突变时没有显示出活性（图 3b，底部）。

sentences.en: These data reinforce that design-evolved genotypes demonstrate higher activity, soluble yield and kinetics on the new substrates after PACE than their WT-evolved counterparts, and the D3 background offers compatibility with a greater variety of mutations than WT BoNT/E protease.
sentences.zh: 这些数据强化了设计进化的基因型在 PACE 后的新底物上表现出比 WT 进化的对应物更高的活性、可溶性产率和动力学，并且 D3 背景提供了比 WT BoNT/E 蛋白酶更多种突变的兼容性。

blocks.html_en: We observed that D3 lagoon phage titres during PACE recovered earlier than WT lagoons (Fig. 3b, top, and Supplementary Table 8), suggesting that D3 evolved to pass the selection before the WT enzyme. We investigated the circuit activation of consensus clones at the timepoints over which WT lagoon titres recover and D3 lagoon titres remain high. The WT-evolved consensus mutant at the earliest assayed timepoint, K225T, showed minimal circuit activation of only 1.47-fold above background. At the same timepoint, K225T also evolved in D3 lagoons alongside K225I, both reaching more than 10-fold circuit activation (Fig. 3b, bottom). These genotypes are each a single-base-pair mutation from their respective starting points, and WT-evolved consensus clones did not reach substantial circuit activation until genotypes with two to four DNA mutations arose (Fig. 3b, bottom). As genotypes with multiple mutations appear at later timepoints than single mutants, the analysis of intermediate activity suggests that redesign expanded functional sequences to include those closer to the starting point, allowing the redesigned protease to adapt to the 413 substrate in less time and with fewer mutations than the WT protease.

sentences.en: We observed that D3 lagoon phage titres during PACE recovered earlier than WT lagoons (Fig. 3b, top, and Supplementary Table 8), suggesting that D3 evolved to pass the selection before the WT enzyme.
sentences.zh: 我们观察到，PACE 期间 D3 泻湖噬菌体滴度比 WT 泻湖恢复得更早（图 3b，顶部和补充表 8），这表明 D3 进化到在 WT 酶之前通过选择。

sentences.en: We investigated the circuit activation of consensus clones at the timepoints over which WT lagoon titres recover and D3 lagoon titres remain high.
sentences.zh: 我们研究了 WT lagoon 滴度恢复且 D3 lagoon 滴度保持较高的时间点上共有克隆的回路激活。

sentences.en: The WT-evolved consensus mutant at the earliest assayed timepoint, K225T, showed minimal circuit activation of only 1.47-fold above background.
sentences.zh: WT 进化的共有突变体在最早测定的时间点 K225T 显示出最小的电路激活，仅比背景高 1.47 倍。

sentences.en: At the same timepoint, K225T also evolved in D3 lagoons alongside K225I, both reaching more than 10-fold circuit activation (Fig. 3b, bottom).
sentences.zh: 与此同时，K225T 也在 D3 泻湖中与 K225I 一起进化，两者都达到了 10 倍以上的电路激活（图 3b，底部）。

sentences.en: These genotypes are each a single-base-pair mutation from their respective starting points, and WT-evolved consensus clones did not reach substantial circuit activation until genotypes with two to four DNA mutations arose (Fig. 3b, bottom).
sentences.zh: 这些基因型各自的起始点都是单碱基对突变，WT 进化的共有克隆直到具有两到四个 DNA 突变的基因型出现才达到实质性的电路激活（图 3b，底部）。

sentences.en: As genotypes with multiple mutations appear at later timepoints than single mutants, the analysis of intermediate activity suggests that redesign expanded functional sequences to include those closer to the starting point, allowing the redesigned protease to adapt to the 413 substrate in less time and with fewer mutations than the WT protease.
sentences.zh: 由于具有多个突变的基因型比单个突变体出现在更晚的时间点，因此中间活性的分析表明，重新设计扩展的功能序列以包括那些更接近起始点的序列，从而使重新设计的蛋白酶能够在比 WT 蛋白酶更短的时间内适应 413 底物，并且具有更少的突变。

blocks.html_en: To understand how evolved variants gain function as they accumulate mutations over time in the intermediate difficulty evolution, we dissected the contributions of individual mutations from high-activity end point genotypes on expression, stability and cleavage activity. For the top-performing WT-evolved triple mutant E154G; G220V; K225I, reverting the E154G mutation yielded a poorly expressed and strongly destabilized enzyme, demonstrating that this mutation compensates for the active but destabilized G220V; K225I double mutant (Extended Data Fig. 5a). By contrast, for the top-performing D3-evolved double mutant variant S162I; S163F from this selection, activity was diminished, but not expression or stability, when either mutation was reverted (Extended Data Fig. 5b). Both of the mutations in the D3-evolved variant were therefore not compensatory. These observations demonstrate how the WT starting point must navigate a more limited path through the fitness landscape that can require compensatory stabilizing mutations to reach high activity, whereas the redesign has sufficient stability to access high activity without relying on the co-evolution of compensatory mutations.

sentences.en: To understand how evolved variants gain function as they accumulate mutations over time in the intermediate difficulty evolution, we dissected the contributions of individual mutations from high-activity end point genotypes on expression, stability and cleavage activity.
sentences.zh: 为了了解进化变体如何在中等难度进化中随着时间的推移积累突变而获得功能，我们剖析了高活性终点基因型的个体突变对表达、稳定性和裂解活性的贡献。

sentences.en: For the top-performing WT-evolved triple mutant E154G; G220V; K225I, reverting the E154G mutation yielded a poorly expressed and strongly destabilized enzyme, demonstrating that this mutation compensates for the active but destabilized G220V; K225I double mutant (Extended Data Fig. 5a).
sentences.zh: 对于表现最佳的 WT 进化三重突变体 E154G； G220V； K225I，恢复 E154G 突变，产生表达不良且严重不稳定的酶，表明该突变补偿了活性但不稳定的 G220V； K225I 双突变体（扩展数据图 5a）。

sentences.en: By contrast, for the top-performing D3-evolved double mutant variant S162I; S163F from this selection, activity was diminished, but not expression or stability, when either mutation was reverted (Extended Data Fig. 5b).
sentences.zh: 相比之下，对于表现最好的 D3 进化的双突变体变体 S162I；当任一突变恢复时，来自该选择的S163F的活性减弱，但表达或稳定性不变（扩展数据图5b）。

sentences.en: Both of the mutations in the D3-evolved variant were therefore not compensatory.
sentences.zh: 因此，D3 进化变体中的两种突变都不是补偿性的。

sentences.en: These observations demonstrate how the WT starting point must navigate a more limited path through the fitness landscape that can require compensatory stabilizing mutations to reach high activity, whereas the redesign has sufficient stability to access high activity without relying on the co-evolution of compensatory mutations.
sentences.zh: 这些观察结果表明，WT 起点必须如何在适应度景观中导航一条更有限的路径，这可能需要补偿性稳定突变才能达到高活性，而重新设计具有足够的稳定性来获得高活性，而不依赖于补偿性突变的共同进化。

blocks.html_en: Finally, we evolved both starting point proteases on the most challenging substrate 412 (P2 D→R; Fig. 3c). Out of the four parallel replicates conducted for both starting points, two evolutions starting with the WT protease failed to evolve any activity on the new substrate before phage washout. By contrast, all four parallel evolutions of the D3 protease successfully evolved solutions to the selection (Supplementary Table 8). Thus when faced with a difficult challenge, the ProteinMPNN redesign improved the success rate of the PACE experiment. The two evolutions initiated with the WT protease that succeeded produced a single convergent genotype, whereas the evolutions initiated with the D3 protease produced two genotypes. Once again, the WT-evolved genotype in this evolution, E(412)1, yielded lower protease cleavage circuit activation (10-fold activation over background) than the D3-evolved genotypes that achieved 20-fold and 16-fold activation.

sentences.en: Finally, we evolved both starting point proteases on the most challenging substrate 412 (P2 D→R; Fig. 3c).
sentences.zh: 最后，我们在最具挑战性的底物 412 上进化了两种起始蛋白酶（P2 D→R；图 3c）。

sentences.en: Out of the four parallel replicates conducted for both starting points, two evolutions starting with the WT protease failed to evolve any activity on the new substrate before phage washout.
sentences.zh: 在对两个起点进行的四次平行重复中，从 WT 蛋白酶开始的两次进化未能在噬菌体清洗之​​前在新底物上进化出任何活性。

sentences.en: By contrast, all four parallel evolutions of the D3 protease successfully evolved solutions to the selection (Supplementary Table 8).
sentences.zh: 相比之下，D3 蛋白酶的所有四个平行进化都成功进化出了选择的解决方案（补充表 8）。

sentences.en: Thus when faced with a difficult challenge, the ProteinMPNN redesign improved the success rate of the PACE experiment.
sentences.zh: 因此，当面临困难的挑战时，ProteinMPNN的重新设计提高了PACE实验的成功率。

sentences.en: The two evolutions initiated with the WT protease that succeeded produced a single convergent genotype, whereas the evolutions initiated with the D3 protease produced two genotypes.
sentences.zh: 由WT蛋白酶引发的两次进化成功产生了单一趋同基因型，而由D3蛋白酶引发的进化则产生了两种基因型。

sentences.en: Once again, the WT-evolved genotype in this evolution, E(412)1, yielded lower protease cleavage circuit activation (10-fold activation over background) than the D3-evolved genotypes that achieved 20-fold and 16-fold activation.
sentences.zh: 与实现 20 倍和 16 倍激活的 D3 进化基因型相比，这次进化中的 WT 进化基因型 E(412)1 再次产生了较低的蛋白酶裂解电路激活（比背景激活 10 倍）。

blocks.html_en: The K225 residue mutated to E in both of the D3-evolved genotypes, whereas the WT protease did not evolve this mutation. Indeed, we found that the K225E mutation conferred no activity when grafted into the WT protease background (Fig. 3c, bottom). These data suggested that only D3 is compatible with K225E because this mutation is destabilizing. Indeed, K225E reduced the Tm of the WT and D3 proteases by 4.3 °C and 6.5 °C, respectively, such that the WT protease with the K225E mutation had a Tm of only 45 °C, whereas D3 with K225E (D3(412)1 variant) had a Tm of 48 °C. Furthermore, the melting transition for the K225E–WT graft occurred over a wider temperature range, suggesting that partial unfolding occurs at even lower temperatures. Similar observations of lower Tm values and broader transitions were made for design-evolved mutations from the 415 and 413 evolutions that do not function in the WT background (Supplementary Fig. 4). These results reveal that the stabilized D3 protease was able to accommodate destabilizing mutations to enable high activity on the target, whereas the WT protease did not have sufficient stability to fold with these destabilizing mutations.

sentences.en: The K225 residue mutated to E in both of the D3-evolved genotypes, whereas the WT protease did not evolve this mutation.
sentences.zh: 在两种 D3 进化的基因型中，K225 残基突变为 E，而 WT 蛋白酶没有进化出这种突变。

sentences.en: Indeed, we found that the K225E mutation conferred no activity when grafted into the WT protease background (Fig. 3c, bottom).
sentences.zh: 事实上，我们发现当移植到 WT 蛋白酶背景中时，K225E 突变不赋予任何活性（图 3c，底部）。

sentences.en: These data suggested that only D3 is compatible with K225E because this mutation is destabilizing.
sentences.zh: 这些数据表明只有 D3 与 K225E 兼容，因为这种突变会不稳定。

sentences.en: Indeed, K225E reduced the Tm of the WT and D3 proteases by 4.3 °C and 6.5 °C, respectively, such that the WT protease with the K225E mutation had a Tm of only 45 °C, whereas D3 with K225E (D3(412)1 variant) had a Tm of 48 °C.
sentences.zh: 事实上，K225E 将 WT 和 D3 蛋白酶的 Tm 分别降低了 4.3 °C 和 6.5 °C，因此具有 K225E 突变的 WT 蛋白酶的 Tm 仅 45 °C，而具有 K225E（D3(412)1 变体）的 D3 的 Tm 为 48 °C。

sentences.en: Furthermore, the melting transition for the K225E–WT graft occurred over a wider temperature range, suggesting that partial unfolding occurs at even lower temperatures.
sentences.zh: 此外，K225E-WT 接枝物的熔化转变发生在更宽的温度范围内，这表明部分解折叠发生在更低的温度下。

sentences.en: Similar observations of lower Tm values and broader transitions were made for design-evolved mutations from the 415 and 413 evolutions that do not function in the WT background (Supplementary Fig. 4).
sentences.zh: 对于来自 415 和 413 进化的设计进化突变（在 WT 背景中不起作用），也进行了类似的观察，即较低的 Tm 值和更广泛的转变（补充图 4）。

sentences.en: These results reveal that the stabilized D3 protease was able to accommodate destabilizing mutations to enable high activity on the target, whereas the WT protease did not have sufficient stability to fold with these destabilizing mutations.
sentences.zh: 这些结果表明，稳定的 D3 蛋白酶能够适应不稳定突变，从而实现对靶标的高活性，而 WT 蛋白酶没有足够的稳定性来折叠这些不稳定突变。

blocks.html_en: We again compared consensus clone fitness at intermediate timepoints, and observed that although both the WT and the D3 lagoons evolved active, single-base-pair mutant clones at the earliest assayed timepoint, the D3-evolved clone supported 4.5-fold greater selection circuit activation than the WT-evolved clone. Furthermore, the intermediate time point D3 mutant was as active as alternative and higher-order mutants found at later timepoints. The intermediate timepoint WT clone was 2.4-fold less active than the best final timepoint clone, a triple mutant, demonstrating that D3 required less time and fewer mutations than the WT starting point to reach its maximal evolved activity (Fig. 3c, bottom). This result is consistent with the 413 substrate adaptation, where functional access to local mutants from the redesigned starting point increased adaptation rate.

sentences.en: We again compared consensus clone fitness at intermediate timepoints, and observed that although both the WT and the D3 lagoons evolved active, single-base-pair mutant clones at the earliest assayed timepoint, the D3-evolved clone supported 4.5-fold greater selection circuit activation than the WT-evolved clone.
sentences.zh: 我们再次比较了中间时间点的一致克隆适应性，并观察到尽管 WT 和 D3 泻湖在最早的检测时间点都进化出了活性的单碱基对突变克隆，但 D3 进化的克隆支持的选择电路激活比 WT 进化的克隆高 4.5 倍。

sentences.en: Furthermore, the intermediate time point D3 mutant was as active as alternative and higher-order mutants found at later timepoints.
sentences.zh: 此外，中间时间点 D3 突变体与稍后时间点发现的替代突变体和高阶突变体一样活跃。

sentences.en: The intermediate timepoint WT clone was 2.4-fold less active than the best final timepoint clone, a triple mutant, demonstrating that D3 required less time and fewer mutations than the WT starting point to reach its maximal evolved activity (Fig. 3c, bottom).
sentences.zh: 中间时间点WT克隆的活性比最佳最终时间点克隆（三重突变体）低2.4倍，这表明D3比WT起始点需要更少的时间和更少的突变来达到其最大进化活性（图3c，底部）。

sentences.en: This result is consistent with the 413 substrate adaptation, where functional access to local mutants from the redesigned starting point increased adaptation rate.
sentences.zh: 这个结果与 413 底物适应一致，其中从重新设计的起点对局部突变体的功能访问增加了适应率。

blocks.html_en: Collectively, our results from evolving a redesigned protease side-by-side with the corresponding WT protease to cleave three new substrates demonstrate that the enhanced stability of the D3 starting point protease enabled, across all evolutions, higher evolved function and the productive use of mutations that function poorly with the WT protease. When the redesign but not the WT starting point evolved high activity in local, rapidly sampled genotypes, the redesign adapted faster. Greater soluble expression, stability and faster kinetics thus account for the much more beneficial effect of the same mutations in the D3 protease background compared with the WT BoNT/E background.

sentences.en: Collectively, our results from evolving a redesigned protease side-by-side with the corresponding WT protease to cleave three new substrates demonstrate that the enhanced stability of the D3 starting point protease enabled, across all evolutions, higher evolved function and the productive use of mutations that function poorly with the WT protease.
sentences.zh: 总的来说，我们将重新设计的蛋白酶与相应的 WT 蛋白酶并排进化来裂解三种新底物，结果表明，D3 起始点蛋白酶的稳定性增强，在所有进化中都能够实现更高的进化功能，并有效利用与 WT 蛋白酶功能不佳的突变。

sentences.en: When the redesign but not the WT starting point evolved high activity in local, rapidly sampled genotypes, the redesign adapted faster.
sentences.zh: 当重新设计而非 WT 起点在局部、快速采样的基因型中进化出高活性时，重新设计适应得更快。

sentences.en: Greater soluble expression, stability and faster kinetics thus account for the much more beneficial effect of the same mutations in the D3 protease background compared with the WT BoNT/E background.
sentences.zh: 因此，与 WT BoNT/E 背景相比，D3 蛋白酶背景中的相同突变具有更大的可溶性表达、稳定性和更快的动力学效果。

blocks.html_en: Progression of genotype frequencies

sentences.en: Progression of genotype frequencies
sentences.zh: 基因型频率的进展

blocks.html_en: We performed high-throughput, synthetic long-read sequencing with LoopSeq48 to deeply quantify full-length genotype distributions of the D3-evolved and WT-evolved final timepoint lagoons for the 413 substrate. The most abundant WT-evolved mutations often propagated in the D3-evolved lagoons (Fig. 4a, top). By contrast, D3-evolved mutations infrequently propagated in WT-evolved pools (Fig. 4b, top). The relative scarcity of the most fit D3-evolved mutations among the evolved WT genotypes in these lagoons is consistent with our finding that the WT protease background does not support these mutations. These observations reinforce our finding that the redesigned protease starting point can access both the functional mutation space of the WT starting point as well as unique genotypes during evolution.

sentences.en: We performed high-throughput, synthetic long-read sequencing with LoopSeq48 to deeply quantify full-length genotype distributions of the D3-evolved and WT-evolved final timepoint lagoons for the 413 substrate.
sentences.zh: 我们使用 LoopSeq48 进行高通量、合成长读长测序，以深入量化 413 底物的 D3 进化和 WT 进化最终时间点泻湖的全长基因型分布。

sentences.en: The most abundant WT-evolved mutations often propagated in the D3-evolved lagoons (Fig. 4a, top).
sentences.zh: 最丰富的 WT 进化突变通常在 D3 进化泻湖中传播（图 4a，顶部）。

sentences.en: By contrast, D3-evolved mutations infrequently propagated in WT-evolved pools (Fig. 4b, top).
sentences.zh: 相比之下，D3 进化的突变很少在 WT 进化池中传播（图 4b，顶部）。

sentences.en: The relative scarcity of the most fit D3-evolved mutations among the evolved WT genotypes in these lagoons is consistent with our finding that the WT protease background does not support these mutations.
sentences.zh: 这些泻湖中进化的 WT 基因型中最适合的 D3 进化突变的相对稀缺性与我们的发现一致，即 WT 蛋白酶背景不支持这些突变。

sentences.en: These observations reinforce our finding that the redesigned protease starting point can access both the functional mutation space of the WT starting point as well as unique genotypes during evolution.
sentences.zh: 这些观察结果强化了我们的发现，即重新设计的蛋白酶起点可以访问 WT 起点的功能突变空间以及进化过程中的独特基因型。

sentences.en: Fig. 4: Genotype distributions and starting point-specific mutation sets over the course of the intermediate difficulty evolution.
sentences.zh: 图 4：中等难度进化过程中的基因型分布和起始点特异性突变集。

blocks.html_en: a,b, High-throughput long-read sequencing quantification of WT-evolved (a) and D3-evolved (b) populations. Distributions of genotypes detected by LoopSeq for the final timepoint for replicate 1 (top left), replicate 2 (top centre) and replicate 3 (top right). Mutation set frequencies are shown by timepoint for two of the replicates: replicates 1 and 3 for WT-evolved and replicates 2 and 3 for the D3-evolved populations (middle and bottom). Mutation sets with more than 100 assembled long reads mapped are shown. Mutation sets are coloured by whether they were unique to either starting point (green for D3, and black for WT) or detected at least once in clones evolved from both starting points (grey) at the final timepoint. c, Fraction of reads by timepoint mapping to plotted genotypes and a mutation set observed at least once in the other starting point at the final timepoint (grey genotypes in panels a,b). d, Average Hamming distance to the starting point of reads mapping to plotted genotypes by timepoint. e, Shannon entropy of the plotted genotype distribution observed by timepoint. The values and error bars represent the mean ± s.d. of all sample reads mapping to plotted genotypes (d).

sentences.en: a,b, High-throughput long-read sequencing quantification of WT-evolved (a) and D3-evolved (b) populations.
sentences.zh: a,b，WT 进化 (a) 和 D3 进化 (b) 群体的高通量长读长测序定量。

sentences.en: Distributions of genotypes detected by LoopSeq for the final timepoint for replicate 1 (top left), replicate 2 (top centre) and replicate 3 (top right).
sentences.zh: LoopSeq 在重复 1（左上）、重复 2（中上）和重复 3（右上）的最终时间点检测到的基因型分布。

sentences.en: Mutation set frequencies are shown by timepoint for two of the replicates: replicates 1 and 3 for WT-evolved and replicates 2 and 3 for the D3-evolved populations (middle and bottom).
sentences.zh: 突变集频率按两个重复的时间点显示：WT 进化的重复 1 和 3，D3 进化群体的重复 2 和 3（中间和底部）。

sentences.en: Mutation sets with more than 100 assembled long reads mapped are shown.
sentences.zh: 显示了映射了超过 100 个组装长读段的突变集。

sentences.en: Mutation sets are coloured by whether they were unique to either starting point (green for D3, and black for WT) or detected at least once in clones evolved from both starting points (grey) at the final timepoint.
sentences.zh: 突变集的颜色取决于它们是否是任一起始点所独有的（D3 为绿色，WT 为黑色），或者在最终时间点从两个起始点（灰色）进化而来的克隆中至少检测到一次。

sentences.en: c, Fraction of reads by timepoint mapping to plotted genotypes and a mutation set observed at least once in the other starting point at the final timepoint (grey genotypes in panels a,b).
sentences.zh: c，按时间点映射到绘制的基因型的读数分数以及在最终时间点的另一个起始点至少观察到一次的突变集（图a、b中的灰色基因型）。

sentences.en: d, Average Hamming distance to the starting point of reads mapping to plotted genotypes by timepoint.
sentences.zh: d，到按时间点绘制的基因型的读数起始点的平均汉明距离。

sentences.en: e, Shannon entropy of the plotted genotype distribution observed by timepoint.
sentences.zh: e，按时间点观察到的绘制的基因型分布的香农熵。

sentences.en: The values and error bars represent the mean ± s.d.
sentences.zh: 值和误差线代表平均值±s.d。

sentences.en: of all sample reads mapping to plotted genotypes (d).
sentences.zh: 所有样本读数映射到绘制的基因型 (d)。

blocks.html_en: To analyse how redesign-enabled genotypes arise over time and over increasing selection stringency, we obtained LoopSeq data and quantified genotype distributions across multiple timepoints for two replicates of each starting point for the intermediate evolution. For both redesign-initiated lagoons, WT-compatible genotypes dominated the lagoon at early timepoints but dropped in frequency as redesign-specific genotypes grew in abundance, with replicate 1 converging almost entirely on redesign-specific genotypes (Fig. 4c). Although multi-mutant genotype frequency rose over time, single mutants persisted to the end of the experiment (Fig. 4b). In WT-initiated lagoons, single mutants were mostly replaced by multi-mutant genotypes such as the two-base substitution K225L in replicate 1 and a quadruple mutant in replicate 3 (Fig. 4a). As a result, the WT starting point tended to evolve more mutationally distant lagoons than the D3 starting point (Fig. 4d). This sequence divergence in some cases occurred with a rise in lagoon diversity (Fig. 4e). Together, genotype dynamics suggest that the redesigned starting point supports local genotypes to survive selection, whereas the WT starting point requires more distant genotypes to pass selection.

sentences.en: To analyse how redesign-enabled genotypes arise over time and over increasing selection stringency, we obtained LoopSeq data and quantified genotype distributions across multiple timepoints for two replicates of each starting point for the intermediate evolution.
sentences.zh: 为了分析重新设计基因型如何随着时间的推移和选择严格性的增加而出现，我们获得了 LoopSeq 数据，并在中间进化的每个起点的两次重复的多个时间点上量化了基因型分布。

sentences.en: For both redesign-initiated lagoons, WT-compatible genotypes dominated the lagoon at early timepoints but dropped in frequency as redesign-specific genotypes grew in abundance, with replicate 1 converging almost entirely on redesign-specific genotypes (Fig. 4c).
sentences.zh: 对于两个重新设计启动的泻湖，WT兼容的基因型在早期时间点主导了泻湖，但随着重新设计特异性基因型的大量增长，频率下降，复制1几乎完全收敛于重新设计特异性基因型（图4c）。

sentences.en: Although multi-mutant genotype frequency rose over time, single mutants persisted to the end of the experiment (Fig. 4b).
sentences.zh: 尽管多突变体基因型频率随着时间的推移而上升，但单突变体一直持续到实验结束（图4b）。

sentences.en: In WT-initiated lagoons, single mutants were mostly replaced by multi-mutant genotypes such as the two-base substitution K225L in replicate 1 and a quadruple mutant in replicate 3 (Fig. 4a).
sentences.zh: 在WT启动的泻湖中，单突变体大部分被多突变体基因型所取代，例如重复1中的两碱基取代K225L和重复3中的四重突变体（图4a）。

sentences.en: As a result, the WT starting point tended to evolve more mutationally distant lagoons than the D3 starting point (Fig. 4d).
sentences.zh: 因此，WT 起点往往比 D3 起点进化出更远的突变泻湖（图 4d）。

sentences.en: This sequence divergence in some cases occurred with a rise in lagoon diversity (Fig. 4e).
sentences.zh: 在某些情况下，这种序列分歧是随着泻湖多样性的增加而发生的（图4e）。

sentences.en: Together, genotype dynamics suggest that the redesigned starting point supports local genotypes to survive selection, whereas the WT starting point requires more distant genotypes to pass selection.
sentences.zh: 总之，基因型动力学表明，重新设计的起点支持局部基因型在选择中生存，而 WT 起点则需要更远的基因型才能通过选择。

blocks.html_en: Redesign expands the fitness landscape

sentences.en: Redesign expands the fitness landscape
sentences.zh: 重新设计扩大了健身领域
