blocks.html_en: Following our observation that a stabilized, catalytically enhanced ProteinMPNN redesign evolves distinct, higher-activity genotypes, we investigated how alternative BoNT/E redesigns evolve in PACE and compared how each redesign modifies the fitness landscape. Because stability redesign often trades off with function, we asked whether a highly stabilized but kinetically impaired redesigned enzyme could outperform the WT starting point during evolution. We selected ProteinMPNN redesign D4 as the starting point for this question. D4 showed high expression and low activity in the initial redesign panel (Fig. 1c). Accordingly, D4 cleaves its substrate 20-fold more slowly than WT BoNT/E but has a higher Tm than both the WT and D3 (Supplementary Fig. 5). To determine whether PROSS redesign can also enhance evolution, we selected the top-performing redesign (PROSS1) with improved stability and catalysis as the final alternative starting point. We performed parallel PACE campaigns initiated with the D4 and PROSS1 starting points on the same panel of substrates that BoNT/E and D3 were previously evolved to cleave, and each evolution followed the same flow rate schedule, duration and number of replicates as before (Fig. 5a–c). Between the four starting points evolved on three substrates with three or four replicates each, we performed a total of 44 independent evolutions on eVOLVER and Min-eVOLVER autonomous culture devices.

sentences.en: Following our observation that a stabilized, catalytically enhanced ProteinMPNN redesign evolves distinct, higher-activity genotypes, we investigated how alternative BoNT/E redesigns evolve in PACE and compared how each redesign modifies the fitness landscape.
sentences.zh: 根据我们的观察，稳定的、催化增强的 ProteinMPNN 重新设计会进化出独特的、更高活性的基因型，我们研究了替代 BoNT/E 重新设计如何在 PACE 中进化，并比较了每次重新设计如何改变适应度。

sentences.en: Because stability redesign often trades off with function, we asked whether a highly stabilized but kinetically impaired redesigned enzyme could outperform the WT starting point during evolution.
sentences.zh: 由于稳定性重新设计通常会与功能进行权衡，因此我们询问高度稳定但动力学受损的重新设计酶是否可以在进化过程中超越 WT 起点。

sentences.en: We selected ProteinMPNN redesign D4 as the starting point for this question.
sentences.zh: 我们选择 ProteinMPNN 重新设计 D4 作为这个问题的起点。

sentences.en: D4 showed high expression and low activity in the initial redesign panel (Fig. 1c).
sentences.zh: D4 在最初的重新设计面板中表现出高表达和低活性（图 1c）。

sentences.en: Accordingly, D4 cleaves its substrate 20-fold more slowly than WT BoNT/E but has a higher Tm than both the WT and D3 (Supplementary Fig. 5).
sentences.zh: 因此，D4 裂解其底物的速度比 WT BoNT/E 慢 20 倍，但 Tm 高于 WT 和 D3（补充图 5）。

sentences.en: To determine whether PROSS redesign can also enhance evolution, we selected the top-performing redesign (PROSS1) with improved stability and catalysis as the final alternative starting point.
sentences.zh: 为了确定 PROSS 重新设计是否也可以增强进化，我们选择了具有改进的稳定性和催化作用的最佳性能重新设计（PROSS1）作为最终的替代起点。

sentences.en: We performed parallel PACE campaigns initiated with the D4 and PROSS1 starting points on the same panel of substrates that BoNT/E and D3 were previously evolved to cleave, and each evolution followed the same flow rate schedule, duration and number of replicates as before (Fig. 5a–c).
sentences.zh: 我们在 BoNT/E 和 D3 先前进化为裂解的同一底物板上以 D4 和 PROSS1 起点启动并行 PACE 活动，每次进化都遵循与以前相同的流速计划、持续时间和重复次数（图 5a-c）。

sentences.en: Between the four starting points evolved on three substrates with three or four replicates each, we performed a total of 44 independent evolutions on eVOLVER and Min-eVOLVER autonomous culture devices.
sentences.zh: 在三个基质上进化的四个起点之间，每个起点具有三到四个重复，我们在 eVOLVER 和 Min-eVOLVER 自主培养装置上总共进行了 44 次独立进化。

sentences.en: Fig. 5: Evolution of alternative redesigns and comprehensive assessment of evolved genotype function in all starting point backgrounds.
sentences.zh: 图 5：替代重新设计的演变以及所有起点背景中进化基因型功能的综合评估。

blocks.html_en: a–c, Evolutions with D4 and PROSS1 starting points on substrates 415 (a; lowest difficulty), 413 (b; intermediate difficulty) and 412 (c; highest difficulty), as in Fig. 3. Top, comparison of SNAP25 and target substrate sequences; colours indicate amino acid property as in Fig. 3. Middle, ePACE phage titres in three or four replicate lagoons initiated with each of the D4 and PROSS1 starting proteases; the same PACE flow rate schedule and duration were used as in Fig. 3. Bottom, activity of evolved consensus genotypes in all four starting point backgrounds measured by luciferase-reported circuit activation on the cognate evolution substrate. Variants are organized by the protease background in which each mutation set was assessed, and by the starting point of each evolved mutation set in PACE. Mutations are noted by residue mutated from in the origin starting point, which varies when the mutated position was changed by redesign (see Extended Data Fig. 6a). Signal values were normalized to an inactive dBoNT/F control, and values and error bars represent mean ± s.d. of three replicates. d, Consensus genotype activity organized in ESM-C embedding principal component (PC) space for each background. Embedding PCs were generated for the BoNTE sequences with each labelled mutation set, and points were scaled according to activity (top left), then replotted with point scaling by activity of the same mutation sets in the D3, D4 and PROSS1 redesign backgrounds (top right, bottom left and bottom right, respectively). Points with a cross hatch pattern were not assayed.

sentences.en: a–c, Evolutions with D4 and PROSS1 starting points on substrates 415 (a; lowest difficulty), 413 (b; intermediate difficulty) and 412 (c; highest difficulty), as in Fig. 3.
sentences.zh: a-c，在基板 415（a；最低难度）、413（b；中等难度）和 412（c；最高难度）上以 D4 和 PROSS1 为起点的进化，如图 3 所示。

sentences.en: Top, comparison of SNAP25 and target substrate sequences; colours indicate amino acid property as in Fig. 3.
sentences.zh: 顶部，SNAP25 和靶底物序列的比较；颜色表示氨基酸特性，如图3所示。

sentences.en: Middle, ePACE phage titres in three or four replicate lagoons initiated with each of the D4 and PROSS1 starting proteases; the same PACE flow rate schedule and duration were used as in Fig. 3.
sentences.zh: 中间，用 D4 和 PROSS1 起始蛋白酶启动的三个或四个重复泻湖中的 ePACE 噬菌体滴度；使用与图 3 相同的 PACE 流速表和持续时间。

sentences.en: Bottom, activity of evolved consensus genotypes in all four starting point backgrounds measured by luciferase-reported circuit activation on the cognate evolution substrate.
sentences.zh: 底部，通过同源进化基质上荧光素酶报告的电路激活来测量所有四个起点背景中进化共有基因型的活性。

sentences.en: Variants are organized by the protease background in which each mutation set was assessed, and by the starting point of each evolved mutation set in PACE.
sentences.zh: 变体按评估每个突变集的蛋白酶背景以及 PACE 中每个进化突变集的起点进行组织。

sentences.en: Mutations are noted by residue mutated from in the origin starting point, which varies when the mutated position was changed by redesign (see Extended Data Fig. 6a).
sentences.zh: 突变是通过从起始点突变的残基来记录的，当突变位置通过重新设计改变时，残基会发生变化（参见扩展数据图6a）。

sentences.en: Signal values were normalized to an inactive dBoNT/F control, and values and error bars represent mean ± s.d.
sentences.zh: 信号值标准化为非活动 dBoNT/F 控制，值和误差线代表平均值±s.d。

sentences.en: of three replicates.
sentences.zh: 三个重复。

sentences.en: d, Consensus genotype activity organized in ESM-C embedding principal component (PC) space for each background.
sentences.zh: d，在 ESM-C 嵌入每个背景的主成分 (PC) 空间中组织的共识基因型活动。

sentences.en: Embedding PCs were generated for the BoNTE sequences with each labelled mutation set, and points were scaled according to activity (top left), then replotted with point scaling by activity of the same mutation sets in the D3, D4 and PROSS1 redesign backgrounds (top right, bottom left and bottom right, respectively).
sentences.zh: 为带有每个标记突变集的 BoNTE 序列生成嵌入 PC，并根据活动对点进行缩放（左上），然后根据 D3、D4 和 PROSS1 重新设计背景中相同突变集的活动进行点缩放重新绘制（分别为右上、左下和右下）。

sentences.en: Points with a cross hatch pattern were not assayed.
sentences.zh: 没有分析具有交叉影线图案的点。

blocks.html_en: The D4-evolved and PROSS1-evolved populations passed selection on all three substrates. Sequencing of clones from final timepoint samples revealed consensus genotypes distinct from those evolved from the WT or D3 starting points (Fig. 3a–c and Extended Data Fig. 6a,b). We asked how the D4-evolved and PROSS1-evolved variants compare in activity with those evolved from the WT and D3 starting points. Furthermore, we wondered how the alternative starting points function with the genotypes evolved from all other starting points. To answer these questions, we performed a comprehensive assessment of genotype activity across various genetic backgrounds, in which we assayed the circuit activation of consensus genotypes evolved from each starting point in all four protease backgrounds after evolution on all three substrates (Fig. 5a–c, bottom).

sentences.en: The D4-evolved and PROSS1-evolved populations passed selection on all three substrates.
sentences.zh: D4 进化和 PROSS1 进化群体在所有三种底物上都通过了选择。

sentences.en: Sequencing of clones from final timepoint samples revealed consensus genotypes distinct from those evolved from the WT or D3 starting points (Fig. 3a–c and Extended Data Fig. 6a,b).
sentences.zh: 对最终时间点样本的克隆进行测序揭示了与 WT 或 D3 起始点进化而来的共有基因型不同的基因型（图 3a-c 和扩展数据图 6a、b）。

sentences.en: We asked how the D4-evolved and PROSS1-evolved variants compare in activity with those evolved from the WT and D3 starting points.
sentences.zh: 我们询问 D4 进化和 PROSS1 进化变体的活性与从 WT 和 D3 起点进化的变体相比如何。

sentences.en: Furthermore, we wondered how the alternative starting points function with the genotypes evolved from all other starting points.
sentences.zh: 此外，我们想知道替代起点如何与从所有其他起点进化而来的基因型一起发挥作用。

sentences.en: To answer these questions, we performed a comprehensive assessment of genotype activity across various genetic backgrounds, in which we assayed the circuit activation of consensus genotypes evolved from each starting point in all four protease backgrounds after evolution on all three substrates (Fig. 5a–c, bottom).
sentences.zh: 为了回答这些问题，我们对不同遗传背景的基因型活性进行了全面评估，其中我们分析了在所有三种底物上进化后，从所有四种蛋白酶背景中的每个起点进化而来的共有基因型的电路激活（图5a-c，底部）。

blocks.html_en: The three redesign-evolved variants were consistently more active than WT-evolved variants across all three substrates. D3-evolved and PROSS1-evolved proteases achieved similar function, whereas the D4-evolved proteases were as active or more active than those evolved from the other redesigns, despite the 20-fold lower starting catalytic rate for D4 (Fig. 5a–c, bottom, bars with matched background and origin starting point). This result is consistent with our earlier finding that D3 evolves higher fitness than WT. Alternative redesigns therefore enhance evolvability, even when redesign impairs catalysis.

sentences.en: The three redesign-evolved variants were consistently more active than WT-evolved variants across all three substrates.
sentences.zh: 在所有三种底物上，三个重新设计进化的变体始终比 WT 进化的变体更活跃。

sentences.en: D3-evolved and PROSS1-evolved proteases achieved similar function, whereas the D4-evolved proteases were as active or more active than those evolved from the other redesigns, despite the 20-fold lower starting catalytic rate for D4 (Fig. 5a–c, bottom, bars with matched background and origin starting point).
sentences.zh: D3 进化和 PROSS1 进化的蛋白酶实现了相似的功能，而 D4 进化的蛋白酶与其他重新设计的蛋白酶相比，其活性相同或更高，尽管 D4 的起始催化速率低 20 倍（图 5a-c，底部，具有匹配背景和起源起点的条形图）。

sentences.en: This result is consistent with our earlier finding that D3 evolves higher fitness than WT.
sentences.zh: 这一结果与我们之前的发现一致，即 D3 比 WT 进化出更高的适应度。

sentences.en: Alternative redesigns therefore enhance evolvability, even when redesign impairs catalysis.
sentences.zh: 因此，即使重新设计损害了催化作用，替代性重新设计也增强了可进化性。

blocks.html_en: Next, we evaluated evolved genotypes grafted into each alternative background. Each redesign was highly functional with most genotypes from the WT-evolved and other redesign-evolved variants. These graft variants tended to have similar or higher function than the redesign-evolved variants. However, some genotypes were highly active only in the background from which they evolved. Although D4 was highly active with most genotypes, its performance was variable, with some genotypes reaching the highest activity of any variant across backgrounds and others failing to function despite their activity in D3, PROSS1 or even BoNT/E backgrounds (Fig. 5a–c, bottom, and Extended Data Fig. 6c–e). The variable performance of evolved genotypes in the D4 background may result from a robustness to destabilizing mutations balanced with a sensitivity with catalytically slow mutations.

sentences.en: Next, we evaluated evolved genotypes grafted into each alternative background.
sentences.zh: 接下来，我们评估了嫁接到每个替代背景中的进化基因型。

sentences.en: Each redesign was highly functional with most genotypes from the WT-evolved and other redesign-evolved variants.
sentences.zh: 每次重新设计对于来自 WT 进化和其他重新设计进化变体的大多数基因型都具有很强的功能。

sentences.en: These graft variants tended to have similar or higher function than the redesign-evolved variants.
sentences.zh: 这些移植变体往往具有与重新设计进化的变体相似或更高的功能。

sentences.en: However, some genotypes were highly active only in the background from which they evolved.
sentences.zh: 然而，一些基因型仅在它们进化的背景下才高度活跃。

sentences.en: Although D4 was highly active with most genotypes, its performance was variable, with some genotypes reaching the highest activity of any variant across backgrounds and others failing to function despite their activity in D3, PROSS1 or even BoNT/E backgrounds (Fig. 5a–c, bottom, and Extended Data Fig. 6c–e).
sentences.zh: 尽管 D4 对大多数基因型都高度活跃，但其性能存在差异，一些基因型达到了跨背景的任何变体的最高活性，而其他基因型尽管在 D3、PROSS1 甚至 BoNT/E 背景中具有活性，但仍无法发挥作用（图 5a-c，底部和扩展数据图 6c-e）。

sentences.en: The variable performance of evolved genotypes in the D4 background may result from a robustness to destabilizing mutations balanced with a sensitivity with catalytically slow mutations.
sentences.zh: D4 背景中进化基因型的可变性能可能是由于对不稳定突变的鲁棒性与对催化慢突变的敏感性之间的平衡所致。

blocks.html_en: In contrast to the robustness of the redesigned proteases to graft genotypes, the WT enzyme supported systematically lower activity with redesign-grafted genotypes than with its own evolved genotypes. Most redesign-evolved mutations in the WT background were non-functional; the WT background yielded zero functional proteases when grafting redesign mutants for the lowest-difficulty 415 substrate, and was functional with only a minority of redesign-evolved mutants for the intermediate 413 and highest-difficulty 412 substrates (Extended Data Fig. 6c–e). We further found that activity for each genotype correlates poorly between each redesign and the WT background, supporting the idea that the redesigns have high activity with genotypes that rank poorly in the WT background (Extended Data Fig. 6f–h). Evolved genotype function across all four backgrounds demonstrates that alternative redesigns exceed the WT background function with distinct evolutionary solutions. The variable function of some genotypes between redesign backgrounds suggests that the balance between stability and activity in redesign, as well as the particular redesigned residues, influence the precise functional sequence space available.

sentences.en: In contrast to the robustness of the redesigned proteases to graft genotypes, the WT enzyme supported systematically lower activity with redesign-grafted genotypes than with its own evolved genotypes.
sentences.zh: 与重新设计的蛋白酶对移植基因型的稳健性相反，WT酶支持重新设计的移植基因型的活性系统地低于其自身进化的基因型的活性。

sentences.en: Most redesign-evolved mutations in the WT background were non-functional; the WT background yielded zero functional proteases when grafting redesign mutants for the lowest-difficulty 415 substrate, and was functional with only a minority of redesign-evolved mutants for the intermediate 413 and highest-difficulty 412 substrates (Extended Data Fig. 6c–e).
sentences.zh: WT 背景中大多数重新设计进化的突变都是非功能性的；当移植最低难度 415 底物的重新设计突变体时，WT 背景产生零功能蛋白酶，并且仅对中间 413 和最高难度 412 底物的少数重新设计进化突变体具有功能（扩展数据图 6c-e）。

sentences.en: We further found that activity for each genotype correlates poorly between each redesign and the WT background, supporting the idea that the redesigns have high activity with genotypes that rank poorly in the WT background (Extended Data Fig. 6f–h).
sentences.zh: 我们进一步发现，每种基因型的活性在每次重新设计和 WT 背景之间相关性较差，这支持了重新设计与在 WT 背景中排名较差的基因型具有高活性的观点（扩展数据图 6f-h）。

sentences.en: Evolved genotype function across all four backgrounds demonstrates that alternative redesigns exceed the WT background function with distinct evolutionary solutions.
sentences.zh: 所有四种背景的进化基因型功能表明，替代性重新设计通过不同的进化解决方案超越了 WT 背景功能。

sentences.en: The variable function of some genotypes between redesign backgrounds suggests that the balance between stability and activity in redesign, as well as the particular redesigned residues, influence the precise functional sequence space available.
sentences.zh: 重新设计背景之间一些基因型的可变功能表明，重新设计中稳定性和活性之间的平衡以及特定的重新设计残基影响可用的精确功能序列空间。

blocks.html_en: To visualize how redesign reshapes fitness across sequence space, we analysed the activity of evolved and graft genotypes in the embedded space of a protein language model49. The model ESM-C successfully clusters all evolved genotypes in the BoNT/E WT background by the substrate they were evolved to cleave (Fig. 5d, top left). The WT BoNT/E fitness landscape is sparse, with the highest function variants for each substrate distal to the starting point sequence. The sequences immediately surrounding the starting point are poorly active, and none of the single-base-pair mutant genotypes for any substrate functions in this WT background (Extended Data Fig. 6c–e). By contrast, each redesign raises the average fitness level across all three substrates. Redesign enables function with new distal genotypes, as well as with genotypes more proximal to the starting point, including single-base-pair mutations (Fig. 5d and Extended Data Fig. 6i). The robustness to local mutants supports our earlier interpretation of how redesign can accelerate adaptation. Collectively, this analysis points to a model in which redesign raises fitness and expands the fitness landscape across selections.

sentences.en: To visualize how redesign reshapes fitness across sequence space, we analysed the activity of evolved and graft genotypes in the embedded space of a protein language model49.
sentences.zh: 为了可视化重新设计如何重塑序列空间的适应性，我们分析了蛋白质语言模型嵌入空间中进化和移植基因型的活动49。

sentences.en: The model ESM-C successfully clusters all evolved genotypes in the BoNT/E WT background by the substrate they were evolved to cleave (Fig. 5d, top left).
sentences.zh: ESM-C 模型成功地将 BoNT/E WT 背景中所有进化的基因型通过它们进化裂解的底物聚集在一起（图 5d，左上）。

sentences.en: The WT BoNT/E fitness landscape is sparse, with the highest function variants for each substrate distal to the starting point sequence.
sentences.zh: WT BoNT/E 适应度景观稀疏，起始点序列远端的每个底物具有最高的功能变体。

sentences.en: The sequences immediately surrounding the starting point are poorly active, and none of the single-base-pair mutant genotypes for any substrate functions in this WT background (Extended Data Fig. 6c–e).
sentences.zh: 紧邻起始点的序列活性较差，并且任何底物的单碱基对突变体基因型在该 WT 背景中都不起作用（扩展数据图 6c-e）。

sentences.en: By contrast, each redesign raises the average fitness level across all three substrates.
sentences.zh: 相比之下，每次重新设计都会提高所有三种基材的平均适合度水平。

sentences.en: Redesign enables function with new distal genotypes, as well as with genotypes more proximal to the starting point, including single-base-pair mutations (Fig. 5d and Extended Data Fig. 6i).
sentences.zh: 重新设计能够实现新的远端基因型以及更接近起始点的基因型的功能，包括单碱基对突变（图5d和扩展数据图6i）。

sentences.en: The robustness to local mutants supports our earlier interpretation of how redesign can accelerate adaptation.
sentences.zh: 对局部突变体的稳健性支持了我们之前对重新设计如何加速适应的解释。

sentences.en: Collectively, this analysis points to a model in which redesign raises fitness and expands the fitness landscape across selections.
sentences.zh: 总的来说，该分析指出了一种模型，在该模型中，重新设计可以提高适应性并扩大各种选择的适应性景观。

blocks.html_en: We also asked whether redesign evolvability and evolved genotypes could be predicted from computational redesign metrics. Analyses of these scores suggest that they could contribute, albeit modestly, to predicting evolutionary performance and mutant function (Extended Data Fig. 7 and Supplementary Note 2).

sentences.en: We also asked whether redesign evolvability and evolved genotypes could be predicted from computational redesign metrics.
sentences.zh: 我们还询问是否可以通过计算重新设计指标来预测重新设计的进化性和进化的基因型。

sentences.en: Analyses of these scores suggest that they could contribute, albeit modestly, to predicting evolutionary performance and mutant function (Extended Data Fig. 7 and Supplementary Note 2).
sentences.zh: 对这些分数的分析表明，它们可以对预测进化表现和突变功能做出贡献，尽管贡献不大（扩展数据图 7 和补充说明 2）。

blocks.html_en: Evolving specific ataxin-2 proteases

sentences.en: Evolving specific ataxin-2 proteases
sentences.zh: 进化特定的ataxin-2蛋白酶

blocks.html_en: Having established enhanced evolution outcomes for sequence-redesigned proteases on substrates similar to the native substrate, we next applied this principle to reprogram a protease to a disease-relevant target unrelated to the native substrate while minimizing native substrate cleavage. We selected ataxin-2, a protein implicated in neurodegenerative disease that occurs in motor neurons, a cell type to which BoNT holotoxins natively self-deliver42,50. We chose to target ataxin-2 residues 1181–1201, which lie in the disordered IDR3 region that contributes to disease-associated condensation. Removal of this region of ataxin-2 is known to block the formation of aberrant aggregates51. We selected a target scissile bond in ataxin-2 that maintains a key protease–substrate residue contact and validated that this region is accessible to proteolysis (Fig. 6a, Extended Data Fig. 8a and Supplementary Note 3).

sentences.en: Having established enhanced evolution outcomes for sequence-redesigned proteases on substrates similar to the native substrate, we next applied this principle to reprogram a protease to a disease-relevant target unrelated to the native substrate while minimizing native substrate cleavage.
sentences.zh: 在与天然底物相似的底物上建立了序列重新设计的蛋白酶的增强进化结果后，我们接下来应用这一原理将蛋白酶重新编程为与天然底物无关的疾病相关靶标，同时最大限度地减少天然底物裂解。

sentences.en: We selected ataxin-2, a protein implicated in neurodegenerative disease that occurs in motor neurons, a cell type to which BoNT holotoxins natively self-deliver42,50.
sentences.zh: 我们选择了 ataxin-2，一种与运动神经元中发生的神经退行性疾病有关的蛋白质，BoNT 全毒素天然地自我传递到运动神经元中的一种细胞类型42,50。

sentences.en: We chose to target ataxin-2 residues 1181–1201, which lie in the disordered IDR3 region that contributes to disease-associated condensation.
sentences.zh: 我们选择靶向 ataxin-2 残基 1181-1201，该残基位于无序的 IDR3 区域，有助于与疾病相关的凝结。

sentences.en: Removal of this region of ataxin-2 is known to block the formation of aberrant aggregates51.
sentences.zh: 已知去除该区域的 ataxin-2 可以阻止异常聚集体的形成51。

sentences.en: We selected a target scissile bond in ataxin-2 that maintains a key protease–substrate residue contact and validated that this region is accessible to proteolysis (Fig. 6a, Extended Data Fig. 8a and Supplementary Note 3).
sentences.zh: 我们在ataxin-2中选择了一个目标断裂键，该键保持了关键的蛋白酶-底物残基接触，并验证了该区域易于蛋白水解（图6a，扩展数据图8a和补充说明3）。

sentences.en: Fig. 6: Reprogramming sequence-redesigned versus WT proteases to specifically cleave a therapeutic, non-native target over the native target.
sentences.zh: 图 6：重新编程序列与 WT 蛋白酶相比，重新设计的序列可特异性切割治疗性非天然靶标而不是天然靶标。

blocks.html_en: a, Comparison of native, stepping-stone and final target substrate sequences. The white, grey and green arrowheads indicate cleavage sites of WT BoNT/E, E(428)4 and D3(428)2, respectively. SS1, stepping-stone 1. b, Final consensus clones arising from each starting point. c, Ataxin-2-targeting protease in vitro cleavage rates of ataxin-2 FRET substrate at 20 µM. d, Ataxin-2-targeting protease in vitro cleavage rates of SNAP25 FRET substrate at 20 µM. e, Specificity of starting and evolved proteases, defined as cleavage rate on ataxin-2 over cleavage rate on SNAP25. f, Change in specificity from evolution, defined as evolved protease specificity divided by starting protease specificity. The < and > symbols indicate a measurement bounded by assay detection limit (e,f). g, Gel shift assay for on-target and off-target cleavage. Substrates at 15 µM were incubated with 3.6 µM protease for 20 h. L, ladder. h, Co-transfection assay for expression of evolved proteases and ataxin-2 cleavage product formation in HEK293T cells. Protease and substrate plasmids were co-transfected at a mass ratio of 1:1 for protease expression detection and a ratio of 1:10 for cleavage detection. The band intensity reflects protease abundance (top) or cleavage product abundance (bottom) or GADPH loading control. i, Apparent protease activity of evolved and evolution mutation-grafted variants measured by luciferase signal in host E. coli normalized to inactive dBoNT/F control. The values and error bars represent mean ± s.d. of three replicates (c,d,i).

sentences.en: a, Comparison of native, stepping-stone and final target substrate sequences.
sentences.zh: a，天然、垫脚石和最终目标底物序列的比较。

sentences.en: The white, grey and green arrowheads indicate cleavage sites of WT BoNT/E, E(428)4 and D3(428)2, respectively.
sentences.zh: 白色、灰色和绿色箭头分别表示 WT BoNT/E、E(428)4 和 D3(428)2 的切割位点。

sentences.en: SS1, stepping-stone 1.
sentences.zh: SS1，踏脚石 1。

sentences.en: b, Final consensus clones arising from each starting point.
sentences.zh: b，从每个起点产生的最终一致克隆。

sentences.en: c, Ataxin-2-targeting protease in vitro cleavage rates of ataxin-2 FRET substrate at 20 µM.
sentences.zh: c，Ataxin-2 靶向蛋白酶在 20 µM 下对 ataxin-2 FRET 底物的体外裂解率。

sentences.en: d, Ataxin-2-targeting protease in vitro cleavage rates of SNAP25 FRET substrate at 20 µM.
sentences.zh: d，Ataxin-2 靶向蛋白酶对 20 µM SNAP25 FRET 底物的体外裂解率。

sentences.en: e, Specificity of starting and evolved proteases, defined as cleavage rate on ataxin-2 over cleavage rate on SNAP25.
sentences.zh: e，起始和进化蛋白酶的特异性，定义为ataxin-2上的切割率与SNAP25上的切割率之比。

sentences.en: f, Change in specificity from evolution, defined as evolved protease specificity divided by starting protease specificity.
sentences.zh: f，进化引起的特异性变化，定义为进化的蛋白酶特异性除以起始蛋白酶特异性。

sentences.en: The < and > symbols indicate a measurement bounded by assay detection limit (e,f).
sentences.zh: < 和 > 符号表示受测定检测限 (e,f) 限制的测量结果。

sentences.en: g, Gel shift assay for on-target and off-target cleavage.
sentences.zh: g，用于靶标和脱靶裂解的凝胶位移测定。

sentences.en: Substrates at 15 µM were incubated with 3.6 µM protease for 20 h.
sentences.zh: 15 µM 底物与 3.6 µM 蛋白酶一起孵育 20 小时。

sentences.en: L, ladder.
sentences.zh: L，梯子。

sentences.en: h, Co-transfection assay for expression of evolved proteases and ataxin-2 cleavage product formation in HEK293T cells.
sentences.zh: h，HEK293T细胞中进化蛋白酶的表达和ataxin-2裂解产物形成的共转染测定。

sentences.en: Protease and substrate plasmids were co-transfected at a mass ratio of 1:1 for protease expression detection and a ratio of 1:10 for cleavage detection.
sentences.zh: 蛋白酶和底物质粒以1:1的质量比共转用于蛋白酶表达检测，以1:10的质量比共转用于裂解检测。

sentences.en: The band intensity reflects protease abundance (top) or cleavage product abundance (bottom) or GADPH loading control.
sentences.zh: 带强度反映了蛋白酶丰度（顶部）或裂解产物丰度（底部）或 GADPH 上样控制。

sentences.en: i, Apparent protease activity of evolved and evolution mutation-grafted variants measured by luciferase signal in host E.
sentences.zh: i，通过宿主大肠杆菌中的荧光素酶信号测量的进化和进化突变嫁接变体的表观蛋白酶活性。

sentences.en: coli normalized to inactive dBoNT/F control.
sentences.zh: 大肠杆菌归一化为非活性 dBoNT/F 对照。

sentences.en: The values and error bars represent mean ± s.d.
sentences.zh: 值和误差线代表平均值±s.d。

sentences.en: of three replicates (c,d,i).
sentences.zh: 三个重复（c，d，i）。

blocks.html_en: We performed parallel evolution campaigns initiated with redesigned BoNT/E variants D2 and D3, as well as with WT BoNT/E protease. The selections from each starting point were identical in all dilution factors, replicates and host selection stringencies, with two to four replicate selections per starting point at each stage (Extended Data Fig. 8d, Supplementary Fig. 6 and Supplementary Note 4). The 96-well plate format of PANCE and automated continuous culture in ePACE facilitated parallelization.

sentences.en: We performed parallel evolution campaigns initiated with redesigned BoNT/E variants D2 and D3, as well as with WT BoNT/E protease.
sentences.zh: 我们用重新设计的 BoNT/E 变体 D2 和 D3 以及 WT BoNT/E 蛋白酶启动了并行进化活动。

sentences.en: The selections from each starting point were identical in all dilution factors, replicates and host selection stringencies, with two to four replicate selections per starting point at each stage (Extended Data Fig. 8d, Supplementary Fig. 6 and Supplementary Note 4).
sentences.zh: 每个起始点的选择在所有稀释因子、重复和宿主选择严格性方面都是相同的，每个阶段每个起始点有两到四个重复选择（扩展数据图8d，补充图6和补充说明4）。

sentences.en: The 96-well plate format of PANCE and automated continuous culture in ePACE facilitated parallelization.
sentences.zh: PANCE 的 96 孔板形式和 ePACE 中的自动化连续培养促进了并行化。

blocks.html_en: Nanopore long-read sequencing of surviving phage clones identified functional consensus genotypes that differed between the redesigned and WT starting points, but were conserved within the lagoons of each starting point (Fig. 6b, Extended Data Fig. 9 and Supplementary Notes 5 and 6). Overall, evolution of sequence-designed proteases generated sequences highly divergent from the original enzyme found in nature: the top redesign-evolved protease has 46 mutations from ProteinMPNN and another 18 mutations from the full PANCE–PACE campaign, totalling 16% sequence difference from the BoNT/E protease. In comparison, the best WT-evolved protease evolved 10 mutations and is only 2.4% different from the natural enzyme.

sentences.en: Nanopore long-read sequencing of surviving phage clones identified functional consensus genotypes that differed between the redesigned and WT starting points, but were conserved within the lagoons of each starting point (Fig. 6b, Extended Data Fig. 9 and Supplementary Notes 5 and 6).
sentences.zh: 对幸存噬菌体克隆进行纳米孔长读长测序发现，功能共有基因型在重新设计的起始点和WT起始点之间有所不同，但在每个起始点的泻湖内都是保守的（图6b，扩展数据图9和补充说明5和6）。

sentences.en: Overall, evolution of sequence-designed proteases generated sequences highly divergent from the original enzyme found in nature: the top redesign-evolved protease has 46 mutations from ProteinMPNN and another 18 mutations from the full PANCE–PACE campaign, totalling 16% sequence difference from the BoNT/E protease.
sentences.zh: 总体而言，序列设计的蛋白酶的进化产生了与自然界中发现的原始酶高度不同的序列：顶部重新设计进化的蛋白酶具有来自 ProteinMPNN 的 46 个突变，以及来自完整 PANCE-PACE 活动的另外 18 个突变，与 BoNT/E 蛋白酶的序列差异总计 16%。

sentences.en: In comparison, the best WT-evolved protease evolved 10 mutations and is only 2.4% different from the natural enzyme.
sentences.zh: 相比之下，最好的 WT 进化蛋白酶进化了 10 个突变，与天然酶仅存在 2.4% 的差异。

blocks.html_en: How redesign enhances ataxin-2 cleavage

sentences.en: How redesign enhances ataxin-2 cleavage
sentences.zh: 重新设计如何增强ataxin-2 裂解

blocks.html_en: To understand whether evolving redesigned BoNT/E protease enabled improved the properties and applicability of proteases reprogrammed for ataxin-2 compared with starting with WT BoNT/E protease, we purified the best proteases from the redesigned and WT starting points and compared their kinetics, specificity and stability. Measuring on-target cleavage of ataxin-2 with sub-stoichiometric protease concentrations, we observed faster cleavage rates for both of the top two D3-evolved variants than the top two WT-evolved variants, in which D3(428)1 and D3(428)2 were 1.4-fold and 1.7-fold faster, respectively, than the best WT-evolved protease E(428)4 (Fig. 6c). When comparing off-target cleavage of SNAP25, WT-evolved proteases demonstrated detected cleavage rates that were 17,000-fold and 21,000-fold lower than the BoNT/E starting point, demonstrating the success of the dual selection circuit to enrich variants with diminished activity on the negative selection substrate (Fig. 6d). The D3-evolved ataxin-2 proteases showed no detected SNAP25 cleavage when assayed at the same protease concentration (Extended Data Fig. 10b).

sentences.en: To understand whether evolving redesigned BoNT/E protease enabled improved the properties and applicability of proteases reprogrammed for ataxin-2 compared with starting with WT BoNT/E protease, we purified the best proteases from the redesigned and WT starting points and compared their kinetics, specificity and stability.
sentences.zh: 为了了解与使用 WT BoNT/E 蛋白酶相比，不断进化的重新设计的 BoNT/E 蛋白酶是否能够改善针对 ataxin-2 重新编程的蛋白酶的特性和适用性，我们从重新设计的和 WT 起点纯化了最好的蛋白酶，并比较了它们的动力学、特异性和稳定性。

sentences.en: Measuring on-target cleavage of ataxin-2 with sub-stoichiometric protease concentrations, we observed faster cleavage rates for both of the top two D3-evolved variants than the top two WT-evolved variants, in which D3(428)1 and D3(428)2 were 1.4-fold and 1.7-fold faster, respectively, than the best WT-evolved protease E(428)4 (Fig. 6c).
sentences.zh: 使用亚化学计量蛋白酶浓度测量 ataxin-2 的靶向裂解，我们观察到前两个 D3 进化变体的裂解速率均高于前两个 WT 进化变体，其中 D3(428)1 和 D3(428)2 分别比最佳 WT 进化蛋白酶 E(428)4 快 1.4 倍和 1.7 倍（图6c）。

sentences.en: When comparing off-target cleavage of SNAP25, WT-evolved proteases demonstrated detected cleavage rates that were 17,000-fold and 21,000-fold lower than the BoNT/E starting point, demonstrating the success of the dual selection circuit to enrich variants with diminished activity on the negative selection substrate (Fig. 6d).
sentences.zh: 当比较 SNAP25 的脱靶裂解时，WT 进化的蛋白酶检测到的裂解率比 BoNT/E 起始点低 17,000 倍和 21,000 倍，这证明了双重选择电路成功地富集了负选择底物活性减弱的变体（图 6d）。

sentences.en: The D3-evolved ataxin-2 proteases showed no detected SNAP25 cleavage when assayed at the same protease concentration (Extended Data Fig. 10b).
sentences.zh: 当在相同的蛋白酶浓度下进行测定时，D3 进化的 ataxin-2 蛋白酶未检测到 SNAP25 裂解（扩展数据图 10b）。

blocks.html_en: To increase the sensitivity of the cleavage rate assay, we re-assayed SNAP25 cleavage with a super-stoichiometric protease concentration. Under these conditions D3(428)1 showed limited SNAP25 cleavage, whereas D3(428)2 still showed no detected cleavage rate, supporting the idea that this D3 variant may have achieved complete substrate reprogramming (Fig. 6d). The design-evolved proteases were quantified to have 79-fold and more than 56-fold greater selected specificity than E(428)4 (Fig. 6e,f).

sentences.en: To increase the sensitivity of the cleavage rate assay, we re-assayed SNAP25 cleavage with a super-stoichiometric protease concentration.
sentences.zh: 为了提高裂解率测定的灵敏度，我们用超化学计量的蛋白酶浓度重新测定了 SNAP25 裂解。

sentences.en: Under these conditions D3(428)1 showed limited SNAP25 cleavage, whereas D3(428)2 still showed no detected cleavage rate, supporting the idea that this D3 variant may have achieved complete substrate reprogramming (Fig. 6d).
sentences.zh: 在这些条件下，D3(428)1 显示出有限的 SNAP25 切割，而 D3(428)2 仍然没有显示出检测到的切割率，这支持了这种 D3 变体可能已经实现了完全底物重编程的观点（图 6d）。

sentences.en: The design-evolved proteases were quantified to have 79-fold and more than 56-fold greater selected specificity than E(428)4 (Fig. 6e,f).
sentences.zh: 经量化设计进化的蛋白酶的选择特异性比 E(428)4 高 79 倍和 56 倍以上（图 6e，f）。

blocks.html_en: We confirmed the high selected specificity of design-evolved proteases observed in kinetics time courses with alternative assays. We measured on-target and off-target protease activity with a gel shift assay. Off-target SNAP25 cleavage was observed for WT-evolved proteases but not for design-evolved proteases (Fig. 6g). Furthermore, a toxicity assay in human cells showed that the redesign-evolved D3(428)1 is less toxic than E(428)4, consistent with higher protease specificity that may reduce perturbations of cellular function (Extended Data Fig. 10c). Molecular dynamics simulations also corroborate the loss of SNAP25 activity after evolution, but did not explain differences between WT-evolved and redesign-evolved specificity (Extended Data Fig. 10d–g and Supplementary Note 7). Collectively, the on-target and off-target activity analysis demonstrates that the redesigned protease evolved solutions to the dual-selection challenge with superior specificity than those evolved from the WT.

sentences.en: We confirmed the high selected specificity of design-evolved proteases observed in kinetics time courses with alternative assays.
sentences.zh: 我们证实了通过替代测定在动力学时间过程中观察到的设计进化蛋白酶的高选择性特异性。

sentences.en: We measured on-target and off-target protease activity with a gel shift assay.
sentences.zh: 我们通过凝胶位移测定测量了靶向和脱靶蛋白酶活性。

sentences.en: Off-target SNAP25 cleavage was observed for WT-evolved proteases but not for design-evolved proteases (Fig. 6g).
sentences.zh: WT 进化的蛋白酶观察到脱靶 SNAP25 裂解，但设计进化的蛋白酶则没有观察到（图 6g）。

sentences.en: Furthermore, a toxicity assay in human cells showed that the redesign-evolved D3(428)1 is less toxic than E(428)4, consistent with higher protease specificity that may reduce perturbations of cellular function (Extended Data Fig. 10c).
sentences.zh: 此外，人类细胞中的毒性测定表明，重新设计进化的 D3(428)1 的毒性低于 E(428)4，这与可能减少细胞功能扰动的更高蛋白酶特异性一致（扩展数据图 10c）。

sentences.en: Molecular dynamics simulations also corroborate the loss of SNAP25 activity after evolution, but did not explain differences between WT-evolved and redesign-evolved specificity (Extended Data Fig. 10d–g and Supplementary Note 7).
sentences.zh: 分子动力学模拟也证实了进化后SNAP25活性的丧失，但没有解释WT进化和重新设计进化特异性之间的差异（扩展数据图10d-g和补充说明7）。

sentences.en: Collectively, the on-target and off-target activity analysis demonstrates that the redesigned protease evolved solutions to the dual-selection challenge with superior specificity than those evolved from the WT.
sentences.zh: 总的来说，在靶和脱靶活性分析表明，重新设计的蛋白酶进化出了双选择挑战的解决方案，其特异性优于从 WT 进化而来的解决方案。

blocks.html_en: Protein stability measurements revealed that the D3-evolved proteases were strongly destabilized compared with their starting point, but were still more stable than WT BoNT/E protease or WT-evolved variants. The WT-evolved proteases were also destabilized, although to a lesser degree, probably because their starting point had a smaller stability margin to trade for the evolution of new function (Extended Data Fig. 10h). We next assayed the expression and cleavage activity of the ataxin-2 proteases in mammalian cells. Co-transfection of plasmids expressing protease and ataxin-2 cDNA led to cleavage of ataxin-2 in HEK293T cells for all evolved proteases. Of note, the design-evolved protease showed higher expression than both the WT-evolved protease and the WT BoNT/E starting point, and the design-evolved protease yielded more efficient generation of the ataxin-2 cleavage product than the WT-evolved protease (Fig. 6h). We also found that the WT-evolved protease generated more abundant cleavage byproducts than a single, low-abundance byproduct for the D3-evolved protease, further suggesting enhanced selected specificity of the redesign-evolved protease (Supplementary Fig. 1h–i). Together, characterization and application of the ataxin-2-specific proteases demonstrate that evolution from redesigned proteases yielded solutions to the dual-selection challenge with higher expression, activity and specificity for a non-native target of therapeutic interest than evolution from WT enzymes.

sentences.en: Protein stability measurements revealed that the D3-evolved proteases were strongly destabilized compared with their starting point, but were still more stable than WT BoNT/E protease or WT-evolved variants.
sentences.zh: 蛋白质稳定性测量显示，D3 进化的蛋白酶与其起始点相比严重不稳定，但仍然比 WT BoNT/E 蛋白酶或 WT 进化的变体更稳定。

sentences.en: The WT-evolved proteases were also destabilized, although to a lesser degree, probably because their starting point had a smaller stability margin to trade for the evolution of new function (Extended Data Fig. 10h).
sentences.zh: WT 进化的蛋白酶也不稳定，尽管程度较轻，可能是因为它们的起点具有较小的稳定性裕度以换取新功能的进化（扩展数据图 10h）。

sentences.en: We next assayed the expression and cleavage activity of the ataxin-2 proteases in mammalian cells.
sentences.zh: 接下来我们测定了哺乳动物细胞中 ataxin-2 蛋白酶的表达和切割活性。

sentences.en: Co-transfection of plasmids expressing protease and ataxin-2 cDNA led to cleavage of ataxin-2 in HEK293T cells for all evolved proteases.
sentences.zh: 表达蛋白酶和ataxin-2 cDNA 的质粒共转染导致HEK293T 细胞中ataxin-2 裂解所有进化的蛋白酶。

sentences.en: Of note, the design-evolved protease showed higher expression than both the WT-evolved protease and the WT BoNT/E starting point, and the design-evolved protease yielded more efficient generation of the ataxin-2 cleavage product than the WT-evolved protease (Fig. 6h).
sentences.zh: 值得注意的是，设计进化的蛋白酶比WT进化的蛋白酶和WT BoNT/E起始点表现出更高的表达，并且设计进化的蛋白酶比WT进化的蛋白酶更有效地产生ataxin-2裂解产物（图6h）。

sentences.en: We also found that the WT-evolved protease generated more abundant cleavage byproducts than a single, low-abundance byproduct for the D3-evolved protease, further suggesting enhanced selected specificity of the redesign-evolved protease (Supplementary Fig. 1h–i).
sentences.zh: 我们还发现，WT 进化的蛋白酶比 D3 进化的蛋白酶产生的单一、低丰度的副产物更丰富，进一步表明重新设计进化的蛋白酶的选择性特异性增强（补充图 1h-i）。

sentences.en: Together, characterization and application of the ataxin-2-specific proteases demonstrate that evolution from redesigned proteases yielded solutions to the dual-selection challenge with higher expression, activity and specificity for a non-native target of therapeutic interest than evolution from WT enzymes.
sentences.zh: 总之，ataxin-2 特异性蛋白酶的表征和应用表明，与 WT 酶的进化相比，重新设计的蛋白酶的进化产生了双重选择挑战的解决方案，对治疗感兴趣的非天然靶点具有更高的表达、活性和特异性。

blocks.html_en: Finally, we asked whether the high-specificity design-evolved genotypes were uniquely compatible with the redesigned protease background or could function in the WT background. Grafting all evolution mutations from D3(428)1 or D3(428)2 into the WT background resulted in no ataxin-2 cleavage activity (Fig. 6i). The WT background is therefore not robust to the evolution mutations that confer enhanced specificity, explaining why these genotypes did not arise in the WT BoNT/E-seeded lagoons. By contrast, grafting the evolution mutations from E(428)4 into the D3 background generated a protease with high activity and specificity for ataxin-2. Although D3(428)2 and E(428)4 showed similar selected specificity in this experiment (30.0-fold versus 30.2-fold), this similarity is probably an artefact of the inability of both proteases to cleave SNAP25 above that of the negative control. Consistent with these results in the context of the PACE circuit, the WT-background protease with D3-evolved mutations grafted had no observed activity in mammalian cells, whereas the D3-background protease with WT-evolved mutations grafted produced the target cleavage product (Fig. 6h). This striking distinction between the WT BoNT/E and D3 starting points is consistent with our findings from the three substrate variant evolutions, and strongly suggests that starting point redesign expands the productive mutation space of an evolving enzyme, enabling the emergence of new genotypes with virtually absolute specificity reprogramming not attained by evolving the natural enzyme.

sentences.en: Finally, we asked whether the high-specificity design-evolved genotypes were uniquely compatible with the redesigned protease background or could function in the WT background.
sentences.zh: 最后，我们询问高特异性设计进化的基因型是否与重新设计的蛋白酶背景唯一兼容或者可以在 WT 背景中发挥作用。

sentences.en: Grafting all evolution mutations from D3(428)1 or D3(428)2 into the WT background resulted in no ataxin-2 cleavage activity (Fig. 6i).
sentences.zh: 将 D3(428)1 或 D3(428)2 的所有进化突变移植到 WT 背景中不会导致 ataxin-2 裂解活性（图 6i）。

sentences.en: The WT background is therefore not robust to the evolution mutations that confer enhanced specificity, explaining why these genotypes did not arise in the WT BoNT/E-seeded lagoons.
sentences.zh: 因此，WT 背景对于赋予增强特异性的进化突变并不稳健，这解释了为什么这些基因型没有出现在 WT BoNT/E 种子泻湖中。

sentences.en: By contrast, grafting the evolution mutations from E(428)4 into the D3 background generated a protease with high activity and specificity for ataxin-2.
sentences.zh: 相比之下，将 E(428)4 的进化突变移植到 D3 背景中产生了对 ataxin-2 具有高活性和特异性的蛋白酶。

sentences.en: Although D3(428)2 and E(428)4 showed similar selected specificity in this experiment (30.0-fold versus 30.2-fold), this similarity is probably an artefact of the inability of both proteases to cleave SNAP25 above that of the negative control.
sentences.zh: 尽管 D3(428)2 和 E(428)4 在本实验中表现出相似的选择特异性（30.0 倍与 30.2 倍），但这种相似性可能是两种蛋白酶无法切割高于阴性对照的 SNAP25 的人为因素。

sentences.en: Consistent with these results in the context of the PACE circuit, the WT-background protease with D3-evolved mutations grafted had no observed activity in mammalian cells, whereas the D3-background protease with WT-evolved mutations grafted produced the target cleavage product (Fig. 6h).
sentences.zh: 与 PACE 回路中的这些结果一致，嫁接有 D3 进化突变的 WT 背景蛋白酶在哺乳动物细胞中没有观察到活性，而嫁接有 WT 进化突变的 D3 背景蛋白酶产生了目标裂解产物（图 6h）。

sentences.en: This striking distinction between the WT BoNT/E and D3 starting points is consistent with our findings from the three substrate variant evolutions, and strongly suggests that starting point redesign expands the productive mutation space of an evolving enzyme, enabling the emergence of new genotypes with virtually absolute specificity reprogramming not attained by evolving the natural enzyme.
sentences.zh: WT BoNT/E 和 D3 起点之间的显着区别与我们从三种底物变体进化中得到的结果一致，并且强烈表明起点重新设计扩大了进化酶的生产性突变空间，从而能够出现具有几乎绝对特异性重编程的新基因型，而这是通过进化天然酶无法实现的。

blocks.html_en: Discussion

sentences.en: Discussion
sentences.zh: 讨论

blocks.html_en: Current computational protein design methodology is well suited for increasing stability, but the design of new function remains challenging. By contrast, experimental evolution excels at generating new function but often at the cost of reduced stability. Here we have shown that current computational protein design and laboratory evolution can together overcome both limitations to generate stable proteases with potent and specific new function. We restored the stability of a reprogrammed BoNT/E protease, and distinct sequence-redesigned BoNT proteases each consistently outperformed the natural protease at various new substrate selections, in all evolutions reaching high-activity mutation space that is non-functional in the undesigned natural enzyme. Our results reveal how redesign accelerates adaptation by supporting fitness in more local, rapidly accessible mutation space. Finally, the application of redesigned protein evolution developed a selection-specific and stable ataxin-2-cleaving protease with no detected native substrate cleavage, which was not achieved by evolving the starting point without redesign. These new design-evolved enzymes could enable the study of how disrupting pathogenic ataxin-2 inclusions at the protein level may rescue neurodegenerative disease.

sentences.en: Current computational protein design methodology is well suited for increasing stability, but the design of new function remains challenging.
sentences.zh: 当前的计算蛋白质设计方法非常适合提高稳定性，但新功能的设计仍然具有挑战性。

sentences.en: By contrast, experimental evolution excels at generating new function but often at the cost of reduced stability.
sentences.zh: 相比之下，实验进化擅长生成新函数，但往往以稳定性降低为代价。

sentences.en: Here we have shown that current computational protein design and laboratory evolution can together overcome both limitations to generate stable proteases with potent and specific new function.
sentences.zh: 在这里，我们证明了当前的计算蛋白质设计和实验室进化可以共同克服这两个限制，以产生具有有效和特定新功能的稳定蛋白酶。

sentences.en: We restored the stability of a reprogrammed BoNT/E protease, and distinct sequence-redesigned BoNT proteases each consistently outperformed the natural protease at various new substrate selections, in all evolutions reaching high-activity mutation space that is non-functional in the undesigned natural enzyme.
sentences.zh: 我们恢复了重新编程的 BoNT/E 蛋白酶的稳定性，并且不同的序列重新设计的 BoNT 蛋白酶在各种新底物选择上始终优于天然蛋白酶，在所有进化中都达到了在未设计的天然酶中不起作用的高活性突变空间。

sentences.en: Our results reveal how redesign accelerates adaptation by supporting fitness in more local, rapidly accessible mutation space.
sentences.zh: 我们的结果揭示了重新设计如何通过支持更局部、快速可访问的突变空间中的适应性来加速适应。

sentences.en: Finally, the application of redesigned protein evolution developed a selection-specific and stable ataxin-2-cleaving protease with no detected native substrate cleavage, which was not achieved by evolving the starting point without redesign.
sentences.zh: 最后，应用重新设计的蛋白质进化开发了一种选择特异性且稳定的ataxin-2裂解蛋白酶，没有检测到天然底物裂解，这是通过在不重新设计的情况下进化起点所无法实现的。

sentences.en: These new design-evolved enzymes could enable the study of how disrupting pathogenic ataxin-2 inclusions at the protein level may rescue neurodegenerative disease.
sentences.zh: 这些新设计进化的酶可以帮助研究如何在蛋白质水平上破坏致病性 ataxin-2 内含物来拯救神经退行性疾病。

blocks.html_en: Protease therapeutics are approved for various indications, although all current protease medicines target native substrates. Proteases evolved to cleave user-specified targets open new opportunities to exploit non-native cleavage events to control processes as important and diverse as blood coagulation, cell growth and differentiation, cell death and amyloid processing52. Our approach to increase the stability, activity and specificity of reprogrammed proteases may help to bring within reach the cleavage of many new targets for which a specific natural protease does not currently exist. The elimination of native substrate cleavage can be a critical property for the safety of a repurposed enzyme.

sentences.en: Protease therapeutics are approved for various indications, although all current protease medicines target native substrates.
sentences.zh: 尽管目前所有的蛋白酶药物都针对天然底物，但蛋白酶疗法已被批准用于各种适应症。

sentences.en: Proteases evolved to cleave user-specified targets open new opportunities to exploit non-native cleavage events to control processes as important and diverse as blood coagulation, cell growth and differentiation, cell death and amyloid processing52.
sentences.zh: 蛋白酶的进化能够切割用户指定的目标，这为利用非天然切割事件来控制血液凝固、细胞生长和分化、细胞死亡和淀粉样蛋白加工等重要且多样化的过程提供了新的机会52。

sentences.en: Our approach to increase the stability, activity and specificity of reprogrammed proteases may help to bring within reach the cleavage of many new targets for which a specific natural protease does not currently exist.
sentences.zh: 我们提高重编程蛋白酶的稳定性、活性和特异性的方法可能有助于实现目前不存在特定天然蛋白酶的许多新靶标的切割。

sentences.en: The elimination of native substrate cleavage can be a critical property for the safety of a repurposed enzyme.
sentences.zh: 消除天然底物裂解可能是重新利用酶的安全性的关键特性。

blocks.html_en: This work demonstrates how the intersection of computational protein redesign and automated continuous evolution can enable rapid, parallel enzyme reprogramming. The redesign and continuous evolution workflow developed here could in principle be applied to any protein that can be stabilized with sequence redesign and whose function can be selected in PACE, although the extent to which the consistent superiority of evolutionary outcomes from redesigned proteases observed in this study applies to other proteins will require future investigations. Relatedly, we have recently reported the ProteinMPNN redesign of PACE-evolved reverse transcriptases to improve intracellular levels and gene-editing efficiency of prime editors53. We recommend the redesign of stabilized starting points for laboratory evolution as a promising approach to generate enzymes with higher activity, specificity and stability than those evolved from natural proteins.

sentences.en: This work demonstrates how the intersection of computational protein redesign and automated continuous evolution can enable rapid, parallel enzyme reprogramming.
sentences.zh: 这项工作展示了计算蛋白质重新设计和自动连续进化的交叉如何能够实现快速、并行的酶重新编程。

sentences.en: The redesign and continuous evolution workflow developed here could in principle be applied to any protein that can be stabilized with sequence redesign and whose function can be selected in PACE, although the extent to which the consistent superiority of evolutionary outcomes from redesigned proteases observed in this study applies to other proteins will require future investigations.
sentences.zh: 这里开发的重新设计和持续进化工作流程原则上可以应用于任何可以通过序列重新设计来稳定的蛋白质，并且其功能可以在 PACE 中选择，尽管本研究中观察到的重新设计的蛋白酶的进化结果的一致优越性在多大程度上适用于其他蛋白质将需要未来的研究。

sentences.en: Relatedly, we have recently reported the ProteinMPNN redesign of PACE-evolved reverse transcriptases to improve intracellular levels and gene-editing efficiency of prime editors53.
sentences.zh: 与此相关的是，我们最近报道了 PACE 进化的逆转录酶的 ProteinMPNN 重新设计，以提高主要编辑器的细胞内水平和基因编辑效率53。

sentences.en: We recommend the redesign of stabilized starting points for laboratory evolution as a promising approach to generate enzymes with higher activity, specificity and stability than those evolved from natural proteins.
sentences.zh: 我们建议重新设计实验室进化的稳定起点，作为产生比天然蛋白质进化的酶具有更高活性、特异性和稳定性的酶的有前景的方法。

blocks.html_en: Methods

sentences.en: Methods
sentences.zh: 方法

blocks.html_en: General methods

sentences.en: General methods
sentences.zh: 一般方法

blocks.html_en: Antibiotics from Gold Biotechnology were prepared in 1,000× stock solutions in water unless otherwise indicated: chloramphenicol (25 mg ml–1 in 70% ethanol), carbenicillin (50 mg ml−1), spectinomycin (50 mg ml−1), tetracycline (10 mg ml−1 in 50% ethanol) and kanamycin (25 mg ml–1). PCR amplifications were carried out using either Phusion U Green Multiplex PCR Master Mix (Thermo Fisher Scientific) or Q5 Hot Start High-Fidelity 2× Master Mix (New England BioLabs). DNA oligonucleotides were synthesized by Integrated DNA Technologies. Plasmids encoding synthetic, human codon-optimized ATXN2 cDNA sequences were obtained from GenScript. Plasmid constructs were assembled via Golden Gate or Gibson cloning protocols following previously described methods21,37. Cloning was performed in chemically competent E. coli Mach1 cells (Thermo Fisher Scientific) or NEB 5α cells (New England Biolabs). Plasmids from single colonies were amplified using the Illustra Templiphi 100 Amplification Kit (Cytiva) before sequencing via Sanger (Quintara Biosciences) or Nanopore (Quintara Biosciences or Plasmidsaurus). For bacterial experiments, plasmid DNA was purified using the QIAprep Spin Miniprep Kit (Qiagen), whereas plasmids for use in mammalian cells was isolated with the Plasmid Plus Midiprep Kit (Qiagen). All plasmids were eluted in nuclease-free water and quantified using a NanoDrop ONE UV-Vis spectrophotometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific). The list of plasmids and selection phages used in this study is available in Supplementary Table 1.

sentences.en: Antibiotics from Gold Biotechnology were prepared in 1,000× stock solutions in water unless otherwise indicated: chloramphenicol (25 mg ml–1 in 70% ethanol), carbenicillin (50 mg ml−1), spectinomycin (50 mg ml−1), tetracycline (10 mg ml−1 in 50% ethanol) and kanamycin (25 mg ml–1).
sentences.zh: 除非另有说明，Gold Biotechnology 的抗生素均在水中制备成 1,000× 储备液：氯霉素（25 mg ml-1，溶于 70% 乙醇）、羧苄青霉素（50 mg ml−1）、大观霉素（50 mg ml−1）、四环素（10 mg ml−1，溶于 50% 乙醇）和卡那霉素（25 mg ml-1）。

sentences.en: PCR amplifications were carried out using either Phusion U Green Multiplex PCR Master Mix (Thermo Fisher Scientific) or Q5 Hot Start High-Fidelity 2× Master Mix (New England BioLabs).
sentences.zh: 使用 Phusion U Green Multiplex PCR Master Mix (Thermo Fisher Scientific) 或 Q5 Hot Start High-Fidelity 2× Master Mix (New England BioLabs) 进行 PCR 扩增。

sentences.en: DNA oligonucleotides were synthesized by Integrated DNA Technologies.
sentences.zh: DNA 寡核苷酸由 Integrated DNA Technologies 合成。

sentences.en: Plasmids encoding synthetic, human codon-optimized ATXN2 cDNA sequences were obtained from GenScript.
sentences.zh: 编码合成的、人类密码子优化的 ATXN2 cDNA 序列的质粒从 GenScript 获得。

sentences.en: Plasmid constructs were assembled via Golden Gate or Gibson cloning protocols following previously described methods21,37.
sentences.zh: 质粒构建体通过 Golden Gate 或 Gibson 克隆方案按照先前描述的方法进行组装21,37。

sentences.en: Cloning was performed in chemically competent E.
sentences.zh: 克隆在化学感受态大肠杆菌中进行。

sentences.en: coli Mach1 cells (Thermo Fisher Scientific) or NEB 5α cells (New England Biolabs).
sentences.zh: 大肠杆菌 Mach1 细胞 (Thermo Fisher Scientific) 或 NEB 5α 细胞 (New England Biolabs)。

sentences.en: Plasmids from single colonies were amplified using the Illustra Templiphi 100 Amplification Kit (Cytiva) before sequencing via Sanger (Quintara Biosciences) or Nanopore (Quintara Biosciences or Plasmidsaurus).
sentences.zh: 使用 Illustra Templiphi 100 扩增试剂盒 (Cytiva) 扩增来自单菌落的质粒，然后通过 Sanger (Quintara Biosciences) 或 Nanopore (Quintara Biosciences 或 Plasmidsaurus) 进行测序。

sentences.en: For bacterial experiments, plasmid DNA was purified using the QIAprep Spin Miniprep Kit (Qiagen), whereas plasmids for use in mammalian cells was isolated with the Plasmid Plus Midiprep Kit (Qiagen).
sentences.zh: 对于细菌实验，使用 QIAprep Spin Miniprep Kit (Qiagen) 纯化质粒 DNA，而使用 Plasmid Plus Midiprep Kit (Qiagen) 分离用于哺乳动物细胞的质粒。

sentences.en: All plasmids were eluted in nuclease-free water and quantified using a NanoDrop ONE UV-Vis spectrophotometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific).
sentences.zh: 所有质粒均在无核酸酶水中洗脱，并使用 NanoDrop ONE 紫外-可见分光光度计 (Thermo Fisher Scientific) 进行定量。

sentences.en: The list of plasmids and selection phages used in this study is available in Supplementary Table 1.
sentences.zh: 本研究中使用的质粒和选择噬菌体列表可在补充表 1 中找到。

blocks.html_en: ProteinMPNN sequence design

sentences.en: ProteinMPNN sequence design
sentences.zh: 蛋白质MPNN序列设计

blocks.html_en: Code and procedure for sequence design are available on GitHub (https://github.com/Nicholas-Krasnow/sequence-design-guide). In summary, AF2-predicted structures of each redesigned BoNT protease were used as input for ProteinMPNN, and residues outside specified thresholds for distance to substrate and evolutionary conservation were constrained from redesign. AF2 predictions were confirmed to agree with existing experimental structures while offering a model of regions unresolved by crystallography54,55,56. Sequences were generated in groups according to the constraint cut-offs used. Substrate distance constraints were 14 Å and 18 Å for BoNT/E, 10 Å, 14 Å and 18 Å for BoNT/F, and 18 Å for BoNT/X as measured in PyRosetta57. Conservation of each residue was determined as the residue frequency in a multiple sequence alignment of homologues identified from a database search of Uniref50 with the starting BoNT protease as the search query. Conservation constraints of 30% and 60% were used for all proteases; each residue that was at least as conserved as the cut-off and was the plurality residue in the alignment position was constrained from design. For BoNT/X, an additional criterion was applied to constrain residues predicted to lie within 14 Å of the belt domain in the holotoxin based on alignment to the BoNT/A holotoxin structure (Protein Data Bank ID 3BTA)58. During sequence generation, two sampling temperatures of 0.1 and 0.3 were tested. Cysteine was excluded from design to avoid oxidation. Structures of output sequences were predicted in AF2 and evaluated by calculating the predicted local distance difference test score and root mean square deviation to the input structure measured in PyMOL.

sentences.en: Code and procedure for sequence design are available on GitHub (https://github.com/Nicholas-Krasnow/sequence-design-guide). In summary, AF2-predicted structures of each redesigned BoNT protease were used as input for ProteinMPNN, and residues outside specified thresholds for distance to substrate and evolutionary conservation were constrained from redesign.
sentences.zh: 序列设计的代码和过程可在 GitHub (https://github.com/Nicholas-Krasnow/sequence-design-guide) 上找到。总之，每种重新设计的 BoNT 蛋白酶的 AF2 预测结构被用作 ProteinMPNN 的输入，并且超出底物距离和进化保守指定阈值的残基受到重新设计的限制。

sentences.en: AF2 predictions were confirmed to agree with existing experimental structures while offering a model of regions unresolved by crystallography54,55,56.
sentences.zh: AF2 预测被证实与现有的实验结构一致，同时提供了晶体学未解析区域的模型 54,55,56。

sentences.en: Sequences were generated in groups according to the constraint cut-offs used.
sentences.zh: 根据所使用的约束截止值分组生成序列。

sentences.en: Substrate distance constraints were 14 Å and 18 Å for BoNT/E, 10 Å, 14 Å and 18 Å for BoNT/F, and 18 Å for BoNT/X as measured in PyRosetta57.
sentences.zh: 在 PyRosetta57 中测量，BoNT/E 的基板距离限制为 14 Å 和 18 Å，BoNT/F 的基板距离限制为 10 Å、14 Å 和 18 Å，BoNT/X 的基板距离限制为 18 Å。

sentences.en: Conservation of each residue was determined as the residue frequency in a multiple sequence alignment of homologues identified from a database search of Uniref50 with the starting BoNT protease as the search query.
sentences.zh: 每个残基的保守性被确定为同源物的多序列比对中的残基频率，该同源物是通过以起始BoNT蛋白酶作为搜索查询的Uniref50数据库搜索来鉴定的。

sentences.en: Conservation constraints of 30% and 60% were used for all proteases; each residue that was at least as conserved as the cut-off and was the plurality residue in the alignment position was constrained from design.
sentences.zh: 所有蛋白酶均采用 30% 和 60% 的保守约束；至少与截止值一样保守并且是比对位置中的多个残基的每个残基都受到设计的限制。

sentences.en: For BoNT/X, an additional criterion was applied to constrain residues predicted to lie within 14 Å of the belt domain in the holotoxin based on alignment to the BoNT/A holotoxin structure (Protein Data Bank ID 3BTA)58.
sentences.zh: 对于 BoNT/X，根据与 BoNT/A 全毒素结构（蛋白质数据库 ID 3BTA）的比对，应用了附加标准来限制预测位于全毒素带结构域 14 Å 范围内的残基（蛋白质数据库 ID 3BTA）58。

sentences.en: During sequence generation, two sampling temperatures of 0.1 and 0.3 were tested.
sentences.zh: 在序列生成过程中，测试了0.1和0.3两个采样温度。

sentences.en: Cysteine was excluded from design to avoid oxidation.
sentences.zh: 半胱氨酸被排除在设计之外以避免氧化。

sentences.en: Structures of output sequences were predicted in AF2 and evaluated by calculating the predicted local distance difference test score and root mean square deviation to the input structure measured in PyMOL.
sentences.zh: 在 AF2 中预测输出序列的结构，并通过计算与 PyMOL 中测量的输入结构的预测局部距离差异测试分数和均方根偏差进行评估。

blocks.html_en: PROSS sequence design

sentences.en: PROSS sequence design
sentences.zh: PROSS序列设计

blocks.html_en: PROSS variants of BoNT/E were generated using the PROSS webserver (https://pross.weizmann.ac.il/step/pross-terms/). The same AF2 input structure and the same distance constraints of 14 Å and 18 Å used for BoNT/E ProteinMPNN were used for PROSS. Because PROSS directly uses a multiple sequence alignment to sample putative stabilizing mutations, the conservation constraints used for ProteinMPNN were not applied. Folding energy was calculated with the ref2015 energy function. The webserver was run until 44 non-duplicate sequences were generated for each distance constraint group.

sentences.en: PROSS variants of BoNT/E were generated using the PROSS webserver (https://pross.weizmann.ac.il/step/pross-terms/). The same AF2 input structure and the same distance constraints of 14 Å and 18 Å used for BoNT/E ProteinMPNN were used for PROSS.
sentences.zh: BoNT/E 的 PROSS 变体是使用 PROSS 网络服务器 (https://pross.weizmann.ac.il/step/pross-terms/) 生成的。 PROSS 使用与 BoNT/E ProteinMPNN 相同的 AF2 输入结构和相同的 14 Å 和 18 Å 距离约束。

sentences.en: Because PROSS directly uses a multiple sequence alignment to sample putative stabilizing mutations, the conservation constraints used for ProteinMPNN were not applied.
sentences.zh: 由于 PROSS 直接使用多序列比对来对假定的稳定突变进行采样，因此未应用 ProteinMPNN 所使用的保守约束。

sentences.en: Folding energy was calculated with the ref2015 energy function.
sentences.zh: 使用ref2015能量函数计算折叠能量。

sentences.en: The webserver was run until 44 non-duplicate sequences were generated for each distance constraint group.
sentences.zh: 运行网络服务器直到为每个距离约束组生成 44 个非重复序列。

blocks.html_en: Small-scale protein expression and purification

sentences.en: Small-scale protein expression and purification
sentences.zh: 小规模蛋白质表达和纯化

blocks.html_en: Starter cultures were grown overnight from single colonies and used to inoculate 5 ml of medium supplemented with 50 µg ml−1 kanamycin per well in a 24-well plate (50 μl inoculum per well). Cultures were incubated at 37 °C with shaking until reaching mid-log phase, then were subjected to a 1-h cold shock on ice. Protein expression was induced with 1 mM IPTG (Gold Biotechnology) and cultures were incubated overnight at 16 °C.

sentences.en: Starter cultures were grown overnight from single colonies and used to inoculate 5 ml of medium supplemented with 50 µg ml−1 kanamycin per well in a 24-well plate (50 μl inoculum per well).
sentences.zh: 起始培养物从单菌落生长过夜，并用于接种 24 孔板中每孔补充有 50 µg ml−1 卡那霉素的 5 ml 培养基（每孔 50 μl 接种物）。

sentences.en: Cultures were incubated at 37 °C with shaking until reaching mid-log phase, then were subjected to a 1-h cold shock on ice.
sentences.zh: 培养物在 37°C 下振荡孵育直至达到对数中期，然后在冰上进行 1 小时冷激。

sentences.en: Protein expression was induced with 1 mM IPTG (Gold Biotechnology) and cultures were incubated overnight at 16 °C.
sentences.zh: 用 1 mM IPTG (Gold Biotechnology) 诱导蛋白质表达，并将培养物在 16 °C 下孵育过夜。

blocks.html_en: Overnight cultures were harvested by centrifugation. Cell pellets were resuspended in 400 μl of B-PER reagent (Thermo Fisher Scientific) supplemented with 0.8 μl each of lysozyme and DNaseI and 16 μl of cOmplete protease inhibitor tablet solution prepared in 2 ml nuclease-free water (Roche). Lysis proceeded by incubation at room temperature for 15 min without freeze–thaw cycles. Lysates were transferred to microcentrifuge tubes and clarified by centrifugation at 20,000g for 5 min at 4 °C. To prepare affinity resin plates for purification (HisPur Cobalt Spin Plates, Thermo Fisher Scientific), storage solution was removed from the resin by centrifugation at 500g for 3 min. Wells were washed once with 400 μl ultrapure water and centrifuged again at 500g for 3 min. Plates were equilibrated by two washes with 400 μl wash buffer (20 mM HEPES and 200 mM NaCl, pH 7.3), each followed by centrifugation. Plates were chilled on ice.

sentences.en: Overnight cultures were harvested by centrifugation.
sentences.zh: 通过离心收获过夜培养物。

sentences.en: Cell pellets were resuspended in 400 μl of B-PER reagent (Thermo Fisher Scientific) supplemented with 0.8 μl each of lysozyme and DNaseI and 16 μl of cOmplete protease inhibitor tablet solution prepared in 2 ml nuclease-free water (Roche).
sentences.zh: 将细胞沉淀重悬于 400 μl B-PER 试剂（Thermo Fisher Scientific）中，补充有溶菌酶和 DNaseI 各 0.8 μl 以及在 2 ml 无核酸酶水（Roche）中制备的 16 μl cOmplete 蛋白酶抑制剂片剂溶液。

sentences.en: Lysis proceeded by incubation at room temperature for 15 min without freeze–thaw cycles.
sentences.zh: 裂解通过在室温下孵育 15 分钟进行，无需冻融循环。

sentences.en: Lysates were transferred to microcentrifuge tubes and clarified by centrifugation at 20,000g for 5 min at 4 °C.
sentences.zh: 将裂解物转移至微量离心管中，并通过在 4°C 下以 20,000g 离心 5 分钟来澄清。

sentences.en: To prepare affinity resin plates for purification (HisPur Cobalt Spin Plates, Thermo Fisher Scientific), storage solution was removed from the resin by centrifugation at 500g for 3 min.
sentences.zh: 为了准备用于纯化的亲和树脂板（HisPur 钴旋转板，Thermo Fisher Scientific），通过在 500g 下离心 3 分钟从树脂中除去储存溶液。

sentences.en: Wells were washed once with 400 μl ultrapure water and centrifuged again at 500g for 3 min.
sentences.zh: 用400μl超纯水洗涤孔一次，并再次以500g离心3分钟。

sentences.en: Plates were equilibrated by two washes with 400 μl wash buffer (20 mM HEPES and 200 mM NaCl, pH 7.3), each followed by centrifugation.
sentences.zh: 使用 400 μl 洗涤缓冲液（20 mM HEPES 和 200 mM NaCl，pH 7.3）洗涤两次来平衡板，每次均随后离心。

sentences.en: Plates were chilled on ice.
sentences.zh: 将板在冰上冷却。

blocks.html_en: Following lysis, 300 µl of each supernatant (cleared lysate) was transferred to the pre-chilled 96-well cobalt resin plate and incubated for 15 min on ice. Plates were centrifuged for 3 min at 500g at 4 °C, and flow-through was collected. The resin was washed four times with 400 μl of wash buffer containing 10 mM imidazole, each wash followed by centrifugation at 500g for 3 min at 4 °C. Bound proteins were eluted by incubating the resin with 200 μl of elution buffer (wash buffer + 250 mM imidazole, pH 7.3) for 1 min, followed by centrifugation at 500g for 3 min at 4 °C. Eluates were sealed and stored at 4 °C.

sentences.en: Following lysis, 300 µl of each supernatant (cleared lysate) was transferred to the pre-chilled 96-well cobalt resin plate and incubated for 15 min on ice.
sentences.zh: 裂解后，将 300 µl 每种上清液（澄清的裂解液）转移至预冷的 96 孔钴树脂板中，并在冰上孵育 15 分钟。

sentences.en: Plates were centrifuged for 3 min at 500g at 4 °C, and flow-through was collected.
sentences.zh: 将板在 4°C、500g 下离心 3 分钟，并收集流出物。

sentences.en: The resin was washed four times with 400 μl of wash buffer containing 10 mM imidazole, each wash followed by centrifugation at 500g for 3 min at 4 °C.
sentences.zh: 用 400 μl 含有 10 mM 咪唑的洗涤缓冲液洗涤树脂四次，每次洗涤后在 4 °C 下以 500 g 离心 3 分钟。

sentences.en: Bound proteins were eluted by incubating the resin with 200 μl of elution buffer (wash buffer + 250 mM imidazole, pH 7.3) for 1 min, followed by centrifugation at 500g for 3 min at 4 °C.
sentences.zh: 将树脂与 200 μl 洗脱缓冲液（洗涤缓冲液 + 250 mM 咪唑，pH 7.3）一起孵育 1 分钟，然后在 4 °C 下以 500 g 离心 3 分钟，从而洗脱结合的蛋白质。

sentences.en: Eluates were sealed and stored at 4 °C.
sentences.zh: 洗脱液密封保存于4°C。

blocks.html_en: To remove imidazole and adjust buffer conditions for downstream assay, buffer exchange was performed using Zeba spin desalting plates (Thermo Fisher Scientific). Desalting plates were equilibrated to room temperature, and storage buffer was removed by centrifugation at 1,000g for 2 min. Each well was washed four times with 250 μl exchange buffer (50 mM HEPES and 5 mM NaCl pH 7.3), each followed by centrifugation. Purified protein samples (100 μl) were applied to the resin bed, followed by 20 μl of exchange buffer to ensure full recovery. The processed protein was eluted by centrifugation at 1,000g for 2 min and collected in a new 96-well plate. SDS–PAGE analysis was used to assess protein expression and purification across various stages. Purified protein samples were stored at 4 °C for subsequent quantification and activity assays. Protein concentrations were measured using Pierce BCA assay (Thermo Fisher Scientific).

sentences.en: To remove imidazole and adjust buffer conditions for downstream assay, buffer exchange was performed using Zeba spin desalting plates (Thermo Fisher Scientific).
sentences.zh: 为了去除咪唑并调整下游测定的缓冲液条件，使用 Zeba 旋转脱盐板（Thermo Fisher Scientific）进行缓冲液交换。

sentences.en: Desalting plates were equilibrated to room temperature, and storage buffer was removed by centrifugation at 1,000g for 2 min.
sentences.zh: 将脱盐板平衡至室温，并通过 1,000g 离心 2 分钟去除储存缓冲液。

sentences.en: Each well was washed four times with 250 μl exchange buffer (50 mM HEPES and 5 mM NaCl pH 7.3), each followed by centrifugation.
sentences.zh: 每个孔用 250 μl 交换缓冲液（50 mM HEPES 和 5 mM NaCl pH 7.3）洗涤四次，每次随后离心。

sentences.en: Purified protein samples (100 μl) were applied to the resin bed, followed by 20 μl of exchange buffer to ensure full recovery.
sentences.zh: 将纯化的蛋白质样品 (100 μl) 应用到树脂床上，然后加入 20 μl 交换缓冲液以确保完全恢复。

sentences.en: The processed protein was eluted by centrifugation at 1,000g for 2 min and collected in a new 96-well plate.
sentences.zh: 1,000g 离心 2 分钟洗脱加工后的蛋白质，并收集在新的 96 孔板中。

sentences.en: SDS–PAGE analysis was used to assess protein expression and purification across various stages.
sentences.zh: SDS-PAGE 分析用于评估各个阶段的蛋白质表达和纯化。

sentences.en: Purified protein samples were stored at 4 °C for subsequent quantification and activity assays.
sentences.zh: 纯化的蛋白质样品储存在 4°C 下，用于后续定量和活性测定。

sentences.en: Protein concentrations were measured using Pierce BCA assay (Thermo Fisher Scientific).
sentences.zh: 使用 Pierce BCA 测定（Thermo Fisher Scientific）测量蛋白质浓度。

blocks.html_en: Protease cleavage kinetics assay

sentences.en: Protease cleavage kinetics assay
sentences.zh: 蛋白酶裂解动力学测定

blocks.html_en: FRET assays were conducted as previously described59. In brief, substrate proteins were diluted to the indicated concentrations in reaction buffer (50 mM HEPES pH 7.3, 5 mM NaCl, 2 mM dithiothreitol and 10 µM Zn(OAc)2). Proteases were diluted in reaction buffer to 20×, the indicated final concentration. Substrates (47.5 µl) were aliquoted into 96w white half-area, clear-bottom plates (Costar), and optimal gain values for 50% signal at 470 nm (donor fluorophore) and 100% signal at 526 nm were measured on a Tecan Spark plate reader. Diluted protease samples (2.5 µl) were added to substrate wells, mixed, then fluorescence emission was measured on the plate reader at 470 nm and 526 nm over a 1–2-h time course at 37 °C. After incubation, 1 µl trypsin (New England Biolabs) from a resuspension in 500 µl reaction buffer was added to each well, and emission at the same wavelengths at 37 °C was measured again until values plateaued. Conversion was calculated at each timepoint as previously reported according to the equation:

sentences.en: FRET assays were conducted as previously described59.
sentences.zh: FRET 测定如前所述进行59。

sentences.en: In brief, substrate proteins were diluted to the indicated concentrations in reaction buffer (50 mM HEPES pH 7.3, 5 mM NaCl, 2 mM dithiothreitol and 10 µM Zn(OAc)2).
sentences.zh: 简而言之，将底物蛋白在反应缓冲液（50 mM HEPES pH 7.3、5 mM NaCl、2 mM 二硫苏糖醇和 10 µM Zn(OAc)2）中稀释至指定浓度。

sentences.en: Proteases were diluted in reaction buffer to 20×, the indicated final concentration.
sentences.zh: 将蛋白酶在反应缓冲液中稀释至 20 倍，即所示的最终浓度。

sentences.en: Substrates (47.5 µl) were aliquoted into 96w white half-area, clear-bottom plates (Costar), and optimal gain values for 50% signal at 470 nm (donor fluorophore) and 100% signal at 526 nm were measured on a Tecan Spark plate reader.
sentences.zh: 将底物 (47.5 µl) 等分到 96w 白色半区透明底板 (Costar) 中，并在 Tecan Spark 酶标仪上测量 470 nm（供体荧光团）处 50% 信号和 526 nm 处 100% 信号的最佳增益值。

sentences.en: Diluted protease samples (2.5 µl) were added to substrate wells, mixed, then fluorescence emission was measured on the plate reader at 470 nm and 526 nm over a 1–2-h time course at 37 °C.
sentences.zh: 将稀释的蛋白酶样品 (2.5 µl) 添加到底物孔中，混合，然后在 37 °C 下在 1-2 小时的时间内在读板器上测量 470 nm 和 526 nm 处的荧光发射。

sentences.en: After incubation, 1 µl trypsin (New England Biolabs) from a resuspension in 500 µl reaction buffer was added to each well, and emission at the same wavelengths at 37 °C was measured again until values plateaued.
sentences.zh: 孵育后，将重悬于 500 µl 反应缓冲液中的 1 µl 胰蛋白酶（New England Biolabs）添加到每个孔中，并在 37 °C 下再次测量相同波长的发射，直至值达到稳定水平。

sentences.en: Conversion was calculated at each timepoint as previously reported according to the equation:
sentences.zh: 如之前报道的，根据以下公式计算每个时间点的转化率：

blocks.html_en: where [S]0 is the initial substrate concentration, X is the emission at 470 nm:emission at 526 nm (Em470:Em526) at a given timepoint, neg is the Em470:Em526 from protease-free substrate control at the same timepoint, and pos is the Em470:Em526 ratio upon complete conversion (trypsinolysis). Data were analysed using Microsoft Excel and subsequently plotted and fit using PRISM (GraphPad). Cleavage rate was calculated as the slope of linear fit to conversion over time in the linear range. When a statistically significant rate conversion (Pearson correlation P ≤ 0.05) was not observed, the maximum cleavage rate was calculated as the mean of three replicates plus three standard deviations.

sentences.en: where [S]0 is the initial substrate concentration, X is the emission at 470 nm:emission at 526 nm (Em470:Em526) at a given timepoint, neg is the Em470:Em526 from protease-free substrate control at the same timepoint, and pos is the Em470:Em526 ratio upon complete conversion (trypsinolysis).
sentences.zh: 其中 [S]0 是初始底物浓度，X 是给定时间点 470 nm 处的发射：526 nm 处的发射 (Em470:Em526)，neg 是同一时间点来自无蛋白酶底物对照的 Em470:Em526，pos 是完全转化（胰蛋白酶分解）后的 Em470:Em526 比率。

sentences.en: Data were analysed using Microsoft Excel and subsequently plotted and fit using PRISM (GraphPad).
sentences.zh: 使用 Microsoft Excel 分析数据，随后使用 PRISM (GraphPad) 进行绘图和拟合。

sentences.en: Cleavage rate was calculated as the slope of linear fit to conversion over time in the linear range.
sentences.zh: 裂解率计算为线性范围内随时间变化的线性拟合的斜率。

sentences.en: When a statistically significant rate conversion (Pearson correlation P ≤ 0.05) was not observed, the maximum cleavage rate was calculated as the mean of three replicates plus three standard deviations.
sentences.zh: 当未观察到统计显着的速率转换（Pearson 相关性 P ≤ 0.05）时，最大裂解率计算为三个重复的平均值加上三个标准差。

blocks.html_en: Medium-scale protein expression and purification

sentences.en: Medium-scale protein expression and purification
sentences.zh: 中等规模的蛋白质表达和纯化

blocks.html_en: E. coli BL21 Star (DE3) cells (Thermo Fisher Scientific) transformed with plasmids encoding 6×His-tagged protease or FRET substrate constructs or MBP–GST substrate constructs were streaked onto kanamycin-containing agar plates, and single colonies were used to inoculate 2×YT cultures containing kanamycin (50 µg ml−1). Cultures were grown overnight at 37 °C with shaking at 220 rpm. The following day, overnight cultures were diluted 1:100 into fresh 2×YT medium (250–1,000 ml) containing kanamycin and incubated at 37 °C until reaching mid-log phase (optical density at 600 nm (OD600) ≈ 0.4–0.7). Cultures were then subjected to a 1-h cold shock on ice before induction with 1 mM IPTG (Gold Biotechnology). Induced cultures were incubated overnight at 16 °C with shaking.

sentences.en: E.
sentences.zh: 和。

sentences.en: coli BL21 Star (DE3) cells (Thermo Fisher Scientific) transformed with plasmids encoding 6×His-tagged protease or FRET substrate constructs or MBP–GST substrate constructs were streaked onto kanamycin-containing agar plates, and single colonies were used to inoculate 2×YT cultures containing kanamycin (50 µg ml−1).
sentences.zh: 将编码 6×His 标记蛋白酶或 FRET 底物构建体或 MBP-GST 底物构建体的质粒转化的大肠杆菌 BL21 Star (DE3) 细胞 (Thermo Fisher Scientific) 划线到含有卡那霉素的琼脂平板上，并使用单菌落接种含有卡那霉素 (50 µg ml−1) 的 2×YT 培养物。

sentences.en: Cultures were grown overnight at 37 °C with shaking at 220 rpm.
sentences.zh: 培养物在 37°C 下生长过夜，并以 220 rpm 的速度振荡。

sentences.en: The following day, overnight cultures were diluted 1:100 into fresh 2×YT medium (250–1,000 ml) containing kanamycin and incubated at 37 °C until reaching mid-log phase (optical density at 600 nm (OD600) ≈ 0.4–0.7).
sentences.zh: 第二天，将过夜培养物按 1:100 稀释到含有卡那霉素的新鲜 2×YT 培养基（250–1,000 ml）中，并在 37 °C 下孵育，直至达到对数中期（600 nm (OD600) 处的光密度 ≈ 0.4–0.7）。

sentences.en: Cultures were then subjected to a 1-h cold shock on ice before induction with 1 mM IPTG (Gold Biotechnology).
sentences.zh: 然后将培养物在冰上进行 1 小时冷休克，然后用 1 mM IPTG（Gold Biotechnology）进行诱导。

sentences.en: Induced cultures were incubated overnight at 16 °C with shaking.
sentences.zh: 诱导培养物在 16°C 下摇动孵育过夜。

blocks.html_en: Cells were harvested by centrifugation at 6,000g for 5 min and resuspended in cold lysis buffer (10 ml per 250 ml culture volume; 20 mM HEPES pH 7.3 and 200 mM NaCl, supplemented with cOmplete EDTA-free protease inhibitor tablet, Roche). Cell lysis was performed by sonication (amplitude 10, 3 s pulse on, 6 s pulse off, 6-min processing). The resulting lysate was clarified by centrifugation at 19,000g for 20 min at 4 °C.

sentences.en: Cells were harvested by centrifugation at 6,000g for 5 min and resuspended in cold lysis buffer (10 ml per 250 ml culture volume; 20 mM HEPES pH 7.3 and 200 mM NaCl, supplemented with cOmplete EDTA-free protease inhibitor tablet, Roche).
sentences.zh: 通过以 6,000g 离心 5 分钟收获细胞，并重悬于冷裂解缓冲液（每 250 ml 培养体积 10 ml；20 mM HEPES pH 7.3 和 200 mM NaCl，补充完全不含 EDTA 的蛋白酶抑制剂片剂，Roche）。

sentences.en: Cell lysis was performed by sonication (amplitude 10, 3 s pulse on, 6 s pulse off, 6-min processing).
sentences.zh: 通过超声处理（振幅 10、3 秒脉冲开启、6 秒脉冲关闭、6 分钟处理）进行细胞裂解。

sentences.en: The resulting lysate was clarified by centrifugation at 19,000g for 20 min at 4 °C.
sentences.zh: 通过在 4°C 下以 19,000g 离心 20 分钟使所得裂解物澄清。

blocks.html_en: For His-tagged proteins, the supernatant was loaded onto Ni-NTA affinity resin (Thermo Fisher Scientific; 1 ml resin per 250 ml culture), pre-equilibrated with wash buffer. Binding was carried out by gentle end-over-end mixing at 4 °C for 1 h. The resin was then transferred to gravity-flow columns and washed twice with 20 ml of cold wash buffer supplemented with 10 mM imidazole. Bound proteins were eluted in 4 × 1.5 ml fractions using wash buffer + 250 ml imidazole, pH 7.3. For MBP–GST substrate proteins, supernatants were instead loaded onto glutathione agarose resin (Thermo Fisher Scientific), washed twice with wash buffer, then eluted with wash buffer + 50 mM glutathione. Eluted fractions were evaluated by SDS–PAGE, and those containing the target protease were pooled and subjected to buffer exchange with Amicon 15-kDa centrifugal filters (Millipore Sigma) into the original wash buffer.
