Final protein concentrations were determined using the BCA assay. For long-term storage, proteins were combined with an equal volume of 20% glycerol dissolved in wash buffer, flash-frozen with liquid nitrogen, then stored at −80 °C.

sentences.en: For His-tagged proteins, the supernatant was loaded onto Ni-NTA affinity resin (Thermo Fisher Scientific; 1 ml resin per 250 ml culture), pre-equilibrated with wash buffer.
sentences.zh: 对于 His 标记的蛋白质，将上清液加载到 Ni-NTA 亲和树脂（Thermo Fisher Scientific；每 250 ml 培养物 1 ml 树脂）上，用洗涤缓冲液预平衡。

sentences.en: Binding was carried out by gentle end-over-end mixing at 4 °C for 1 h.
sentences.zh: 通过在 4°C 下轻轻颠倒混合 1 小时进行结合。

sentences.en: The resin was then transferred to gravity-flow columns and washed twice with 20 ml of cold wash buffer supplemented with 10 mM imidazole.
sentences.zh: 然后将树脂转移到重力流柱中，并用补充有 10 mM 咪唑的 20 ml 冷洗涤缓冲液洗涤两次。

sentences.en: Bound proteins were eluted in 4 × 1.5 ml fractions using wash buffer + 250 ml imidazole, pH 7.3.
sentences.zh: 使用洗涤缓冲液 + 250 ml 咪唑（pH 7.3）将结合蛋白洗脱为 4 × 1.5 ml 级分。

sentences.en: For MBP–GST substrate proteins, supernatants were instead loaded onto glutathione agarose resin (Thermo Fisher Scientific), washed twice with wash buffer, then eluted with wash buffer + 50 mM glutathione.
sentences.zh: 对于 MBP-GST 底物蛋白，将上清液加载到谷胱甘肽琼脂糖树脂 (Thermo Fisher Scientific) 上，用洗涤缓冲液洗涤两次，然后用洗涤缓冲液 + 50 mM 谷胱甘肽洗脱。

sentences.en: Eluted fractions were evaluated by SDS–PAGE, and those containing the target protease were pooled and subjected to buffer exchange with Amicon 15-kDa centrifugal filters (Millipore Sigma) into the original wash buffer.
sentences.zh: 通过 SDS-PAGE 评估洗脱组分，合并含有目标蛋白酶的组分，并使用 Amicon 15-kDa 离心过滤器 (Millipore Sigma) 将缓冲液交换到原始洗涤缓冲液中。

sentences.en: Final protein concentrations were determined using the BCA assay.
sentences.zh: 使用 BCA 测定法测定最终蛋白质浓度。

sentences.en: For long-term storage, proteins were combined with an equal volume of 20% glycerol dissolved in wash buffer, flash-frozen with liquid nitrogen, then stored at −80 °C.
sentences.zh: 为了长期储存，将蛋白质与等体积的溶解在洗涤缓冲液中的20%甘油混合，用液氮快速冷冻，然后储存在-80°C。

blocks.html_en: Thermal stability assay

sentences.en: Thermal stability assay
sentences.zh: 热稳定性测定

blocks.html_en: Thermal stability was determined by measuring Tm values according to a published protocol60. Proteins were diluted in reaction buffer to 1 µg µl−1. In a PCR plate, 1 µl diluted protein samples or 1 µl buffer-only blank samples were then added to 19 µl dye solution comprising reaction buffer with 800×-diluted SYPRO orange (Thermo Fisher Scientific) and mixed. Melting was observed by measuring fluorescence on a Bio-Rad quantitative PCR machine with the following protocol: equilibrate to 25 °C for 2 min, increase temperature by 0.5 °C, then equilibrate for 1 min and measure fluorescence at 560 nm, repeating the cycle until reaching 95 °C. Fluorescence versus temperature and the first derivative versus temperature were plotted, and Tm values were identified as the temperature of the maximum derivative value.

sentences.en: Thermal stability was determined by measuring Tm values according to a published protocol60.
sentences.zh: 热稳定性通过根据已发布的方案测量 Tm 值来确定60。

sentences.en: Proteins were diluted in reaction buffer to 1 µg µl−1.
sentences.zh: 蛋白质在反应缓冲液中稀释至 1 µg µl−1。

sentences.en: In a PCR plate, 1 µl diluted protein samples or 1 µl buffer-only blank samples were then added to 19 µl dye solution comprising reaction buffer with 800×-diluted SYPRO orange (Thermo Fisher Scientific) and mixed.
sentences.zh: 在 PCR 板中，将 1 µl 稀释的蛋白质样品或 1 µl 仅含缓冲液的空白样品添加到 19 µl 染料溶液中，该染料溶液包含含有 800 倍稀释的 SYPRO Orange（Thermo Fisher Scientific）的反应缓冲液，并混合。

sentences.en: Melting was observed by measuring fluorescence on a Bio-Rad quantitative PCR machine with the following protocol: equilibrate to 25 °C for 2 min, increase temperature by 0.5 °C, then equilibrate for 1 min and measure fluorescence at 560 nm, repeating the cycle until reaching 95 °C.
sentences.zh: 通过使用以下方案在 Bio-Rad 定量 PCR 仪上测量荧光来观察熔解：平衡至 25°C 2 分钟，将温度升高 0.5°C，然后平衡 1 分钟并在 560 nm 处测量荧光，重复循环直至达到 95°C。

sentences.en: Fluorescence versus temperature and the first derivative versus temperature were plotted, and Tm values were identified as the temperature of the maximum derivative value.
sentences.zh: 绘制荧光对温度和一阶导数对温度的图，并将Tm值确定为最大导数值的温度。

blocks.html_en: Preparation and transformation of chemically competent cells

sentences.en: Preparation and transformation of chemically competent cells
sentences.zh: 化学感受态细胞的制备和转化

blocks.html_en: Strain S20607 was used for all luciferase assays, phage amplification, plaque formation assays and PACE experiments. Chemically competent cells were prepared by diluting overnight cultures 1:50 into 50 ml of 2×YT medium supplemented with tetracycline. Cultures were grown at 37 °C with shaking (220 rpm) until reaching an OD600 of 0.4–0.6. Cells were harvested by centrifugation at 4,000g for 10 min at 4 °C and gently resuspended in 5 ml of TSS buffer (LB containing 5% v/v DMSO, 10% w/v PEG 3350 and 20 mM MgCl). Aliquots were frozen on dry ice and stored at −80 °C for later use.

sentences.en: Strain S20607 was used for all luciferase assays, phage amplification, plaque formation assays and PACE experiments.
sentences.zh: 菌株 S20607 用于所有荧光素酶测定、噬菌体扩增、噬斑形成测定和 PACE 实验。

sentences.en: Chemically competent cells were prepared by diluting overnight cultures 1:50 into 50 ml of 2×YT medium supplemented with tetracycline.
sentences.zh: 通过将过夜培养物以 1:50 的比例稀释到 50 ml 补充有四环素的 2×YT 培养基中来制备化学感受态细胞。

sentences.en: Cultures were grown at 37 °C with shaking (220 rpm) until reaching an OD600 of 0.4–0.6.
sentences.zh: 培养物在 37°C 下振荡（220 rpm）生长，直至 OD600 达到 0.4-0.6。

sentences.en: Cells were harvested by centrifugation at 4,000g for 10 min at 4 °C and gently resuspended in 5 ml of TSS buffer (LB containing 5% v/v DMSO, 10% w/v PEG 3350 and 20 mM MgCl).
sentences.zh: 通过在 4°C 下以 4,000g 离心 10 分钟收获细胞，并轻轻重悬于 5 ml TSS 缓冲液（含有 5% v/v DMSO、10% w/v PEG 3350 和 20 mM MgCl 的 LB）中。

sentences.en: Aliquots were frozen on dry ice and stored at −80 °C for later use.
sentences.zh: 将等分试样冷冻在干冰上并储存在-80°C以备后用。

blocks.html_en: For transformation, 100 µl of thawed competent cells was added to a chilled mixture of plasmid DNA (1–2 µl per plasmid, up to three plasmids total) and 95 µl of KCM buffer (100 mM KCl, 30 mM CaCl2 and 50 mM MgCl2 in water). The mixture was gently stirred and incubated on ice for up to 10 min, followed by a 75-s heat shock at 42 °C. SOC medium (500 µl; New England Biolabs) was then added, and cells were recovered at 37 °C with shaking for 1 h. Transformed cells were plated on 2×YT agar containing the appropriate antibiotics and incubated at 37 °C for 16–18 h.

sentences.en: For transformation, 100 µl of thawed competent cells was added to a chilled mixture of plasmid DNA (1–2 µl per plasmid, up to three plasmids total) and 95 µl of KCM buffer (100 mM KCl, 30 mM CaCl2 and 50 mM MgCl2 in water).
sentences.zh: 为了进行转化，将 100 µl 解冻的感受态细胞添加到质粒 DNA（每个质粒 1–2 µl，总共最多三个质粒）和 95 µl KCM 缓冲液（水中的 100 mM KCl、30 mM CaCl2 和 50 mM MgCl2）的冷冻混合物中。

sentences.en: The mixture was gently stirred and incubated on ice for up to 10 min, followed by a 75-s heat shock at 42 °C.
sentences.zh: 将混合物轻轻搅拌并在冰上孵育长达 10 分钟，然后在 42°C 下热激 75 秒。

sentences.en: SOC medium (500 µl; New England Biolabs) was then added, and cells were recovered at 37 °C with shaking for 1 h.
sentences.zh: 然后添加 SOC 培养基（500 µl；New England Biolabs），并在 37°C 下振荡 1 小时回收细胞。

sentences.en: Transformed cells were plated on 2×YT agar containing the appropriate antibiotics and incubated at 37 °C for 16–18 h.
sentences.zh: 将转化细胞铺板于含有适当抗生素的 2×YT 琼脂上，并在 37°C 下孵育 16-18 小时。

blocks.html_en: Luciferase assay for PACE circuit activation

sentences.en: Luciferase assay for PACE circuit activation
sentences.zh: 用于 PACE 回路激活的荧光素酶测定

blocks.html_en: S2060 cells were transformed with the relevant substrate accessory plasmid and pBAD protease expression plasmid. Single colonies were cultured overnight in 2×YT medium supplemented with the appropriate maintenance antibiotics. The next day, cultures were diluted 1:50 into fresh DRM medium containing the same antibiotics and grown at 37 °C with shaking (220 rpm) until reaching an OD600 of 0.4–0.6. Arabinose (1 mM) was added to each sample to induce protease expression, 100 µl of each sample was transferred into a black-walled, flat clear-bottom 96-well plate (Costar) for measurement. Wells containing DRM only were included to obtain background measurements. Absorbance at 600 nm and luminescence were recorded using either a Tecan Infinite M1000 Pro or Tecan Spark microplate reader over a time course of 2.5 h. Luminescence readings were normalized to cell density by dividing the background-subtracted luminescence signal by the background-subtracted OD600 absorbance.

sentences.en: S2060 cells were transformed with the relevant substrate accessory plasmid and pBAD protease expression plasmid.
sentences.zh: 用相关底物辅助质粒和pBAD蛋白酶表达质粒转化S2060细胞。

sentences.en: Single colonies were cultured overnight in 2×YT medium supplemented with the appropriate maintenance antibiotics.
sentences.zh: 单菌落在补充有适当维持抗生素的2×YT培养基中培养过夜。

sentences.en: The next day, cultures were diluted 1:50 into fresh DRM medium containing the same antibiotics and grown at 37 °C with shaking (220 rpm) until reaching an OD600 of 0.4–0.6.
sentences.zh: 第二天，将培养物按 1:50 稀释到含有相同抗生素的新鲜 DRM 培养基中，并在 37°C 下摇动（220 rpm）生长，直至 OD600 达到 0.4-0.6。

sentences.en: Arabinose (1 mM) was added to each sample to induce protease expression, 100 µl of each sample was transferred into a black-walled, flat clear-bottom 96-well plate (Costar) for measurement.
sentences.zh: 每个样品中添加阿拉伯糖 (1 mM) 以诱导蛋白酶表达，将每个样品 100 µl 转移至黑壁平底 96 孔板 (Costar) 中进行测量。

sentences.en: Wells containing DRM only were included to obtain background measurements.
sentences.zh: 仅包含 DRM 的孔被包括在内以获得背景测量值。

sentences.en: Absorbance at 600 nm and luminescence were recorded using either a Tecan Infinite M1000 Pro or Tecan Spark microplate reader over a time course of 2.5 h.
sentences.zh: 使用 Tecan Infinite M1000 Pro 或 Tecan Spark 酶标仪在 2.5 小时的时间内记录 600 nm 处的吸光度和发光度。

sentences.en: Luminescence readings were normalized to cell density by dividing the background-subtracted luminescence signal by the background-subtracted OD600 absorbance.
sentences.zh: 通过将扣除背景的发光信号除以扣除背景的 OD600 吸光度，将发光读数标准化为细胞密度。

blocks.html_en: Toxin purification and luciferase complementation assay for toxin delivery

sentences.en: Toxin purification and luciferase complementation assay for toxin delivery
sentences.zh: 用于毒素递送的毒素纯化和荧光素酶补充测定

blocks.html_en: Plasmids encoding each toxin, tagged with a C-terminal 6×His sequence, were transformed into BL21 DE3 competent cells (New England Biolabs). The transformed cells were plated on LB agar containing 50 µg ml−1 kanamycin and incubated overnight at 37 °C. A single colony was selected and cultured overnight in 2×YT medium supplemented with 50 µg ml−1 kanamycin at 37 °C. The following day, this culture was diluted 1:100 into fresh 2×YT medium and incubated at 37 °C with shaking (200 rpm) until the OD600 absorbance reached approximately 0.6. At this point, cultures were subjected to a 20-min cold shock, after which protein expression was induced by adding 1 mM IPTG. The cultures were then incubated overnight with shaking at 16 °C.

sentences.en: Plasmids encoding each toxin, tagged with a C-terminal 6×His sequence, were transformed into BL21 DE3 competent cells (New England Biolabs).
sentences.zh: 将编码每种毒素的质粒（标有C端6×His序列）转化至BL21 DE3感受态细胞（New England Biolabs）中。

sentences.en: The transformed cells were plated on LB agar containing 50 µg ml−1 kanamycin and incubated overnight at 37 °C.
sentences.zh: 将转化的细胞铺在含有 50 µg ml−1 卡那霉素的 LB 琼脂上，并在 37 °C 下孵育过夜。

sentences.en: A single colony was selected and cultured overnight in 2×YT medium supplemented with 50 µg ml−1 kanamycin at 37 °C.
sentences.zh: 选择单个菌落并在补充有 50 µg ml−1 卡那霉素的 2×YT 培养基中于 37 °C 培养过夜。

sentences.en: The following day, this culture was diluted 1:100 into fresh 2×YT medium and incubated at 37 °C with shaking (200 rpm) until the OD600 absorbance reached approximately 0.6.
sentences.zh: 第二天，将该培养物按 1:100 稀释到新鲜的 2×YT 培养基中，并在 37°C 下振荡（200 rpm）孵育，直至 OD600 吸光度达到约 0.6。

sentences.en: At this point, cultures were subjected to a 20-min cold shock, after which protein expression was induced by adding 1 mM IPTG.
sentences.zh: 此时，将培养物冷激 20 分钟，然后添加 1 mM IPTG 诱导蛋白表达。

sentences.en: The cultures were then incubated overnight with shaking at 16 °C.
sentences.zh: 然后将培养物在 16°C 下摇动孵育过夜。

blocks.html_en: Protein purification was performed at 4 °C. Cells were harvested via centrifugation at 4,000 rpm for 5 min and resuspended in lysis buffer (20 mM Tris-HCl, 500 mM NaCl, 1 mM MgCl2, 10 mM imidazole, 10% glycerol, 1 mM PMSF, protease inhibitor cocktail, 100 µM ZnCl2 and 100 mM arginine, pH 7.5). Lysis was achieved by sonication (3 s pulse on, 6 s pulse off, 3-min processing). The lysate was clarified by centrifugation at 18,000g, and the supernatant was applied to a Ni-NTA affinity column. The column was washed twice using a wash buffer containing 20 mM Tris-HCl, 500 mM NaCl, 50 mM imidazole, 1 mM MgCl2, 100 µM ZnCl2, 10% glycerol and 100 mM arginine (pH 7.4). Proteins were eluted with elution buffer (20 mM Tris-HCl, 500 mM NaCl, 1 mM MgCl2, 250 mM imidazole, 10% glycerol, 100 µM ZnCl2 and 100 mM arginine, pH 7.4). Eluted proteins were first concentrated using a 15-ml Amicon Ultra centrifugal filter (100,000 kDa cut-off) at 3,500g and buffer exchanged into 20 mM Tris-HCl, 150 mM NaCl, 100 µM ZnCl2 and 10% glycerol, pH 7.5. A second concentration step was performed using a 0.5-ml Amicon Ultra filter (100 kDa cut-off) at 14,000 g. Protein concentrations were measured with the BCA assay, and samples were treated with 10 U mg−1 thrombin at 4 °C overnight.

sentences.en: Protein purification was performed at 4 °C.
sentences.zh: 蛋白质纯化在 4 °C 下进行。

sentences.en: Cells were harvested via centrifugation at 4,000 rpm for 5 min and resuspended in lysis buffer (20 mM Tris-HCl, 500 mM NaCl, 1 mM MgCl2, 10 mM imidazole, 10% glycerol, 1 mM PMSF, protease inhibitor cocktail, 100 µM ZnCl2 and 100 mM arginine, pH 7.5).
sentences.zh: 通过以 4,000 rpm 离心 5 分钟收获细胞，并重悬于裂解缓冲液（20 mM Tris-HCl、500 mM NaCl、1 mM MgCl2、10 mM 咪唑、10% 甘油、1 mM PMSF、蛋白酶抑制剂混合物、100 µM ZnCl2 和 100 mM 精氨酸，pH 7.5）。

sentences.en: Lysis was achieved by sonication (3 s pulse on, 6 s pulse off, 3-min processing).
sentences.zh: 通过超声处理（3 秒脉冲开启，6 秒脉冲关闭，3 分钟处理）实现裂解。

sentences.en: The lysate was clarified by centrifugation at 18,000g, and the supernatant was applied to a Ni-NTA affinity column.
sentences.zh: 通过以18,000g离心澄清裂解物，并将上清液施加至Ni-NTA亲和柱。

sentences.en: The column was washed twice using a wash buffer containing 20 mM Tris-HCl, 500 mM NaCl, 50 mM imidazole, 1 mM MgCl2, 100 µM ZnCl2, 10% glycerol and 100 mM arginine (pH 7.4).
sentences.zh: 使用含有 20 mM Tris-HCl、500 mM NaCl、50 mM 咪唑、1 mM MgCl2、100 µM ZnCl2、10% 甘油和 100 mM 精氨酸 (pH 7.4) 的洗涤缓冲液洗涤柱两次。

sentences.en: Proteins were eluted with elution buffer (20 mM Tris-HCl, 500 mM NaCl, 1 mM MgCl2, 250 mM imidazole, 10% glycerol, 100 µM ZnCl2 and 100 mM arginine, pH 7.4).
sentences.zh: 用洗脱缓冲液（20 mM Tris-HCl、500 mM NaCl、1 mM MgCl2、250 mM 咪唑、10% 甘油、100 µM ZnCl2 和 100 mM 精氨酸，pH 7.4）洗脱蛋白质。

sentences.en: Eluted proteins were first concentrated using a 15-ml Amicon Ultra centrifugal filter (100,000 kDa cut-off) at 3,500g and buffer exchanged into 20 mM Tris-HCl, 150 mM NaCl, 100 µM ZnCl2 and 10% glycerol, pH 7.5.
sentences.zh: 首先使用 15 ml Amicon Ultra 离心过滤器（截止值 100,000 kDa）以 3,500g 浓缩洗脱的蛋白质，并将缓冲液更换为 20 mM Tris-HCl、150 mM NaCl、100 µM ZnCl2 和 10% 甘油（pH 7.5）。

sentences.en: A second concentration step was performed using a 0.5-ml Amicon Ultra filter (100 kDa cut-off) at 14,000 g.
sentences.zh: 使用 0.5 ml Amicon Ultra 过滤器（截止值 100 kDa）以 14,000 g 进行第二次浓缩。

sentences.en: Protein concentrations were measured with the BCA assay, and samples were treated with 10 U mg−1 thrombin at 4 °C overnight.
sentences.zh: 使用 BCA 测定法测量蛋白质浓度，并将样品用 10 U mg−1 凝血酶在 4 °C 下处理过夜。

blocks.html_en: For HiBiT:LgBiT luciferase live-cell complementation assays, 15 K N2A cells were seeded in 96-well plates and transfected with 33 ng per well pLX304_CMV::mCherry-LgBiT-FLAG-NES (Addgene #199715) 24 h after seeding. After another 24 h, the media were replaced with 100 µl of complete medium containing 1 µM HiBiT-tagged toxin or HiBiT peptide. Following another 24-h incubation, cells were washed with PBS and bioluminescence was measured using the Nano-Glo Live Cell Assay System (Promega), according to the manufacturer’s instructions, using a Tecan Spark plate reader. In parallel, 50 µl of media was collected separately from the plate after treatment with Nano-Glo substrate and used to assess background signal. This background reading was subtracted from the luminescence values obtained from the treated cells.

sentences.en: For HiBiT:LgBiT luciferase live-cell complementation assays, 15 K N2A cells were seeded in 96-well plates and transfected with 33 ng per well pLX304_CMV::mCherry-LgBiT-FLAG-NES (Addgene #199715) 24 h after seeding.
sentences.zh: 对于 HiBiT:LgBiT 荧光素酶活细胞互补测定，将 15 K N2A 细胞接种到 96 孔板中，并在接种后 24 小时用每孔 33 ng pLX304_CMV::mCherry-LgBiT-FLAG-NES (Addgene #199715) 转染。

sentences.en: After another 24 h, the media were replaced with 100 µl of complete medium containing 1 µM HiBiT-tagged toxin or HiBiT peptide.
sentences.zh: 再过 24 小时后，将培养基更换为 100 µl 含有 1 µM HiBiT 标记毒素或 HiBiT 肽的完全培养基。

sentences.en: Following another 24-h incubation, cells were washed with PBS and bioluminescence was measured using the Nano-Glo Live Cell Assay System (Promega), according to the manufacturer’s instructions, using a Tecan Spark plate reader.
sentences.zh: 再孵育 24 小时后，用 PBS 清洗细胞，并使用 Nano-Glo 活细胞测定系统 (Promega) 根据制造商的说明，使用 Tecan Spark 读板仪测量生物发光。

sentences.en: In parallel, 50 µl of media was collected separately from the plate after treatment with Nano-Glo substrate and used to assess background signal.
sentences.zh: 同时，在用 Nano-Glo 底物处理后，从板中单独收集 50 µl 培养基，用于评估背景信号。

sentences.en: This background reading was subtracted from the luminescence values obtained from the treated cells.
sentences.zh: 从处理细胞获得的发光值中减去该背景读数。

blocks.html_en: PTEN cleavage assay in mammalian cells

sentences.en: PTEN cleavage assay in mammalian cells
sentences.zh: 哺乳动物细胞中的 PTEN 裂解测定

blocks.html_en: Of HEK293T cells (American Type Culture Collection (ATCC), mycoplasma free) at 160,000 cells per millilitre, 2.7 ml was seeded in six-well culture plates. After 24 h, wells were co-transfected with 1.1 µg full-length FLAG-tagged PTEN in pCDNA3.1 vector (Addgene #22231) and 1.1 µg N-terminal OSBP pleckstrin-homology domain tagged (to promote colocalization with PTEN), C-terminal 6×His-tagged proteases in pCDNA3.1 using Lipofectamine 2000 transfection reagent (Thermo Fisher Scientific) following the manufacturer’s instructions. For no protease negative controls, 1.1 µg pUC19 plasmid was transfected instead of protease expression plasmid. Cell lysates were harvested 24 h later in lysis buffer (RIPA (Thermo Fisher Scientific) with 1 mM PMSF and cOmplete protease inhibitor (Roche)). The lysates were analysed by western blot for PTEN (using an anti-FLAG tag antibody) or protease (using an anti-6×His tag antibody) as well as GAPDH as a loading control. Anti-FLAG and anti-6×His were detected with horseradish peroxidase-conjugated secondary antibodies and chemiluminescence measurement, whereas anti-GAPDH was detected with IRDye 680RD-conjugated secondary antibodies and fluorescence measurement. Band intensity was quantified with Image Lab (Bio-Rad).

sentences.en: Of HEK293T cells (American Type Culture Collection (ATCC), mycoplasma free) at 160,000 cells per millilitre, 2.7 ml was seeded in six-well culture plates.
sentences.zh: 将 2.7 ml HEK293T 细胞（美国典型培养物保藏中心 (ATCC)，不含支原体）以每毫升 160,000 个细胞接种到六孔培养板中。

sentences.en: After 24 h, wells were co-transfected with 1.1 µg full-length FLAG-tagged PTEN in pCDNA3.1 vector (Addgene #22231) and 1.1 µg N-terminal OSBP pleckstrin-homology domain tagged (to promote colocalization with PTEN), C-terminal 6×His-tagged proteases in pCDNA3.1 using Lipofectamine 2000 transfection reagent (Thermo Fisher Scientific) following the manufacturer’s instructions.
sentences.zh: 24 小时后，使用 Lipofectamine 2000 将 pCDNA3.1 载体 (Addgene #22231) 中的 1.1 µg 全长 FLAG 标记的 PTEN 和 pCDNA3.1 中的 1.1 µg N 端 OSBP pleckstrin 同源域标记（以促进与 PTEN 共定位）、C 端 6×His 标记的蛋白酶共转染。按照制造商的说明使用转染试剂（Thermo Fisher Scientific）。

sentences.en: For no protease negative controls, 1.1 µg pUC19 plasmid was transfected instead of protease expression plasmid.
sentences.zh: 对于无蛋白酶阴性对照，转染 1.1 µg pUC19 质粒而不是蛋白酶表达质粒。

sentences.en: Cell lysates were harvested 24 h later in lysis buffer (RIPA (Thermo Fisher Scientific) with 1 mM PMSF and cOmplete protease inhibitor (Roche)).
sentences.zh: 24小时后，在裂解缓冲液（含有1 mM PMSF和cOmplete蛋白酶抑制剂（Roche）的RIPA（Thermo Fisher Scientific））中收获细胞裂解物。

sentences.en: The lysates were analysed by western blot for PTEN (using an anti-FLAG tag antibody) or protease (using an anti-6×His tag antibody) as well as GAPDH as a loading control.
sentences.zh: 通过蛋白质印迹分析裂解物中的 PTEN（使用抗 FLAG 标签抗体）或蛋白酶（使用抗 6×His 标签抗体）以及作为上样对照的 GAPDH。

sentences.en: Anti-FLAG and anti-6×His were detected with horseradish peroxidase-conjugated secondary antibodies and chemiluminescence measurement, whereas anti-GAPDH was detected with IRDye 680RD-conjugated secondary antibodies and fluorescence measurement.
sentences.zh: 抗FLAG和抗6×His通过辣根过氧化物酶标记的二抗和化学发光测量来检测，而抗GAPDH通过IRDye 680RD标记的二抗和荧光测量来检测。

sentences.en: Band intensity was quantified with Image Lab (Bio-Rad).
sentences.zh: 使用 Image Lab (Bio-Rad) 对条带强度进行量化。

blocks.html_en: Substrate profiling assay

sentences.en: Substrate profiling assay
sentences.zh: 底物分析测定

blocks.html_en: A single-stranded DNA oligo library of the SNAP25 sequence from D166 to D186 with every possible single-residue substitution was synthesized from Twist Biosciences. PCR was used to amplify the oligo library into double-stranded DNA, which was purified by PCR cleanup (Qiagen). A T7 substrate plasmid backbone was amplified by PCR, DpnI digested to remove template plasmids and purified by PCR cleanup. The double-stranded substrate library was cloned into the plasmid backbone by isothermal assembly (NEBuilder-HiFi, New England Biolabs), and the resulting plasmid library (t7s) was purified by ethanol precipitation using GlycoBlue coprecipitant (Thermo Fisher). Purified plasmid was electroporated into NEB-10β electrocompetent E. coli (New England Biolabs), recovered in 20 ml 2×YT medium supplemented with 25 mM glucose for 10 min, and transferred into 200 ml terrific broth supplemented with 50 µg ml−1 carbenicillin for overnight recovery at 37 °C in a 220-rpm shaking incubator. The cloned plasmid library was harvested from NEB-10β outgrowth culture via midiprep (Qiagen), following the manufacturer’s protocols. The plasmid library was subsequently electroporated into S2060 containing pBAD-BoNT/E plasmid, recovered in 20 ml 2×YT medium supplemented with 25 mM glucose for 10 min, and transferred into 200 ml terrific broth supplemented with 50 µg ml−1 carbenicillin and 50 µg ml−1 spectinomycin for overnight recovery at 37 °C in a 220-rpm shaking incubator.

sentences.en: A single-stranded DNA oligo library of the SNAP25 sequence from D166 to D186 with every possible single-residue substitution was synthesized from Twist Biosciences.
sentences.zh: Twist Biosciences 合成了从 D166 到 D186 的 SNAP25 序列的单链 DNA 寡核苷酸文库，其中包含所有可能的单残基取代。

sentences.en: PCR was used to amplify the oligo library into double-stranded DNA, which was purified by PCR cleanup (Qiagen).
sentences.zh: PCR用于将寡核苷酸文库扩增成双链DNA，通过PCR纯化(Qiagen)纯化双链DNA。

sentences.en: A T7 substrate plasmid backbone was amplified by PCR, DpnI digested to remove template plasmids and purified by PCR cleanup.
sentences.zh: 通过 PCR 扩增 T7 底物质粒主链，消化 DpnI 以除去模板质粒，并通过 PCR 纯化进行纯化。

sentences.en: The double-stranded substrate library was cloned into the plasmid backbone by isothermal assembly (NEBuilder-HiFi, New England Biolabs), and the resulting plasmid library (t7s) was purified by ethanol precipitation using GlycoBlue coprecipitant (Thermo Fisher).
sentences.zh: 通过等温组装（NEBuilder-HiFi，New England Biolabs）将双链底物文库克隆到质粒主链中，并使用 GlycoBlue 共沉淀剂（Thermo Fisher）通过乙醇沉淀纯化所得质粒文库（t7s）。

sentences.en: Purified plasmid was electroporated into NEB-10β electrocompetent E.
sentences.zh: 将纯化的质粒电穿孔至NEB-10β电感受态大肠杆菌中。

sentences.en: coli (New England Biolabs), recovered in 20 ml 2×YT medium supplemented with 25 mM glucose for 10 min, and transferred into 200 ml terrific broth supplemented with 50 µg ml−1 carbenicillin for overnight recovery at 37 °C in a 220-rpm shaking incubator.
sentences.zh: 大肠杆菌（New England Biolabs），在补充有 25 mM 葡萄糖的 20 ml 2×YT 培养基中恢复 10 分钟，然后转移到补充有 50 µg ml−1 羧苄青霉素的 200 ml terrific 肉汤中，在 220 rpm 振荡培养箱中于 37 °C 下过夜恢复。

sentences.en: The cloned plasmid library was harvested from NEB-10β outgrowth culture via midiprep (Qiagen), following the manufacturer’s protocols.
sentences.zh: 按照制造商的方案，通过 midiprep (Qiagen) 从 NEB-10β 生长培养物中收获克隆的质粒文库。

sentences.en: The plasmid library was subsequently electroporated into S2060 containing pBAD-BoNT/E plasmid, recovered in 20 ml 2×YT medium supplemented with 25 mM glucose for 10 min, and transferred into 200 ml terrific broth supplemented with 50 µg ml−1 carbenicillin and 50 µg ml−1 spectinomycin for overnight recovery at 37 °C in a 220-rpm shaking incubator.
sentences.zh: 随后将质粒文库电穿孔到含有 pBAD-BoNT/E 质粒的 S2060 中，在补充有 25 mM 葡萄糖的 20 ml 2×YT 培养基中恢复 10 分钟，然后转移到补充有 50 µg ml−1 羧苄青霉素和 50 µg ml−1 大观霉素的 200 ml terrific 肉汤中，在 37°C 220 rpm 摇床培养箱中过夜恢复。

blocks.html_en: To perform selection, 1 ml of S2060 [pBAD-BoNT/E] [t7s] library culture was pelleted and resuspended in 1 ml of DRM to remove residual growth medium. The washed cell suspension was inoculated into 49 ml pre-warmed DRM supplemented with carbenicillin, spectinomycin and 20 µM arabinose in a disposable 125-ml bacterial culture flask. The flask was incubated at 37 °C with 220 rpm shaking to induce protease expression. Once the cells reached an OD600 of 0.8, 1 ml of culture was inoculated into 49 ml DRM with carbenicillin, spectinomycin and arabinose supplemented with 25 µg ml−1 chloramphenicol. Of induced culture, 1 ml was also inoculated into 49 ml DRM–carbenicillin–spectinomycin–arabinose without chloramphenicol. Selection cultures were incubated overnight at 37 °C with 220 rpm shaking. Following overnight selection, plasmids from both the plus and the minus chloramphenicol cultures were harvested by midiprep (Qiagen), following the manufacturer’s protocols. The substrate sequences from the plasmid pools of both cultures were amplified by PCR using primers rCFH0600 and rCFH0601 and barcoded using the Illumina Truseq adaptor system. The substrate sequences of the plasmid pools were sequenced on an Illumina MiSeq (Illumina). Sequencing data were analysed using custom scripts to count the occurrence of each substrate sequence within both the plus and the minus chloramphenicol conditions. For each substrate s, the log-enrichment score Es was calculated using the following formula:

sentences.en: To perform selection, 1 ml of S2060 [pBAD-BoNT/E] [t7s] library culture was pelleted and resuspended in 1 ml of DRM to remove residual growth medium.
sentences.zh: 为了进行选择，将 1 ml S2060 [pBAD-BoNT/E] [t7s] 文库培养物沉淀并重悬于 1 ml DRM 中以除去残留的生长培养基。

sentences.en: The washed cell suspension was inoculated into 49 ml pre-warmed DRM supplemented with carbenicillin, spectinomycin and 20 µM arabinose in a disposable 125-ml bacterial culture flask.
sentences.zh: 将洗涤的细胞悬浮液接种到一次性 125 ml 细菌培养瓶中的 49 ml 预热的 DRM 中，该 DRM 补充有羧苄青霉素、壮观霉素和 20 µM 阿拉伯糖。

sentences.en: The flask was incubated at 37 °C with 220 rpm shaking to induce protease expression.
sentences.zh: 将烧瓶在 37°C 下孵育，并以 220 rpm 的速度振荡以诱导蛋白酶表达。

sentences.en: Once the cells reached an OD600 of 0.8, 1 ml of culture was inoculated into 49 ml DRM with carbenicillin, spectinomycin and arabinose supplemented with 25 µg ml−1 chloramphenicol.
sentences.zh: 一旦细胞的 OD600 达到 0.8，将 1 ml 培养物接种到 49 ml DRM 中，其中含有羧苄青霉素、壮观霉素和阿拉伯糖，并补充有 25 µg ml−1 氯霉素。

sentences.en: Of induced culture, 1 ml was also inoculated into 49 ml DRM–carbenicillin–spectinomycin–arabinose without chloramphenicol.
sentences.zh: 将诱导培养物中的 1 ml 也接种到 49 ml DRM-羧苄青霉素-大观霉素-阿拉伯糖（不含氯霉素）中。

sentences.en: Selection cultures were incubated overnight at 37 °C with 220 rpm shaking.
sentences.zh: 选择培养物在 37°C 下以 220 rpm 摇动孵育过夜。

sentences.en: Following overnight selection, plasmids from both the plus and the minus chloramphenicol cultures were harvested by midiprep (Qiagen), following the manufacturer’s protocols.
sentences.zh: 过夜选择后，按照制造商的方案，通过 midiprep (Qiagen) 收获来自正氯霉素培养物和负氯霉素培养物的质粒。

sentences.en: The substrate sequences from the plasmid pools of both cultures were amplified by PCR using primers rCFH0600 and rCFH0601 and barcoded using the Illumina Truseq adaptor system.
sentences.zh: 使用引物 rCFH0600 和 rCFH0601 通过 PCR 扩增两种培养物质粒库中的底物序列，并使用 Illumina Truseq 接头系统进行条形码标记。

sentences.en: The substrate sequences of the plasmid pools were sequenced on an Illumina MiSeq (Illumina).
sentences.zh: 在 Illumina MiSeq (Illumina) 上对质粒池的底物序列进行测序。

sentences.en: Sequencing data were analysed using custom scripts to count the occurrence of each substrate sequence within both the plus and the minus chloramphenicol conditions.
sentences.zh: 使用自定义脚本分析测序数据，以计算正氯霉素和负氯霉素条件下每个底物序列的出现次数。

sentences.en: For each substrate s, the log-enrichment score Es was calculated using the following formula:
sentences.zh: 对于每种底物 s，使用以下公式计算对数富集分数 Es：

blocks.html_en: $${{\rm{E}}}_{{\rm{s}}}={\log }_{2}\,\left(\frac{\left(\frac{{C}_{s,+}}{\sum _{S}{C}_{s,+}}\right)}{\left(\frac{{C}_{s,-}}{\sum _{S}{C}_{s,-}}\right)}\right)$$

sentences.en: $${{\rm{E}}}_{{\rm{s}}}={\log }_{2}\,\left(\frac{\left(\frac{{C}_{s,+}}{\sum _{S}{C}_{s,+}}\right)}{\left(\frac{{C}_{s,-}}{\sum _{S}{C}_{s,-}}\right)}\right)$$

blocks.html_en: where Cs,+ is the read count of substrate s in the plus chloramphenicol condition and Cs,– is the read count of substrate s in the minus chloramphenicol condition. Raw read counts were normalized to the total number of reads across all substrates in each condition to account for differences in sequencing yield.

sentences.en: where Cs,+ is the read count of substrate s in the plus chloramphenicol condition and Cs,– is the read count of substrate s in the minus chloramphenicol condition.
sentences.zh: 其中 Cs,+ 是正氯霉素条件下底物 s 的读数计数，Cs,– 是负氯霉素条件下底物 s 的读数计数。

sentences.en: Raw read counts were normalized to the total number of reads across all substrates in each condition to account for differences in sequencing yield.
sentences.zh: 将原始读数计数标准化为每种条件下所有底物的读数总数，以考虑测序产量的差异。

blocks.html_en: Plaque assay

sentences.en: Plaque assay
sentences.zh: 斑块测定

blocks.html_en: S2060 cells were transformed with pJC175e (Addgene #79219) to generate S2208 (ref. 8). Overnight cultures of single S2208 colonies grown in 2×YT medium supplemented with carbenicillin and tetracycline were diluted 50-fold into fresh DRM with the same antibiotics and grown at 37 °C with shaking at 220 rpm to OD600 ~ 0.6–0.8. Phage were serially diluted 100-fold (4 dilutions total) in DRM. Of cells, 100 µl was added to 10 µl of each phage dilution. Of top agar pre-warmed to 55 °C (LB medium + 0.33% LB agar), 500 µl was added and mixed by pipetting up and down once. These mixtures were then immediately pipetted onto 24-well plate wells containing solidified bottom agar (LB agar with 0.04% Bluo-Gal (Research Products International), no antibiotics). After solidification of the top agar, plates were incubated at 37 °C for 16–18 h. Phage titres were determined by counting plaques in dilution wells with approximately 10–100 plaques.

sentences.en: S2060 cells were transformed with pJC175e (Addgene #79219) to generate S2208 (ref.
sentences.zh: 用 pJC175e (Addgene #79219) 转化 S2060 细胞以生成 S2208（参考文献 1）。

sentences.en: Overnight cultures of single S2208 colonies grown in 2×YT medium supplemented with carbenicillin and tetracycline were diluted 50-fold into fresh DRM with the same antibiotics and grown at 37 °C with shaking at 220 rpm to OD600 ~ 0.6–0.8.
sentences.zh: 在补充有羧苄青霉素和四环素的 2×YT 培养基中生长的单个 S2208 菌落的过夜培养物在含有相同抗生素的新鲜 DRM 中稀释 50 倍，并在 37°C 下以 220 rpm 摇动生长至 OD600 ~ 0.6–0.8。

sentences.en: Phage were serially diluted 100-fold (4 dilutions total) in DRM.
sentences.zh: 噬菌体在 DRM 中连续稀释 100 倍（总共 4 次稀释）。

sentences.en: Of cells, 100 µl was added to 10 µl of each phage dilution.
sentences.zh: 将 100 µl 细胞添加到 10 µl 每种噬菌体稀释液中。

sentences.en: Of top agar pre-warmed to 55 °C (LB medium + 0.33% LB agar), 500 µl was added and mixed by pipetting up and down once.
sentences.zh: 加入预热至 55 °C 的顶层琼脂（LB 培养基 + 0.33% LB 琼脂）500 µl，上下移液一次混匀。

sentences.en: These mixtures were then immediately pipetted onto 24-well plate wells containing solidified bottom agar (LB agar with 0.04% Bluo-Gal (Research Products International), no antibiotics).
sentences.zh: 然后立即将这些混合物移液至含有固化底部琼脂（含有 0.04% Bluo-Gal（Research Products International）的 LB 琼脂，不含抗生素）的 24 孔板孔中。

sentences.en: After solidification of the top agar, plates were incubated at 37 °C for 16–18 h.
sentences.zh: 顶部琼脂凝固后，将平板在 37°C 下孵育 16-18 小时。

sentences.en: Phage titres were determined by counting plaques in dilution wells with approximately 10–100 plaques.
sentences.zh: 通过对稀释孔中大约有 10-100 个噬菌斑进行计数来确定噬菌体滴度。

blocks.html_en: Overnight propagation assays

sentences.en: Overnight propagation assays
sentences.zh: 过夜繁殖测定

blocks.html_en: Host cells were prepared by transforming S2060 cells with accessory plasmid, and overnight cultures of single colonies were grown overnight in 2×YT medium supplemented with antibiotics. Cultures were diluted 50-fold into fresh DRM with antibiotics and grown at 37 °C with shaking at 220 rpm to OD600 ~ 0.6–0.8. Host cells were infected with phage at a titre of 1 × 105 PFU ml−1 then grown at 37 °C with shaking at 220 rpm overnight. Phage were collected by centrifugation at 8,000g for 2 min. Titres of propagated phage were determined by plaque assay, and overnight propagation values were calculated as output phage titre/input phage titre.

sentences.en: Host cells were prepared by transforming S2060 cells with accessory plasmid, and overnight cultures of single colonies were grown overnight in 2×YT medium supplemented with antibiotics.
sentences.zh: 通过用辅助质粒转化S2060细胞来制备宿主细胞，并将单菌落的过夜培养物在补充有抗生素的2×YT培养基中生长过夜。

sentences.en: Cultures were diluted 50-fold into fresh DRM with antibiotics and grown at 37 °C with shaking at 220 rpm to OD600 ~ 0.6–0.8.
sentences.zh: 将培养物在含有抗生素的新鲜 DRM 中稀释 50 倍，并在 37°C 下以 220 rpm 摇动生长至 OD600 ~ 0.6–0.8。

sentences.en: Host cells were infected with phage at a titre of 1 × 105 PFU ml−1 then grown at 37 °C with shaking at 220 rpm overnight.
sentences.zh: 宿主细胞用滴度为 1 × 105 PFU ml−1 的噬菌体感染，然后在 37 °C 下以 220 rpm 摇动过夜生长。

sentences.en: Phage were collected by centrifugation at 8,000g for 2 min.
sentences.zh: 8,000g 离心 2 分钟收集噬菌体。

sentences.en: Titres of propagated phage were determined by plaque assay, and overnight propagation values were calculated as output phage titre/input phage titre.
sentences.zh: 通过噬菌斑测定确定繁殖噬菌体的滴度，并将过夜繁殖值计算为输出噬菌体滴度/输入噬菌体滴度。

blocks.html_en: General method for eVOLVER-enabled phage-assisted continuous evolution

sentences.en: General method for eVOLVER-enabled phage-assisted continuous evolution
sentences.zh: 支持 eVOLVER 的噬菌体辅助连续进化的通用方法

blocks.html_en: PACE host strains, phage, turbidostats, lagoons and media were prepared as previously described2,5,6,11. Hardware and software for autonomous eVOLVER and min-eVOLVER devices were used as reported for these systems45,47. For comparison evolutions, to prevent differences in mutation profiles occurring due to differences in codon usage, phage-encoded proteases were designed so that the same codon was used between the WT and designed starting points at all synonymous positions.

sentences.en: PACE host strains, phage, turbidostats, lagoons and media were prepared as previously described2,5,6,11.
sentences.zh: PACE 宿主菌株、噬菌体、恒浊器、泻湖和培养基的制备如前所述2,5,6,11。

sentences.en: Hardware and software for autonomous eVOLVER and min-eVOLVER devices were used as reported for these systems45,47.
sentences.zh: 根据这些系统的报告，使用了自主 eVOLVER 和 min-eVOLVER 设备的硬件和软件45,47。

sentences.en: For comparison evolutions, to prevent differences in mutation profiles occurring due to differences in codon usage, phage-encoded proteases were designed so that the same codon was used between the WT and designed starting points at all synonymous positions.
sentences.zh: 对于比较进化，为了防止由于密码子使用的差异而出现突变谱的差异，设计了噬菌体编码的蛋白酶，以便在WT和所有同义位置的设计起始点之间使用相同的密码子。

blocks.html_en: Hosts were prepared by transforming chemically competent S2060s with AP(s) and MP6, plated on 2×YT agar with antibiotics and 100 mM glucose to suppress MP6 expression, then grown at 37 °C for 16–18 h. Colonies were picked into cultures of DRM with antibiotics, and a dilution series of six 10-fold dilutions of each culture was prepared and grown with shaking at 37 °C for 16–18 h. Cultures with OD600 ~ 0.4–0.8 were used to inoculate 30 ml eVOLVER or min-eVOLVER reservoirs to serve as turbidostats. Turbidostats were set to maintain mid-log OD600 of 0.6–0.8 at constant volume. Phage were subjected to evolutionary drift before PACE by preparing a drift host (S2208 transformed with MP6), infecting mid-log culture of drift host with phage, then collecting phage by centrifugation at 8,000g for 2 min after growing 12–16 h at 37 °C.

sentences.en: Hosts were prepared by transforming chemically competent S2060s with AP(s) and MP6, plated on 2×YT agar with antibiotics and 100 mM glucose to suppress MP6 expression, then grown at 37 °C for 16–18 h.
sentences.zh: 通过用 AP 和 MP6 转化化学感受态 S2060 来制备宿主，铺在含有抗生素和 100 mM 葡萄糖的 2×YT 琼脂上以抑制 MP6 表达，然后在 37°C 下生长 16-18 小时。

sentences.en: Colonies were picked into cultures of DRM with antibiotics, and a dilution series of six 10-fold dilutions of each culture was prepared and grown with shaking at 37 °C for 16–18 h.
sentences.zh: 将菌落挑入含有抗生素的 DRM 培养物中，制备每种培养物的 6 个 10 倍稀释液系列，并在 37°C 下振荡生长 16-18 小时。

sentences.en: Cultures with OD600 ~ 0.4–0.8 were used to inoculate 30 ml eVOLVER or min-eVOLVER reservoirs to serve as turbidostats.
sentences.zh: OD600 ~ 0.4–0.8 的培养物用于接种 30 ml eVOLVER 或 min-eVOLVER 储液器以用作浊度抑制器。

sentences.en: Turbidostats were set to maintain mid-log OD600 of 0.6–0.8 at constant volume.
sentences.zh: 浊度恒定器设置为在恒定体积下维持 0.6-0.8 的对数 OD600 中值。

sentences.en: Phage were subjected to evolutionary drift before PACE by preparing a drift host (S2208 transformed with MP6), infecting mid-log culture of drift host with phage, then collecting phage by centrifugation at 8,000g for 2 min after growing 12–16 h at 37 °C.
sentences.zh: 在PACE之前，噬菌体进行进化漂移，制备漂移宿主（MP6转化的S2208），用噬菌体感染漂移宿主的对数中期培养物，然后在37°C生长12-16小时后通过8,000g离心2分钟收集噬菌体。

blocks.html_en: Lagoons were maintained at a volume of 5 ml with the indicated influx flow rate of host culture from the turbidostat. Mutagenesis was induced by pumping 250 mM arabinose into the lagoon to a constant final concentration of 10 mM. Lagoons were infected with phage by inoculating 500 µl phage at the desired titre into each lagoon. Samples (500 µl) of the phage population were taken at indicated timepoints from the lagoon waste needle. Timepoint samples were centrifuged at 8,000g for 2 min and phage-containing supernatants were stored at 4 °C. Lagoon titres were determined by plaque assay of phage samples. For sequencing of phage clones, eight single plaques were picked, and the transgene region was amplified with PCR and sequenced by Nanopore (Quintara Biosciences or Plasmidsaurus). Consensus clones were defined as the genotypes comprised each observed combination of recurring mutations.

sentences.en: Lagoons were maintained at a volume of 5 ml with the indicated influx flow rate of host culture from the turbidostat.
sentences.zh: 泻湖保持在 5 ml 的体积，并具有来自恒浊器的宿主培养物的指示流入流量。

sentences.en: Mutagenesis was induced by pumping 250 mM arabinose into the lagoon to a constant final concentration of 10 mM.
sentences.zh: 通过将 250 mM 阿拉伯糖泵入泻湖中直至终浓度恒定为 10 mM 来诱导诱变。

sentences.en: Lagoons were infected with phage by inoculating 500 µl phage at the desired titre into each lagoon.
sentences.zh: 通过将 500 µl 噬菌体以所需滴度接种到每个泻湖中，用噬菌体感染泻湖。

sentences.en: Samples (500 µl) of the phage population were taken at indicated timepoints from the lagoon waste needle.
sentences.zh: 在指定的时间点从泻湖废液针中采集噬菌体群体的样本（500 µl）。

sentences.en: Timepoint samples were centrifuged at 8,000g for 2 min and phage-containing supernatants were stored at 4 °C.
sentences.zh: 将时间点样品在 8,000g 下离心 2 分钟，并将含有噬菌体的上清液储存在 4°C 下。

sentences.en: Lagoon titres were determined by plaque assay of phage samples.
sentences.zh: 通过噬菌体样品的噬菌斑测定来测定泻湖滴度。

sentences.en: For sequencing of phage clones, eight single plaques were picked, and the transgene region was amplified with PCR and sequenced by Nanopore (Quintara Biosciences or Plasmidsaurus).
sentences.zh: 为了对噬菌体克隆进行测序，挑选了 8 个单个噬菌斑，并通过 PCR 扩增转基因区域并通过 Nanopore（Quintara Biosciences 或 Plasmidsaurus）进行测序。

sentences.en: Consensus clones were defined as the genotypes comprised each observed combination of recurring mutations.
sentences.zh: 共有克隆被定义为包含每个观察到的重复突变组合的基因型。

blocks.html_en: General method for PANCE

sentences.en: General method for PANCE
sentences.zh: PANCE 的一般方法

blocks.html_en: Hosts and phage were prepared as described above for PACE. Cultures of host cells containing MP6 at OD600 ~ 0.4–0.8 were supplemented with 20 mM arabinose to induce mutagenesis then aliquoted into 1 ml cultures in a 96 deep-well plate. Cultures were inoculated with selection phage at the indicated dilution, then grown 12–16 h at 37 °C and harvested the next day by centrifugation (4,000g for 10 min) and storage of supernatant at 4 °C. Phage were then used to infect the subsequent PANCE passage with hosts prepared the same way. The process was repeated for the number of passages indicated, with titres determined by plaque assay after each passage. Drift passages were performed as described for PACE.

sentences.en: Hosts and phage were prepared as described above for PACE.
sentences.zh: 宿主和噬菌体的制备如上所述，用于 PACE。

sentences.en: Cultures of host cells containing MP6 at OD600 ~ 0.4–0.8 were supplemented with 20 mM arabinose to induce mutagenesis then aliquoted into 1 ml cultures in a 96 deep-well plate.
sentences.zh: 含有 OD600 ~ 0.4–0.8 MP6 的宿主细胞培养物补充 20 mM 阿拉伯糖以诱导诱变，然后等分到 96 深孔板中的 1 ml 培养物中。

sentences.en: Cultures were inoculated with selection phage at the indicated dilution, then grown 12–16 h at 37 °C and harvested the next day by centrifugation (4,000g for 10 min) and storage of supernatant at 4 °C.
sentences.zh: 用指定稀释度的选择噬菌体接种培养物，然后在 37°C 下生长 12-16 小时，并在第二天通过离心（4,000g，10 分钟）收获并在 4°C 下储存上清液。

sentences.en: Phage were then used to infect the subsequent PANCE passage with hosts prepared the same way.
sentences.zh: 然后用噬菌体感染随后的 PANCE 传代，宿主以相同方式制备。

sentences.en: The process was repeated for the number of passages indicated, with titres determined by plaque assay after each passage.
sentences.zh: 重复该过程指定的传代次数，每次传代后通过噬菌斑测定确定滴度。

sentences.en: Drift passages were performed as described for PACE.
sentences.zh: 按照 PACE 的描述进行漂移传代。

blocks.html_en: LoopSeq

sentences.en: LoopSeq
sentences.zh: 循环序列

blocks.html_en: Phage pools from PACE were prepared by propagating phage with S2208 host cells overnight followed by PCR amplification of phage pools using phage transgene PCR primers used for plaque sequencing. A low cycle count of 6–14 cycles was used to reduce the frequency of recombination during PCR. Amplicon pools were purified by Ampure XP bead purification and size purity was confirmed by TapeStation. Sequencing of prepared samples and in silico assembly of synthetic long reads was performed at Element Biosciences. Long reads were analysed by aligning reads to the starting protease gene as the reference, determining the coding mutations compared with the reference, and counting the number of reads of each observed mutation combination. Abundant genotypes were defined as those with more than 100 assembled long reads mapped, which were plotted in histograms and included in mutation set sharing, entropy and Hamming distance analyses. Mutation combinations arising from a particular starting point were classified as shared if the same mutation combination occurred in at least one read of at least one replicate of the alternative starting point, and mutation combinations were classified as starting point specific if not.

sentences.en: Phage pools from PACE were prepared by propagating phage with S2208 host cells overnight followed by PCR amplification of phage pools using phage transgene PCR primers used for plaque sequencing.
sentences.zh: 通过用 S2208 宿主细胞过夜繁殖噬菌体，然后使用用于噬菌斑测序的噬菌体转基因 PCR 引物对噬菌体库进行 PCR 扩增来制备来自 PACE 的噬菌体库。

sentences.en: A low cycle count of 6–14 cycles was used to reduce the frequency of recombination during PCR.
sentences.zh: 使用 6-14 个循环的低循环计数来减少 PCR 过程中的重组频率。

sentences.en: Amplicon pools were purified by Ampure XP bead purification and size purity was confirmed by TapeStation.
sentences.zh: 扩增子池通过 Ampure XP 珠纯化进行纯化，并通过 TapeStation 确认大小纯度。

sentences.en: Sequencing of prepared samples and in silico assembly of synthetic long reads was performed at Element Biosciences.
sentences.zh: 准备好的样品的测序和合成长读段的计算机组装是在 Element Biosciences 进行的。

sentences.en: Long reads were analysed by aligning reads to the starting protease gene as the reference, determining the coding mutations compared with the reference, and counting the number of reads of each observed mutation combination.
sentences.zh: 通过将读数与作为参考的起始蛋白酶基因进行比对，确定与参考相比的编码突变，并计算每个观察到的突变组合的读数数量来分析长读数。

sentences.en: Abundant genotypes were defined as those with more than 100 assembled long reads mapped, which were plotted in histograms and included in mutation set sharing, entropy and Hamming distance analyses.
sentences.zh: 丰富的基因型被定义为具有超过 100 个组装的长读长映射的基因型，这些基因型绘制在直方图中，并包含在突变集共享、熵和汉明距离分析中。

sentences.en: Mutation combinations arising from a particular starting point were classified as shared if the same mutation combination occurred in at least one read of at least one replicate of the alternative starting point, and mutation combinations were classified as starting point specific if not.
sentences.zh: 如果相同的突变组合出现在替代起始点的至少一个重复的至少一次读取中，则由特定起始点产生的突变组合被分类为共享的，如果不是，则突变组合被分类为起始点特异性的。

blocks.html_en: Analysis of protein sequence embeddings in ESM-C

sentences.en: Analysis of protein sequence embeddings in ESM-C
sentences.zh: ESM-C 中蛋白质序列嵌入的分析

blocks.html_en: Sequence embeddings of evolved consensus genotypes in the WT BoNT/E background were generated according to the ESM repository embedding tutorial (https://github.com/evolutionaryscale/esm/tree/main/cookbook/tutorials). Principal component analysis was performed on each embedding layer, then the embedding layer with principal components 1 and 2 that clustered evolved protease sequences by substrate closest to the k-means clusters, according to Rand index, was selected for analysis (layer 5). The BoNT/E background mutants were plotted in the principal component space and the mutants were replotted with the same coordinates to show activity in the D3, D4 and PROSS1 backgrounds.

sentences.en: Sequence embeddings of evolved consensus genotypes in the WT BoNT/E background were generated according to the ESM repository embedding tutorial (https://github.com/evolutionaryscale/esm/tree/main/cookbook/tutorials). Principal component analysis was performed on each embedding layer, then the embedding layer with principal components 1 and 2 that clustered evolved protease sequences by substrate closest to the k-means clusters, according to Rand index, was selected for analysis (layer 5).
sentences.zh: WT BoNT/E 背景中进化共识基因型的序列嵌入是根据 ESM 存储库嵌入教程 (https://github.com/evolutionaryscale/esm/tree/main/cookbook/tutorials) 生成的。对每个嵌入层进行主成分分析，然后根据兰德指数，选择主成分1和2的嵌入层进行分析（第5层），该嵌入层通过最接近k均值聚类的底物对进化的蛋白酶序列进行聚类。

sentences.en: The BoNT/E background mutants were plotted in the principal component space and the mutants were replotted with the same coordinates to show activity in the D3, D4 and PROSS1 backgrounds.
sentences.zh: 将 BoNT/E 背景突变体绘制在主成分空间中，并使用相同的坐标重新绘制突变体以显示 D3、D4 和 PROSS1 背景中的活性。

blocks.html_en: Gel shift proteolysis assays

sentences.en: Gel shift proteolysis assays
sentences.zh: 凝胶转移蛋白水解测定

blocks.html_en: Substrate proteins were diluted to the indicated concentration in reaction buffer. Proteases were diluted in reaction buffer to 20× the indicated final concentration. Of diluted protease samples or buffer-only negative controls, 2.5 µl was added to diluted substrates in PCR strip tubes, mixed, then incubated for the indicated reaction time at 37 °C. Reactions were quenched in LDS loading buffer supplemented with 2 mM dithiothreitol, then analysed by SDS–PAGE and Coomassie InstantBlue stain (Abcam).

sentences.en: Substrate proteins were diluted to the indicated concentration in reaction buffer.
sentences.zh: 将底物蛋白在反应缓冲液中稀释至指定浓度。

sentences.en: Proteases were diluted in reaction buffer to 20× the indicated final concentration.
sentences.zh: 将蛋白酶在反应缓冲液中稀释至指定终浓度的 20 倍。

sentences.en: Of diluted protease samples or buffer-only negative controls, 2.5 µl was added to diluted substrates in PCR strip tubes, mixed, then incubated for the indicated reaction time at 37 °C.
sentences.zh: 将稀释的蛋白酶样品或仅缓冲液的阴性对照中的 2.5 µl 添加到 PCR 带管中的稀释底物中，混合，然后在 37 °C 下孵育指定的反应时间。

sentences.en: Reactions were quenched in LDS loading buffer supplemented with 2 mM dithiothreitol, then analysed by SDS–PAGE and Coomassie InstantBlue stain (Abcam).
sentences.zh: 在补充有 2 mM 二硫苏糖醇的 LDS 上样缓冲液中猝灭反应，然后通过 SDS-PAGE 和 Coomassie InstantBlue 染色剂 (Abcam) 进行分析。

blocks.html_en: Intact protein mass spectrometry

sentences.en: Intact protein mass spectrometry
sentences.zh: 完整蛋白质质谱分析

blocks.html_en: Proteolysis reactions were diluted to 100 ng μl−1 in 25 mM HEPES pH 7.5, 10 mM MgCl2 and 150 mM NaCl. Of diluted protein, 1 μl was injected onto a Waters BioAccord LC-TOF (composed of an ACQUITY I-Class UPLC and RDa detector with an ESI source) with an ACQUITY UPLC Protein BEH C4 column (300 Å, 1.7 μm, 2.1 × 50 mm) at 80 °C for the duration of analysis. Samples were desalted for 1 min before being eluted onto the mass spectrometer with a 5–85% gradient of acetonitrile in 2.5 min at a flow rate of 0.4 ml min−1. Ionization was performed at a cone voltage of 55 V and desolvation temperature of 550 °C. The instrument scanned at a rate of 0.2 scans per second over the range 50–2,000 m/z. Protein m/z spectra were deconvoluted into intact mass using the MaxEnt1 function within UNIFI software (Waters).

sentences.en: Proteolysis reactions were diluted to 100 ng μl−1 in 25 mM HEPES pH 7.5, 10 mM MgCl2 and 150 mM NaCl.
sentences.zh: 蛋白水解反应在 25 mM HEPES pH 7.5、10 mM MgCl2 和 150 mM NaCl 中稀释至 100 ng μl−1。

sentences.en: Of diluted protein, 1 μl was injected onto a Waters BioAccord LC-TOF (composed of an ACQUITY I-Class UPLC and RDa detector with an ESI source) with an ACQUITY UPLC Protein BEH C4 column (300 Å, 1.7 μm, 2.1 × 50 mm) at 80 °C for the duration of analysis.
sentences.zh: 在 80 °C 下，将 1 μl 稀释蛋白质注射到 Waters BioAccord LC-TOF（由 ACQUITY I-Class UPLC 和带有 ESI 源的 RDa 检测器组成）和 ACQUITY UPLC Protein BEH C4 色谱柱（300 Å，1.7 μm，2.1 × 50 mm）上进行分析。

sentences.en: Samples were desalted for 1 min before being eluted onto the mass spectrometer with a 5–85% gradient of acetonitrile in 2.5 min at a flow rate of 0.4 ml min−1.
sentences.zh: 样品脱盐 1 分钟，然后用 5-85% 乙腈梯度在 2.5 分钟内以 0.4 ml min−1 的流速洗脱到质谱仪上。

sentences.en: Ionization was performed at a cone voltage of 55 V and desolvation temperature of 550 °C.
sentences.zh: 电离在 55 V 的锥电压和 550 °C 的去溶剂化温度下进行。

sentences.en: The instrument scanned at a rate of 0.2 scans per second over the range 50–2,000 m/z.
sentences.zh: 仪器在 50–2,000 m/z 范围内以每秒 0.2 次扫描的速率进行扫描。

sentences.en: Protein m/z spectra were deconvoluted into intact mass using the MaxEnt1 function within UNIFI software (Waters).
sentences.zh: 使用 UNIFI 软件 (Waters) 中的 MaxEnt1 函数将蛋白质 m/z 谱解卷积为完整质量。

blocks.html_en: Molecular dynamics simulations of protease–substrate complexes

sentences.en: Molecular dynamics simulations of protease–substrate complexes
sentences.zh: 蛋白酶-底物复合物的分子动力学模拟

blocks.html_en: WT BoNT/E and D3 protease–substrate complex structures from which simulations were initiated from were prepared by AF3 prediction of the protease with Zn2+ and the following SNAP25 cleavage site-flanking subsequence:

sentences.en: WT BoNT/E and D3 protease–substrate complex structures from which simulations were initiated from were prepared by AF3 prediction of the protease with Zn2+ and the following SNAP25 cleavage site-flanking subsequence:
sentences.zh: 通过使用 Zn2+ 对蛋白酶进行 AF3 预测和以下 SNAP25 切割位点侧翼子序列，制备了开始模拟的 WT BoNT/E 和 D3 蛋白酶-底物复合物结构：

blocks.html_en: MDENLEQVSGIIGNLRHMALDMGNEIDTQNRQIDRIMEKADSNKTRIDEANQRATKMLG.

sentences.en: MDENLEQVSGIIGNLRHMALDMGNEIDTQNRQIDRIMEKADSNKTRIDEANQRATKMLG.
sentences.zh: MDENLEQVSGIIGNLRHMALDMGNEIDTQNRQIDRIMEKADSNKTRIDEANQRATKMLG。

blocks.html_en: Because AF3 accurately placed the substrate in the correct register for the highly active SNAP25-cleaving proteases WT BoNT/E and D3, but not for the proteases evolved not to cleave SNAP25, evolved protease–substrate complexes were instead prepared by mutating the parent WT or D3 complex prediction to the evolved sequence.

sentences.en: Because AF3 accurately placed the substrate in the correct register for the highly active SNAP25-cleaving proteases WT BoNT/E and D3, but not for the proteases evolved not to cleave SNAP25, evolved protease–substrate complexes were instead prepared by mutating the parent WT or D3 complex prediction to the evolved sequence.
sentences.zh: 由于 AF3 准确地将底物放置在高活性 SNAP25 裂解蛋白酶 WT BoNT/E 和 D3 的正确位置，但对于进化后不裂解 SNAP25 的蛋白酶则不然，因此通过将亲本 WT 或 D3 复合物预测突变为进化序列来制备进化的蛋白酶-底物复合物。

blocks.html_en: All-atom molecular dynamics simulations were performed using OpenMM (v8.2)61. Protein systems were parameterized with the Amber ff14SB force field62, and the catalytic Zn2+ ion was treated using the standard Amber non-bonded 12-6 model63. Existing hydrogen atoms were removed from input structures and re-added at pH 7.0 to ensure consistent protonation states. Each system was solvated in a rectangular box of TIP3P water64 with a minimum padding of 10 Å between the solute and box edges. No counterions were added to preserve the native electrostatic environment of the peptide–Zn2+ complexes. Long-range electrostatic interactions were calculated using the particle mesh Ewald method65, and all bonds involving hydrogen atoms were constrained using the SHAKE algorithm, permitting a 2-fs integration timestep.

sentences.en: All-atom molecular dynamics simulations were performed using OpenMM (v8.2)61.
sentences.zh: 使用 OpenMM (v8.2)61 进行全原子分子动力学模拟。

sentences.en: Protein systems were parameterized with the Amber ff14SB force field62, and the catalytic Zn2+ ion was treated using the standard Amber non-bonded 12-6 model63.
sentences.zh: 使用 Amber ff14SB 力场对蛋白质系统进行参数化62，并使用标准 Amber 非键合 12-6 模型63 处理催化 Zn2+ 离子。

sentences.en: Existing hydrogen atoms were removed from input structures and re-added at pH 7.0 to ensure consistent protonation states.
sentences.zh: 从输入结构中去除现有的氢原子，并在 pH 7.0 时重新添加，以确保一致的质子化状态。

sentences.en: Each system was solvated in a rectangular box of TIP3P water64 with a minimum padding of 10 Å between the solute and box edges.
sentences.zh: 每个系统都在 TIP3P water64 的矩形盒子中进行溶剂化，溶质和盒子边缘之间的最小填充量为 10 Å。

sentences.en: No counterions were added to preserve the native electrostatic environment of the peptide–Zn2+ complexes.
sentences.zh: 未添加抗衡离子来保护肽-Zn2+ 复合物的天然静电环境。

sentences.en: Long-range electrostatic interactions were calculated using the particle mesh Ewald method65, and all bonds involving hydrogen atoms were constrained using the SHAKE algorithm, permitting a 2-fs integration timestep.
sentences.zh: 使用粒子网格 Ewald 方法65 计算长程静电相互作用，并且使用 SHAKE 算法约束所有涉及氢原子的键，从而允许 2-fs 积分时间步长。

blocks.html_en: Simulations were conducted in the canonical (NVT) ensemble at 298 K using a Langevin integrator with a friction coefficient of 1.0 ps−1. Before production dynamics, each system underwent 500 steps of energy minimization to relieve steric clashes. Production trajectories were propagated for 3 μs per system (1.5 × 109 integration steps), with coordinates saved every 100 ps for subsequent analysis. To reduce storage requirements, only protein and Zn2+ ion coordinates were retained in trajectory files, excluding bulk solvent. All simulations were performed on NVIDIA L40s and H100 GPUs, hosted on the MIT Engaging cluster administered by MIT Research Computing, using mixed-precision arithmetic. Checkpoint files were written every 50 ps to enable seamless restart upon computational resource preemption, ensuring continuous trajectory accumulation across multiple job submissions.

sentences.en: Simulations were conducted in the canonical (NVT) ensemble at 298 K using a Langevin integrator with a friction coefficient of 1.0 ps−1.
sentences.zh: 使用摩擦系数为 1.0 ps−1 的 Langevin 积分器在 298 K 的规范 (NVT) 系综中进行模拟。

sentences.en: Before production dynamics, each system underwent 500 steps of energy minimization to relieve steric clashes.
sentences.zh: 在生产动态之前，每个系统都经历了 500 个能量最小化步骤，以缓解空间冲突。

sentences.en: Production trajectories were propagated for 3 μs per system (1.5 × 109 integration steps), with coordinates saved every 100 ps for subsequent analysis.
sentences.zh: 每个系统的生产轨迹传播 3 μs（1.5 × 109 积分步骤），每 100 ps 保存一次坐标以供后续分析。

sentences.en: To reduce storage requirements, only protein and Zn2+ ion coordinates were retained in trajectory files, excluding bulk solvent.
sentences.zh: 为了减少存储要求，轨迹文件中仅保留蛋白质和 Zn2+ 离子坐标，不包括本体溶剂。

sentences.en: All simulations were performed on NVIDIA L40s and H100 GPUs, hosted on the MIT Engaging cluster administered by MIT Research Computing, using mixed-precision arithmetic.
sentences.zh: 所有模拟均在 NVIDIA L40 和 H100 GPU 上执行，这些 GPU 托管在由麻省理工学院研究计算管理的 MIT Engaging 集群上，使用混合精度算法。

sentences.en: Checkpoint files were written every 50 ps to enable seamless restart upon computational resource preemption, ensuring continuous trajectory accumulation across multiple job submissions.
sentences.zh: 检查点文件每 50 ps 写入一次，以便在计算资源抢占时实现无缝重启，确保跨多个作业提交的连续轨迹积累。

blocks.html_en: Ataxin-2 protease expression and cleavage assay in mammalian cells

sentences.en: Ataxin-2 protease expression and cleavage assay in mammalian cells
sentences.zh: 哺乳动物细胞中 Ataxin-2 蛋白酶的表达和切割测定

blocks.html_en: Of HEK293T cells (ATCC) at 160,000 cells per millilitre, 2.7 ml was seeded in six-well culture plates. After 24 h, wells were co-transfected with 1.1 µg full-length FLAG-tagged ATXN2 cDNA in a pCDNA3.1 vector and C-terminal 6×His-tagged proteases in pCDNA3.1 using Lipofectamine 2000 transfection reagent (Thermo Fisher Scientific) following the manufacturer’s instructions. For protease expression blots, 1.1 µg protease plasmid was transfected, whereas for cleavage detection blots 0.11 µg was transfected. For no protease negative controls, an equivalent mass of pUC19 plasmid was transfected instead of protease expression plasmid. Cell lysates were harvested 24 h later in lysis buffer (RIPA (Thermo Fisher Scientific) with 1 mM PMSF and cOmplete protease inhibitor (Roche)). The lysates were analysed by western blot for ataxin-2 (using an anti-FLAG tag antibody) or protease (using an anti-6×His tag antibody) as well as GAPDH as a loading control. Anti-FLAG and anti-6×His were detected with horseradish peroxidase-conjugated secondary antibodies and chemiluminescence measurement, whereas anti-GAPDH was detected with IRDye 680RD-conjugated secondary antibodies and fluorescence measurement. Band intensity was quantified with Image Lab (Bio-Rad).

sentences.en: Of HEK293T cells (ATCC) at 160,000 cells per millilitre, 2.7 ml was seeded in six-well culture plates.
sentences.zh: 将 2.7 ml HEK293T 细胞 (ATCC) 以每毫升 160,000 个细胞接种到六孔培养板中。

sentences.en: After 24 h, wells were co-transfected with 1.1 µg full-length FLAG-tagged ATXN2 cDNA in a pCDNA3.1 vector and C-terminal 6×His-tagged proteases in pCDNA3.1 using Lipofectamine 2000 transfection reagent (Thermo Fisher Scientific) following the manufacturer’s instructions.
sentences.zh: 24小时后，按照制造商的说明，使用Lipofectamine 2000转染试剂（Thermo Fisher Scientific）将pCDNA3.1载体中的1.1 µg全长FLAG标记的ATXN2 cDNA和pCDNA3.1中的C端6×His标记的蛋白酶共转染到孔中。

sentences.en: For protease expression blots, 1.1 µg protease plasmid was transfected, whereas for cleavage detection blots 0.11 µg was transfected.
sentences.zh: 对于蛋白酶表达印迹，转染 1.1 µg 蛋白酶质粒，而对于裂解检测印迹，转染 0.11 µg。

sentences.en: For no protease negative controls, an equivalent mass of pUC19 plasmid was transfected instead of protease expression plasmid.
sentences.zh: 对于无蛋白酶阴性对照，转染等量的pUC19质粒而不是蛋白酶表达质粒。

sentences.en: Cell lysates were harvested 24 h later in lysis buffer (RIPA (Thermo Fisher Scientific) with 1 mM PMSF and cOmplete protease inhibitor (Roche)).
sentences.zh: 24小时后，在裂解缓冲液（含有1 mM PMSF和cOmplete蛋白酶抑制剂（Roche）的RIPA（Thermo Fisher Scientific））中收获细胞裂解物。

sentences.en: The lysates were analysed by western blot for ataxin-2 (using an anti-FLAG tag antibody) or protease (using an anti-6×His tag antibody) as well as GAPDH as a loading control.
sentences.zh: 通过蛋白质印迹分析裂解物中的 ataxin-2（使用抗 FLAG 标签抗体）或蛋白酶（使用抗 6×His 标签抗体）以及作为上样对照的 GAPDH。

sentences.en: Anti-FLAG and anti-6×His were detected with horseradish peroxidase-conjugated secondary antibodies and chemiluminescence measurement, whereas anti-GAPDH was detected with IRDye 680RD-conjugated secondary antibodies and fluorescence measurement.
sentences.zh: 抗FLAG和抗6×His通过辣根过氧化物酶标记的二抗和化学发光测量来检测，而抗GAPDH通过IRDye 680RD标记的二抗和荧光测量来检测。

sentences.en: Band intensity was quantified with Image Lab (Bio-Rad).
sentences.zh: 使用 Image Lab (Bio-Rad) 对条带强度进行量化。

blocks.html_en: Mammalian cell viability assay to measure protease toxicity

sentences.en: Mammalian cell viability assay to measure protease toxicity
sentences.zh: 用于测量蛋白酶毒性的哺乳动物细胞活力测定

blocks.html_en: Of HEK293T cells (ATCC) at 160,000 cells per millilitre, 100 µl was seeded in 96-well culture plates. After 24 h, wells were transfected with the indicated mass of indicated protease expression plasmid using Lipofectamine 2000 transfection reagent (Thermo Fisher Scientific) following the manufacturer’s instructions. Viability was measured 42 h post-transfection with the CellTiter-Glo kit (Promega) according to the manufacturer’s instructions. Cells were incubated at room temperature for 30 min before 100 µl CellTiter-Glo reagent was added to each well. Contents were mixed, signal was allowed to stabilize for 10 min, then luminescence dependent on cellular ATP was measured using a Tecan Spark plate reader.

sentences.en: Of HEK293T cells (ATCC) at 160,000 cells per millilitre, 100 µl was seeded in 96-well culture plates.
sentences.zh: 将每毫升 160,000 个细胞的 HEK293T 细胞 (ATCC) 中的 100 µl 接种到 96 孔培养板中。

sentences.en: After 24 h, wells were transfected with the indicated mass of indicated protease expression plasmid using Lipofectamine 2000 transfection reagent (Thermo Fisher Scientific) following the manufacturer’s instructions.
sentences.zh: 24小时后，按照制造商的说明，使用Lipofectamine 2000转染试剂（Thermo Fisher Scientific）用指定质量的指定蛋白酶表达质粒转染孔。

sentences.en: Viability was measured 42 h post-transfection with the CellTiter-Glo kit (Promega) according to the manufacturer’s instructions.
sentences.zh: 根据制造商的说明，使用 CellTiter-Glo 试剂盒（Promega）在转染后 42 小时测量活力。

sentences.en: Cells were incubated at room temperature for 30 min before 100 µl CellTiter-Glo reagent was added to each well.
sentences.zh: 将细胞在室温下孵育 30 分钟，然后将 100 µl CellTiter-Glo 试剂添加到每个孔中。

sentences.en: Contents were mixed, signal was allowed to stabilize for 10 min, then luminescence dependent on cellular ATP was measured using a Tecan Spark plate reader.
sentences.zh: 混合内容物，使信号稳定 10 分钟，然后使用 Tecan Spark 读板器测量依赖于细胞 ATP 的发光。

blocks.html_en: Contributions

sentences.en: Contributions
sentences.zh: 贡献

blocks.html_en: N.A.K. designed the research, performed the computational design, performed the PACE and PANCE experiments, characterized the redesigned and evolved proteases in vitro and in human cells, and analysed the data. J.A.X. performed and analysed the PACE and protease characterization experiments. E.Z. purified and assayed the BoNT toxins for delivery. G.K.M. performed the molecular dynamics simulations and PACE. Y.A.T. assisted with the sequencing experiments. J.M. assisted in research design. C.F.H. performed substrate profiling. L.E.B. assisted with the evolution experiments. W.J. performed the mass spectrometry experiments. D.R.L. supervised the research and experimental design. N.A.K., J.A.X. and D.R.L. wrote the manuscript with input from all authors.

sentences.en: N.A.K.

designed the research, performed the computational design, performed the PACE and PANCE experiments, characterized the redesigned and evolved proteases in vitro and in human cells, and analysed the data.

blocks.html_en: Extended data figures and tables

sentences.en: Extended data figures and tables
sentences.zh: 扩展数据图和表

blocks.html_en: Extended Data Fig. 1 In silico characterization of ProteinMPNN-redesigned BoNT proteases.

sentences.en: Extended Data Fig. 1 In silico characterization of ProteinMPNN-redesigned BoNT proteases.
sentences.zh: 扩展数据 图 1 ProteinMPNN 重新设计的 BoNT 蛋白酶的计算机表征。

blocks.html_en: (a) The AlphaFold2 (AF2)-predicted structures of top-performing BoNT protease redesigned variants aligned to the predicted structure of the parental wild-type proteases (cyan) for BoNT/E (left, green), BoNT/F (middle, brown), and BoNT/X (right, purple) proteases. (b) Distributions of RMSD values between AF2-predicted redesigned protease and AF2-predicted wild-type protease structures grouped by redesign criteria. (c) Distributions of model confidence scores for AF2-predicted redesigned protease structures grouped by redesign criteria. (d) Pairwise percentage of residues differing between wild-type and redesigned protease sequences. RMSD, root mean square deviation; pLDDT, predicted local distance difference test.

sentences.en: (a) The AlphaFold2 (AF2)-predicted structures of top-performing BoNT protease redesigned variants aligned to the predicted structure of the parental wild-type proteases (cyan) for BoNT/E (left, green), BoNT/F (middle, brown), and BoNT/X (right, purple) proteases.
sentences.zh: (a) 性能最佳的 BoNT 蛋白酶重新设计变体的 AlphaFold2 (AF2) 预测结构与 BoNT/E（左，绿色）、BoNT/F（中，棕色）和 BoNT/X（右，紫色）蛋白酶的亲本野生型蛋白酶（青色）的预测结构对齐。

sentences.en: (b) Distributions of RMSD values between AF2-predicted redesigned protease and AF2-predicted wild-type protease structures grouped by redesign criteria.
sentences.zh: (b) AF2 预测的重新设计的蛋白酶和 AF2 预测的野生型蛋白酶结构（按重新设计标准分组）之间的 RMSD 值分布。

sentences.en: (c) Distributions of model confidence scores for AF2-predicted redesigned protease structures grouped by redesign criteria.
sentences.zh: (c) AF2 预测的重新设计的蛋白酶结构的模型置信度得分的分布，按重新设计标准分组。

sentences.en: (d) Pairwise percentage of residues differing between wild-type and redesigned protease sequences.
sentences.zh: (d)野生型和重新设计的蛋白酶序列之间残基差异的成对百分比。

sentences.en: RMSD, root mean square deviation; pLDDT, predicted local distance difference test.
sentences.zh: RMSD，均方根偏差； pLDDT，预测局部距离差异测试。

blocks.html_en: Extended Data Fig. 2 PROSS redesign of BoNT/E proteases and comparison to ProteinMPNN redesign.

sentences.en: Extended Data Fig. 2 PROSS redesign of BoNT/E proteases and comparison to ProteinMPNN redesign.
sentences.zh: 扩展数据图 2 BoNT/E 蛋白酶的 PROSS 重新设计以及与 ProteinMPNN 重新设计的比较。

blocks.html_en: (a) Pairwise percentage of residues differing between wild-type and PROSS-redesigned protease sequences. (b) Catalytic rate and soluble yield for assayed PROSS designs in parallel with top ProteinMPNN redesigns. Rate assays were conducted with 2.5 nM protease and 4.75 µM SNAP25 FRET substrate. Dashed lines indicate values for the wild-type protease. (c) Abundance of top PROSS- and ProteinMPNN-redesigned proteases in purification elution fractions E1-E4 from the soluble fraction of E. coli expression cells. 5 µl out of approximately 1 ml of elution fraction were loaded into each lane. (d) Protein thermal melting curves to measure melting temperatures. Thermal unfolding was followed by SYPRO Orange fluorophore and Tm values were calculated as the temperature at which slope of the curve is maximal. (e) Michaelis-Menten plot for in vitro cleavage kinetics with the SNAP25 FRET substrate and resulting kinetic parameters for BoNT/E protease variants. In b, values represent the mean of two replicates. In d-e, values and error bars represent mean ± s.d. of three replicates.

sentences.en: (a) Pairwise percentage of residues differing between wild-type and PROSS-redesigned protease sequences.
sentences.zh: (a) 野生型和 PROSS 重新设计的蛋白酶序列之间残基差异的成对百分比。

sentences.en: (b) Catalytic rate and soluble yield for assayed PROSS designs in parallel with top ProteinMPNN redesigns.
sentences.zh: (b) 与顶级 ProteinMPNN 重新设计并行的 PROSS 设计的催化速率和可溶性产率。

sentences.en: Rate assays were conducted with 2.5 nM protease and 4.75 µM SNAP25 FRET substrate.
sentences.zh: 使用 2.5 nM 蛋白酶和 4.75 µM SNAP25 FRET 底物进行速率测定。

sentences.en: Dashed lines indicate values for the wild-type protease.
sentences.zh: 虚线表示野生型蛋白酶的值。

blocks.html_en: Extended Data Fig. 3 ProteinMPNN redesign and characterization of stabilized BoNT/F and BoNT/X proteases.

sentences.en: Extended Data Fig. 3 ProteinMPNN redesign and characterization of stabilized BoNT/F and BoNT/X proteases.
sentences.zh: 扩展数据图 3 ProteinMPNN 重新设计和稳定 BoNT/F 和 BoNT/X 蛋白酶的表征。

blocks.html_en: (a) Variable and constrained sequence mapped to the BoNT/F protease structure by constraint group. Gray, fixed by distance; black, fixed by conservation; orange, redesigned. (b) Catalytic rate and soluble yield for assayed designs. Cleavage assays were conducted with 10 nM protease and 4.75 µM VAMP1 FRET substrate. Dashed lines indicate values for the wild-type protease. (c) Protein melting curves to measure thermal stability (top) and resulting melting temperatures (bottom). (d) Michaelis-Menten plot for in vitro cleavage kinetics with native substrate (top) and kinetic parameters (bottom) for BoNT/F protease variants. (e) Apparent protease activity in the PACE host measured by luciferase signal. (f) Variable and constrained sequence mapped to the BoNT/X protease structure by constraint group. Gray, fixed by distance; black, fixed by conservation; purple, redesigned. (g) Catalytic rate and soluble yield for assayed designs. Cleavage assays were conducted with 2.5 nM protease and 4.75 µM VAMP1 FRET substrate. Dashed lines indicate values for the wild-type protease. (h) Protein melting curves to measure thermal stability (top) and resulting melting temperatures (bottom). (i) Michaelis-Menten plot for in vitro cleavage kinetics with native substrate (top) and kinetic parameters (bottom) for BoNT/X protease variants. (j) Apparent protease activity in the PACE host measured by luciferase signal. (k) Intracellular delivery of HiBiT-tagged redesigned proteases with BoNT/X toxins in N2A cells, measured by luminescence signal upon luciferase complementation. Values and error bars represent mean ± s.d. of three replicates. Bars in k represent the average of two biological replicates.

blocks.html_en: (a) Consensus genotypes from D4 starting point at the final PACE timepoint. (b) Consensus genotypes from PROSS1 starting point at the final PACE timepoint. Mutations are colored by whether they occurred at wild-type residues unchanged during redesign (blue) or at redesigned residues (pink). (c to e) Fraction of consensus genotypes for each origin starting point that are functional on their cognate evolution substrate (415, 413, and 412, respectively) in each background. (f to h) Correlation of genotype circuit activation over inactive control for each mutation set grafted into a redesigned protease background vs. into the wild-type BoNT/E background. Dashed lines indicate the activation threshold defining a functional genotype. Correlation r values are Pearson correlation coefficients. (i) Distribution of functional genotype Hamming Distance for each protease background for all assayed genotypes. Dashed lines indicate the mean for each background. In c-i, a genotype is defined as functional if its luciferase circuit activation level is > 2-fold above that of the inactive dBoNT/F protease control.

sentences.en: (a) Consensus genotypes from D4 starting point at the final PACE timepoint.
sentences.zh: (a) 从 D4 起始点到最终 PACE 时间点的共识基因型。

sentences.en: (b) Consensus genotypes from PROSS1 starting point at the final PACE timepoint.
sentences.zh: (b) 从 PROSS1 起点到最终 PACE 时间点的共识基因型。

sentences.en: Mutations are colored by whether they occurred at wild-type residues unchanged during redesign (blue) or at redesigned residues (pink).

sentences.en: Dashed lines indicate the activation threshold defining a functional genotype.

sentences.en: Correlation r values are Pearson correlation coefficients.
sentences.zh: 相关 r 值是皮尔逊相关系数。

sentences.en: (i) Distribution of functional genotype Hamming Distance for each protease background for all assayed genotypes.
sentences.zh: (i) 所有测定基因型的每种蛋白酶背景的功能基因型汉明距离的分布。

sentences.en: Dashed lines indicate the mean for each background.
sentences.zh: 虚线表示每个背景的平均值。

sentences.en: In c-i, a genotype is defined as functional if its luciferase circuit activation level is > 2-fold above that of the inactive dBoNT/F protease control.

blocks.html_en: (a) Correlation of BoNT/E ProteinMPNN redesign soluble yield with ProteinMPNN apo score. (b) Correlation of BoNT/E PROSS redesign soluble yield with ProteinMPNN apo score. (c) Experimentally measured protein melting temperature vs. ProteinMPNN apo score for evolution starting points. (d to g) Correlation of starting point-normalized circuit activation by luciferase reporter to ProteinMPNN apo scores (top) and to complex scores for evolved residues normalized to unevolved residue scores (bottom) in BoNT/E, D3, D4, and PROSS1, backgrounds, respectively. ProteinMPNN scores are given as residue-averaged negative log-likelihoods (lower values are more likely) for the Alphafold3-predicted BoNT/E protease structure alone (apo) or bound to the cognate substrate (complex), averaged over 10 replicate calculations. Correlations are labeled with Pearson’s r coefficients.

sentences.en: (a) Correlation of BoNT/E ProteinMPNN redesign soluble yield with ProteinMPNN apo score.
sentences.zh: (a) BoNT/E ProteinMPNN 重新设计可溶性产量与 ProteinMPNN apo 评分的相关性。

sentences.en: (b) Correlation of BoNT/E PROSS redesign soluble yield with ProteinMPNN apo score.

sentences.en: (d to g) Correlation of starting point-normalized circuit activation by luciferase reporter to ProteinMPNN apo scores (top) and to complex scores for evolved residues normalized to unevolved residue scores (bottom) in BoNT/E, D3, D4, and PROSS1, backgrounds, respectively.
sentences.zh: (d 至 g)分别在 BoNT/E、D3、D4 和 PROSS1 背景中，荧光素酶报告基因起始点归一化电路激活与 ProteinMPNN apo 评分（顶部）以及归一化为未进化残基评分（底部）的进化残基的复杂评分的相关性。

sentences.en: ProteinMPNN scores are given as residue-averaged negative log-likelihoods (lower values are more likely) for the Alphafold3-predicted BoNT/E protease structure alone (apo) or bound to the cognate substrate (complex), averaged over 10 replicate calculations.
sentences.zh: ProteinMPNN 分数以 Alphafold3 预测的单独 BoNT/E 蛋白酶结构 (apo) 或与同源底物（复合物）结合的残基平均负对数似然（较低的值更有可能）给出，平均超过 10 次重复计算。

sentences.en: Correlations are labeled with Pearson’s r coefficients.
sentences.zh: 相关性用 Pearson 的 r 系数标记。

blocks.html_en: Extended Data Fig. 8 Validation of ataxin-2 as a protease evolution target, evolutionary trajectory, and initial assessment of ataxin-2-cleaving proteases.

sentences.en: Extended Data Fig. 8 Validation of ataxin-2 as a protease evolution target, evolutionary trajectory, and initial assessment of ataxin-2-cleaving proteases.
sentences.zh: 扩展数据 图 8 ataxin-2 作为蛋白酶进化目标的验证、进化轨迹以及 ataxin-2 裂解蛋白酶的初步评估。

blocks.html_en: (a) Cleavage of TEV substrate-substituted ataxin-2 to assess if ataxin-2 is proteolytically accessible at the selected target site. Red, anti-FLAG chemiluminescence detection of the ataxin-2 substrate and cleavage product; green, 580 nm fluorescence detection of the GAPDH loading control. (b) Mutation at each substrate position that converts the SNAP-25 residue to the corresponding ataxin-2 target peptide residue in the alignment in Fig. 4b. (c) BoNT/E wild-type starting activity measured by luciferase signal on each single SNAP-25→ataxin-2 mutant substrate to identify the most challenging (poorly tolerated) single substitution. Catalytically dead BoNT/F (dF) used as a negative control. (d) Parallel evolutionary trajectories initiated with designed or wild-type BoNT/E towards specificity for ataxin-2 cleavage. Host selection schemes used for each stage described in Supplementary Fig. 6 and phage titers in Supplementary Fig. 7a–i. (e) Top-performing redesign-evolved and wild-type-evolved protease structures modelled in AlphaFold3 (refs. 66,67,68). MPNN-redesigned residues are in light green. (f). Apparent protease activity of consensus clones and starting proteases on positive selection substrate ataxin-2 (left) and negative selection substrate SNAP25 (right) measured by luciferase signal. Values and error bars in (c) represent mean ± s.d. of three replicates. Values and error bars in (f) represent mean ± s.d. of two replicates.

blocks.html_en: Extended Data Fig. 9 AlphaFold3 prediction and experimental determination of ataxin-2 scissile bonds for reprogrammed proteases.

blocks.html_en: (a) AlphaFold3-predicted evolved protease-ataxin-2 complex structures highlighting predicted interactions between evolved residues and ataxin-2 substrate. (b) Gel shift assay for ataxin-2 substrate peptide cleavage. Cleavage reactions visualized on this gel were used for mass spectrometry analysis. (c) Mass spectra of 0.45 µM protease cleavage reactions for each of four evolved proteases. Peaks with masses consistent with gel band masses observed in b labeled as uncleaved substrate or product. (d) Observed cleavage sites in ataxin-2 that yield products with masses detected in c, compared to AlphaFold3-predicted cleavage sites.

blocks.html_en: (a) On-target ataxin-2 FRET substrate cleavage initial rate vs substrate concentration (top) and fitted parameters (bottom). (b) Off-target SNAP-25 FRET substrate cleavage initial rate vs substrate concentration (top) and fitted parameters (bottom). (c) Viability of HEK293T cells expressing ataxin-2-cleaving proteases measured by CellTiter-Glo assay. Cells were transfected with the indicated mass of protease expression plasmid and incubated for 42 h before measuring ATP-dependent luciferase activity. Values and error bars represent mean ± s.d. of three replicates. (d to g) Summary statistics for molecular dynamics simulations of protease-SNAP-25 complexes. The protease-substrate interface is defined as the pairs of inter-chain heavy atoms ≤ 4.5 Å apart. Q-native score is defined as the number of native protease-substrate contact pairs still within 4.5 Å at time t divided by the total number of native contact pairs defined in frame 0. (h) Thermal stability measured by SYPRO Orange fluorescence for highest-activity final ataxin-2-cleaving variants and unevolved starting points (top) and Tm values inferred as the temperature at which slope is maximal (bottom). Data are shown as mean ± s.d. for three replicates.
